advisor_name: Omar A. Morillo, CFP®, ChFC®, AIF®
review_text_raw:
I reached out to Omar a couple of years ago, just weeks before the end of the year, when I was facing a serious tax situation. What could have been incredibly stressful turned into a major win thanks to him. Omar saved me a substantial amount of money on taxes and helped me set up a pension plan, all in a very tight timeframe and with impressive efficiency.

Since then, he’s been consistently checking in and staying engaged. We have ongoing conversations, and it’s clear he genuinely cares about my financial well-being, not just the transaction. Omar is a great person, extremely knowledgeable, and has helped me tremendously with all of my financial advisor needs.

I can confidently say I wouldn’t be where I am financially today without his guidance.

Ali is a fabulous financial advisor.   She listens, explains things in straightforward and comprehensible way, always responds to my calls or emails in a timely manner, and is overall a delight to work with.  She has reviewed with me all of my current documents such as long term care, taxes, other insurance, etc.  Ali follows up with me on "to do" items so that I do not miss a deadline, such as prepayment of taxes.  She has also assisted me with an appeal to Medicare re my monthly premium.  You can't get any better!! I am extremely Thankful to have found Ali and finally feel confident on where and how my money is invested.

As a long-time DIY investor retired for 15 years, my primary goals have been capital preservation with just enough growth to outpace inflation. For the last few years, this worked well through a conservative portfolio heavy in CDs, bonds, and physical gold bullion coins, with minimal stock market exposure.

However, shifting circumstances created challenging dilemmas: declining interest rates reduced my fixed-income yields, while upcoming required minimum distributions (RMDs) from my IRAs and 401(k) would push more income into taxable accounts. This risked increasing my modified adjusted gross income enough to trigger higher Income-Related Monthly Adjustment Amounts (IRMAA) surcharges on Medicare premiums. This pulled me in two opposing directions: needing growth while minimizing taxable income.

That's when I decided to consult a professional financial planner, specifically seeking a fee-only fiduciary to avoid conflicts of interest. Using directories like the Garrett Planning Network, I identified three qualified candidates. After talking with Alexis Hongamen, he seemed to be perfect, so, I hired him immediately.

I'm very happy with that decision. Alexis quickly understood my situation during a complimentary Zoom consultation and eventually crafted tailored recommendations that directly addressed both dilemmas, including strategic use of a Multi-Year Guaranteed Annuity for reliable, tax-efficient growth.

Despite his office being in Orlando (and me living about three hours away), communication has been seamless via email. He responds promptly, thoroughly, and with clear, precise explanations to all my questions.

I highly recommend Alexis Hongamen of Total Financial Planning for anyone seeking unbiased, expert financial advice. His fiduciary approach and client-focused service are outstanding.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
We were referred to Peek Financial by our college counselor while navigating college planning for our high school senior. Justin Peek and Madelyn Roberts provided truly outstanding service. Justin guided us through the college financial planning process using clear, easy to understand language, which made a complex topic feel manageable and stress free.

Their proprietary college financial planning software gave us valuable clarity around our financial obligations. Justin also went above and beyond by helping us appeal one college’s financial aid package, which resulted in an additional $6,000 per year.

We highly recommend Justin and the team at Peek Financial for college and financial planning services.

I have worked with Lei for about two years and have been extremely impressed with her professionalism, knowledge, and genuine care for her clients.
From the very beginning, she took the time to truly understand my overall situation — not just my finances, but also my family circumstances, career, and both short-term and long-term goals. Because of this, her advice has always felt thoughtful, personalized, and well-aligned with my individual needs rather than generic or one-size-fits-all.
She is consistently responsive and approachable, whether in scheduled planning meetings or through quick questions by email. I always feel heard, and she takes the time to explain options clearly and patiently. She is very knowledgeable and stays current on changes in the economy, tax rules, and financial policies that could impact planning decisions.
What really sets her apart is the comprehensive nature of her guidance. She is willing to learn and delve deeply into various areas, ensuring that her advice reflects the comprehensive financial picture rather than isolated pieces.
On top of her technical expertise, she is kind, patient, thorough, and an excellent communicator. She consistently goes above and beyond expectations, and working with her has given me confidence and peace of mind about my financial planning.
I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for a knowledgeable, thoughtful, and truly client-focused financial advisor.

I have had the privilege of working with Brennan over several years, first at Fidelity and now through Decima Wealth Consulting. Throughout this time, Brennan has consistently demonstrated exceptional expertise in financial planning and a truly holistic approach to wealth management.  What sets Brennan apart is his commitment to understanding each client’s unique circumstances and goals. Brennan invests the time to listen carefully, ensuring that every financial strategy is tailored to the individual’s needs.  His ability to distill complex financial matters into clear, actionable steps makes the planning process both accessible and empowering.  Having worked with other financial planners in the past, I can confidently say that none have matched Brennan’s personal touch, genuine care, and unwavering trustworthiness. Brennan’s communication skills and dedication to client success are second to none.  For anyone seeking comprehensive and personalized wealth management, I highly recommend Brennan! His professionalism and client-focused approach make him an outstanding choice for achieving your financial goals.

My wife and I have worked with Russ Thornton for several years now. Russ is an exceptional financial advisor. His personal attention and sincere interest in our interests, goals, and needs is rare in today's financial services world. Russ admits he isn't a fit for everyone but if you are looking for someone to truly understand your situation and goals, how to live a life that you want and not focus the latest stock fad, then you need to have a conversation with Russ. He will open your mind and heart to what drives you, where you want to get to, and how to get there on your time table.

advisor_name: Malissa Marshall, CFP®, MS Tax, EA
review_text_raw:
Working with Malissa Marshall has been transformative for us. As two busy professionals with a growing family and limited time to untangle complex financial planning, Malissa instantly brought clarity, structure, and peace of mind to our financial life.

From the beginning, she made everything feel manageable — translating complicated tax and planning concepts into clear, actionable guidance, always tailored to our unique situation. What stood out most was how she not only helped us understand what decisions to make, but when and why — helping relieve the stress of guessing or second-guessing big financial moves.

We also appreciated that Malissa has real expertise in cross-border tax and financial planning. This is a major plus given our European roots and future possibility of moving back to Europe. Her experience with international tax scenarios gave us confidence that nothing will fall through the cracks, no matter where life may take us.

Importantly, she's thoughtful, patient, and always a great reminder of the steps we should be thinking about next. That's exactly what we needed given how little time we have. Malissa doesn't just give advice; she helps you feel confident about executing it.

Overall, we highly recommend Malissa — she’s professional, caring, and truly excellent at what she does. We couldn’t be happier with her support and guidance.

We found Bryan after researching diligently advisors and was struck by his story first and foremost - which was front and center, which already gave us a level of trust and respect before we even met him.  After meeting him for the first time, we knew almost immediately that we had found the right Financial Advisor for us.  Unlike going with a big brand, we were intrigued that Bryan came from that world, but instead was inspired to build his own smaller firm, taking on clients he related with, trusted and wanted to see succeed.  He was candid about how he got here, what drew him to start his own firm and was very clear in his vision for his clients.

Our first few meetings were to level-set and really get to know each other.  He asked some deep questions about where my husband and I wanted to be, what our values were and where our priorities were in relation to each other.  While I commented it almost felt like a therapy session - it was vitally important as he crafted our next 50 years of financial future to know that we were on the same page.  We are at a point in our careers and life where we were / are about to make some monumental decisions, and working with Bryan helped us secure a safety-net and comfort that we had an ally in making those decisions.

He helped us plan for our Surrogacy journey to have our first child, which we have already kicked off thanks, in-part, to Bryan's planning.  I dare say we might not have ever gotten here so quickly unless Bryan had planned accordingly, and provided a financial pathway for us to feel confident that we could do it.  We had originally thought we would be able to afford surrogacy 'down the road' but he looked into our finances and savings, and from day one was confident we could make 'down the road' a reality in under a year, and pushed us to finally officially start the process earlier this year when he gave us the green light financially.  This is not just financial planning - Bryan is a true part of our decision-making process of some huge impactful decisions for our family, and we are grateful.

Results-wise - besides being able to make our surrogacy journey a reality sooner than we could've ever thought, our finances look great, he explains where we are at in a very clear, accessible way and the tools he uses has given us a level of security and comfort we couldn't have dreamed of a few years back.  Bryan also helps us stay flexible, pivots quickly and stays in constant contact - really putting a human-face and personality behind this process, rather than just using dashboards and platforms.

We would both highly recommend Bryan for financial planning and wealth building to our friends and family (and have!).

I moved my account management to FFA due to my advisor, Angel, joining. I appreciate that FFA works independently with unbiased advice, and Angel is the best when it comes to proactive, hands on management (and growth!) of my personal finances. I can’t say enough good things about his work, whether it’s connecting me to tax professionals, ensuring my money is properly managed to grow for my eventual retirement, or ensuring I have extra liquidity in a pinch, he’s always steered me right and I feel comfortable and confident with him at the helm.

Tony is a great communicator and always available to us.   He respectfully tailors his advice according to our risk tolerance and personal circumstances.  His judgment has been quite sound over the years we have been working with him.  Tony has earned our trust.  Overall, we are very happy with Traveka’s services and plan to stay with them for many years to come.
Very responsive and personal service. I totally recommend.

It's providence - that's how I found TwoTen Planning and Stuart. I was looking for a financial advisor who understand the complexity of corporate compensations, RSU, ESPP and tax planning for retirement. From his bio and what I can check out, Stuart seems a good fit for my situation and after our first meeting I had a good feeling about this relationship which will be long term! After several months of working through my messy finances and consolidating everything so I can have a holistic picture of what everything look like, I feel confident enough to begin the work on the mission that I feel convicted to start for a while now. Finally, I feel that Stuart truly care and that's the best endorsement I can actually make.

I had never considered getting a financial advisor until recently, as I feel comfortable with managing my month-to-month accounts but had never really considered what to do longer term. Taking the plunge into this world seemed intimidating, but with a bit of guidance I decided to seek out someone who works on a fee-only basis for initial assessment, to minimize conflict of interest and to really understand my situation and help me shape my long-term goals.

I reached out to several advisors, and I liked that Jane took time to ask me about myself personally—my life, my values, my dreams—before I needed to make a commitment. I’m very happy I chose her to help me chart out my financial future. Knowing that I was new to financial planning, she approached the process with care, curiosity, and thoughtfulness so that I could feel comfortable and in control at every step of the way. She was thorough in her explanations, accommodating to my questions, and helped me along with the many tasks involved in getting my finances in order. Along the way she also demonstrated a much higher-level acumen that instilled trust in me to continue my journey with her into long-term management.

Overall she was a really great fit for my situation — uncertain how to approach creating a financial future for myself, and needing attention, patience, and practical help. Would highly recommend her to anyone at the same place on their journey.

My wife and I are in our 70's (myself late 70's) and moved from MA to New York City a year and a half ago and are renting an apartment. We have been contemplating buying a coop, and wanted some professional advice on whether to do that or continue renting, and how long our money would last under either scenario. After a couple video calls, Joe presented us with very detailed analyses of the options, including under different possibilities such as with or without figuring in potential long-term care costs. Joe is very knowledgeable and also easy to talk with. We especially liked that besides just putting out numbers he spends time talking about our preferences in different scenarios and their implications. E.g. the stability of owning vs the potential problem of feeling a need to move because of a major financial downturn and then not being easily able to sell a coop. He really listened to what we said and worked with that but at the same time would call us on what he felt might be unreasonable ways to look at something. This was very valuable. Bottom line is that we came away from it (it was set up as a one-time consult project) feeling we had a far greater understanding of our financial situation and how to proceed. We will definitely go back to Joe in the future when it is time to reassess things.
Staff is wonderful ! We feel very comfortable knowing Bouchey Financial is  taking great care our money ..   thanks to Paolo and Scott!!

Carefully tailored our Roth conversion strategy to best meet our specific goals. Great listener and has solid knowledge transfer skills. We Highly recommend Jeff as a trusted fiduciary resource .

advisor_name: Kevin C. Feig, CFP®, CPA, PFS, CFE
review_text_raw: Highly recommend Kevin for anyone seeking a fee-only financial planner. He focuses on what actually makes sense for your family rather than pushing products. We loved that his plan was easy to follow, whether we managed it ourselves or used his services via Altruist. It’s rare to find someone so transparent and dedicated to their clients' best interests.

We've been with Bob for more than 20 years now.  He takes his fiduciary responsibility very seriously.  He's easy to talk to, and is willing to discuss ANY topic- finances, bike rides, cars...it's part of why we've stayed with him.  From a financial perspective, he has been priceless for our asset management, providing advice on everything from life insurance to saving, to spending more...yes, spending more on the things you want to do!  We ask him how to choose investment options in other accounts that he does not manage and doesn't get paid for: work 401Ks, college savings accounts (he even helped identify which one was the most effective for saving), and HSA investment options.  His approach has always been to make sure you're saving enough for your family plans and goals, but not to the point that you can't enjoy life.  If you want to travel, he will help plan for it.  Kids going to college or apprenticeship...no problem.  When you're nervous about current events in the market or the world in general and the potential impact to your finances, he'll usually be able to talk you off the ledge.  He also has a network of other professionals if needed. From taxes to wills and legal support, Bob can point you to someone that he trusts- so you'll start from a position of trust as well.

Beyond his wealth of knowledge, Chris down to earth, very approachable and accessible to bounce ideas or talk through implications to our overall financial plan at a moment's notice outside of scheduled meetings he normally coordinates. They provide us thorough analysis as well as additional technology to help us manage our day-to-day finances. His office also offers additional services beyond investing to ensure you and your family are thinking about all aspects of your financial picture from insurance to estate planning and tax review and then some. Nearly every meeting we have, we leave with something that Chris has brought to the table for us to consider. Lastly, although they have in-house services, as a small business themselves they're respectful of other small businesses you may already have a relationship with, such as a CPA, and are still willing to review those documents to ensure your maximizing all areas of your financial health. This is not to get more business for themselves, but to ensure your other vendors are doing their best for you as well. When we set out to find a financial advisor, we were looking really for an financial expert to be our partner to help us understand and navigate the very complex world of personal financing and we that's exactly what we have with Chris and Southshore Financial Planning. I cannot recommend him enough.

I am truly grateful for her dedication to teaching and mentorship. She has made a meaningful difference in my graduate experience and future direction.

review_text_raw:

advisor_name: Malissa Marshall, CFP®, MS Tax, EA
review_text_raw:
Working with Malissa has been such a relief. I came in with a lot of questions, a little anxiety, and a whole mix of “Is this normal?” thoughts about my finances. She never once made me feel silly or behind. Instead, she walked me through everything with patience, clarity, and this calm confidence that instantly lowers your blood pressure.

She took the time to really understand my goals, my lifestyle, and the big transitions I’m navigating right now. Every session left me feeling lighter and more in control — like, “Okay, I’ve got this. And I’m actually going to be okay.”

What I love most is that she explains things in a way that feels friendly and human, not intimidating. No jargon, no judgment. Just really smart, thoughtful guidance.

If you’ve never worked with a financial advisor before (or even if you have), Malissa is someone you can trust to help you get clarity, make a plan, and actually feel good about your financial future. I’m genuinely grateful for her support and would recommend her wholeheartedly.

review_text_raw: My wife and I are two financially illiterate self-employed artist's who relocated to Iceland, a country of fewer than 400,000 with just a handful of USA expats. She guided us through our purchase of a home here as well as given us advice as we started both an Icelandic and USA based business.  She provides valuable insight to keep us tax compliant in the USA all while growing our investments.  We'd be lost without her.

review_text_raw:
I learned so much from your presentation.
As a Professional Fiduciary, I needed to know the different types of investments in order to help clients.

You really are an incredible teacher. Someone that can take a very complex matter and break it down for students to understand, has innate knowledge of the subject.
Your enthusiasm for the topic creates an optimum learning environment. No question was too silly, there was no judgement, and I felt engaged the whole time.
I hope you continue mentoring and presenting. You have a gift and I am thankful you shared it with me.
I will continue to sing your praises to colleagues and clients
I have been very happy with Treveka Wealth.Tony has done a great job of managing my money, advising on tax planning and monitoring my estate. He and Elyse are great to work with.

Instead, he creates an environment where I can ask anything and really understand the why behind every recommendation. It’s so refreshing to work with someone who genuinely cares about helping you feel informed and in control of your financial future.

I truly feel like I have a trusted partner in Will who’s invested in my long-term success. I can’t recommend him enough — he’s simply the best.

We have had good and prompt responses to questions we have emailed or called about throughout the year, meeting with us personally if it was necessary. She provides a secure portal to send sensitive information to her and emails a newsletter on various related financial subjects. We had tried a few financial advisors before finding this gem through her night courses at Houston Community College. I recommend that you attend one of these classes when they are offered. At least contact her for an interview and judge for yourself.  We highly recommend her and her team!

Yohance is great in supporting my financial goals as well as helping me set myself up for future success! Very knowledgeable and kind and explains everything in really simple terms for me to understand.

The information that Kara presented was very informative and easy to understand. The associates

While they provide all the same tools as the larger firms, they also provide what we want from someone who is going to be responsible for our financial wellbeing. Josh Smith and his team have done an outstanding job of doing just that for us.

We have referred numerous family and friends to meet with Josh and the folks at Symphony to hear what they have to say.  100% of those individuals who met with, and did an assessment of Symphony and the team, all made the same decision to join and have Symphony manage/invest their financial future.

Kara’s presentation was informative and entertaining. The pink sequins were the icing on the cake. Thanks for this event.

Great and simple introduction to where AI is going and has been to understand investment potential.
Josh and his team exceed my expectations every year!

Kara brought a very relevant topic to the group in an engaging and high energy manner. Good overview of AI on how it has impacted the economy and the handful of companies that are driving the technological change.  Good use of the analogy of Barbie and AI.  Q&A session was informative and answered some of my questions as well.

Working with Igor has been such a positive experience. My husband and I came in feeling unsure and honestly a little stressed about our finances, but he immediately put us at ease.

Beyond just the numbers, Igor genuinely cares about helping us reach our goals: buying a home, saving for the future, planning investments, supporting our parents, and getting more organized - which was a huge priority for us.

Every conversation feels supportive and encouraging, never rushed or pressured. Thanks to Igor’s guidance, we feel much more confident and in control of our financial future.

I would highly recommend collaborating with Igor to anyone looking for trustworthy, knowledgeable, and approachable financial advice. He has turned something that once felt stressful into a process that is not only manageable but even exciting.

Bouchey has provided me with expert financial advice and money management taking the stress out of retiring and worrying about how to plan for the next 30 years! Paolo at Bouchey Financial Group has been an outstanding financial adviser. He has a remarkable ability to understand my goals and tailor strategies that truly work. I’ve been working with Sara and her team for three years, and the experience has been outstanding. Their unique balance of warmth and professionalism makes every interaction a pleasure. Jeff was recommended to my wife and I as someone who offered both a professionalism and depth of character that we could trust to help us navigate our financial future. Jeff's commitment to his family and his personal concern for ours is always evident in every interaction. The best sign of our confidence in Jeff might be that all five of our children are now also satisfied clients of Jeff.

As my retirement drew closer, becoming less of a concept and more of a reality, I knew it was time for some serious financial planning. For years, my brokerage firm salesperson assured my husband and I that we were on track for a fairly secure retirement - which, to be fair, was sufficient advice. Until it wasn't. Yes, we may have had enough savings tucked away (well, enough is a relative term), but the LOGISTICS of how to view our various accounts and the myriad ways of replacing my full time paycheck to meet expenses, and the tax implications,  and the concerns about RMD and the dreaded "sequence of returns" issue (what the...?), and the fact that my husband still had his business, and visualizing how it might be each month knowing I would no longer see those two deposits from my employer in my bank account was keeping me up at night. The brokerage advisor offered a complementary "financial plan," which consisted of a holistic look at my accounts and the Monte Carlo scenarios (it's just a roll of the dice? egads) that foretold whether my money would last in relation to my expenses and my projected lifespan. Ok......now what? Once I understood I needed more help,  I started listening to retirement planning podcasts to educate myself. Turns out, having a personal financial planner for retirement is very common nowadays and not just for the wealthy.  I also learned how much I really didn't know about retirement finances and —being a right brain dominant person—how much would have to be spoon fed to me before I could understand it.  I needed some hand holding and quick!  After speaking to —no joke— maybe 15 financial planners  who specialize in retirement planning (important!) I knew I found the right person when I spoke to Joe Carbone. He checked all the boxes: He is willing to help me understand my unique financial situation. He is articulate. Smart. Systematic. Experienced. Patient. Professional. Encouraging. And, most of all: honest.
After about 3 months, a number of emails and phone calls, Joe had set up my custom digital dashboard  that provides a visual,  easy-to-understand snapshot of my retirement financial plan—based on his in-depth study and understanding of my financial situation. Among other things, I now know what I have and what I need,  today and for the next 20 or so years given— current conditions of course.

After reviewing it with me, Joe  sent me some action items which we are still working on. Since then, we've been in close contact and he has  been so responsive and generous with his time and advice that I wish I had hired him years ago. Today's financial landscape is so complicated and of course rapidly changing so it's very helpful to have a level headed professional by your side. I'm glad that professional, for me, is Joe Carbone. Hire him now - before he gets too busy!

My wife and I have several accounts with James. I could not be happier with his service. He always makes himself available for questions and let us know if new products are available. I highly recommend James and his team.

I have worked with Whitman Wealth Management  for three years, and couldn't be happier with the service and guidance I have received. I originally sought an advisor to help with retirement planning, but Beverly’s expertise has been invaluable across all aspects of our financial life.

We highly recommend Whitman Wealth Management to anyone looking for a knowledgeable, trustworthy, and supportive financial advisor. They are a true partner in our financial journey.

Informative and fun.  Samantha and Scott are a cut above. Knowledge packaged inside knowledge. I didn’t think I could learn more but I did. In a fun way somehow they did it. Finance and taxes made exciting , imagine that.

review_text_raw: Sean is always available and quick to respond to all my questions and concerns.   He has many years of experience and is always on top of the current market.

Since Alex passed away in 2012, Jeff has guided me in selling our business, he properly positions our assets in investments to secure our future and he has effectively planned for the children’s college tuition, weddings and their first homes. I am now remarried, and Tim has observed the ongoing trust, confidence and integrity Jeff has with me and my family and the overall positive outcome of my financial portfolio.  Tim works with Jeff now as well, and Jeff has set us up for a successful retirement to be able to travel and spend time with our precious family.  Jeff is working with each of our adult children to set up the fourth generation of successful wealth management.

Thank you, Jeff, for your support and financial counsel throughout all the events and stages of our lives.

Erik is extremely thorough, organized and very professional. I have the utmost respect for and trust I'm him in dealing with my finances. He is very knowledgeable and able to break issues/topics down for me to easily understand the process. I would highly recommend him.

review_text_raw: My daughter was only a few months old when I first met Assaf.  I am fortunate to be one of his first clients when he started his career.  He has guided me with important financial decisions and I am confident that I will be able to retire comfortably.  Assaf cares about his clients and I trust his advice.  He is also personable and easy to talk with.

I joined Bob Porters service just after I retired. I wanted diversification of management strategy as well as diversification of company for security purposes. I love this service because quantitative methods are dispassionate and objective. This office has exceeded all of my expectations. I do business with people and not necessarily companies and logos. Bob is a great advisor. He listened carefully to my financial wants and needs and then placed me into a great quantitative plan appropriate for my situation. Finally, he follows up continually. I am not one to write reviews. I normally keep my opinions to myself and have only written a handful of them in my life. Bob Porter is an honest and trustworthy man who is deserving of your consideration. His service has made a nice difference in my overall financial performance. Thanks Bob!
Matt was very helpful.  He was able to give us clarity in our financial planning and action steps for the future.  I highly recommend his office!

I recently had met with Chris and couldn’t be more satisfied with the experience. He’s extremely professional, knowledgeable, and really took the time to understand my goals. He took the time to explain concepts I wasn’t familiar with in a clear and understanding way. I left the meeting feeling more informed, confident, and with a clear roadmap of my future goals.
If you're looking for a trustworthy and insightful financial consultant who will prioritize your long-term success, I highly recommend Chris!!

I recently had met with Chris and couldn’t be more satisfied with the experience. He’s extremely professional, knowledgeable, and really took the time to understand my goals. He took the time to explain concepts I wasn’t familiar with in a clear and understanding way. I left the meeting feeling more informed, confident, and with a clear roadmap of my future goals.
If you're looking for a trustworthy and insightful financial consultant who will prioritize your long-term success, I highly recommend Chris!!

Sierra Pacific Private Wealth helped us navigate the complexities of diversifying our stock holdings after an IPO while managing taxes, estate planning, real estate, and more. As busy professionals, we appreciated their quick responses, clear guidance, and expertise in helping us make informed decisions. They've helped us save money and avoid costly mistakes. Highly recommend!

Managing a large portfolio of assets used to take too much of my time, but SPPW has been a game-changer. They are incredibly responsive and take the time to ensure you understand everything you need to know. If you're looking for a smaller financial advisory firm with a personal touch, SPPW is an excellent choice. They combine the high-end tools of Charles Schwab with unmatched availability through calls and email.

Before working with SPPW, I struggled to find time to build an investment portfolio that aligned with my financial needs. SPPW's financial planning and investment advisory services have completely solved this for me. What I love most is the personal touch they provide, unlike the impersonal services of large companies. Their team is responsive, friendly, and conducts regular portfolio reviews, which are incredibly helpful. I highly recommend them for their personalized and professional approach to wealth management.

Working with Janet and her team has been a game-changer. After struggling with a large brokerage account that lacked personal guidance, I turned to them for the focused attention I needed. Janet's expertise, especially during tough times like the 2008 crash, gave me confidence as she carefully managed my assets. I trust Janet and her team to prioritize my best interests and always be there when I need guidance. If you want a personalized, hands-on approach to managing your finances, they’re the way to go.
I recently lost my job.   Jeff gave me some solid advice/guidance on if I could retire now and what kind of budget I would be able to have if I did decide to do so.

As a retired executive who successfully built numerous computer and technology based companies, accountability and results were paramount in our success. I have know Bob for almost 15 years. He has always exhibited those qualities that I demand from financial professionals. He is always learning, asking questions, and is striving to do the best for is clients. I consider him a good friend.

Bob has delivered nice results since he began managing  my accounts.  He is quick to respond to queries. I have worked with several financial advisors in the past, so this isn't new to me.  It has been a pleasure to work with Bob.  My university major was mathematics and computer science, so I understand the principles of Bob's investment strategies. He has exceeded my expectations.

We've just completed the approval of Chris' plan for us and the signing of the agreements.  The impressive, 8-week onboarding process resulted in a plan that showed how very well Chris gathered information and listened to our needs.  We're excited to watch the unfolding of the plan and are happy to highly recommend Chris Shoup and Southshore Financial Planning.

Jeff has been my money guy for several years now. Back when I was working and now that I have been retired for some years Jeff has always been there and easy to reach. If I have a question I just give him a call or email. He is super easy to talk to and knows way more than I need to about money. He never makes me feel dumb or talks down to me. I trust Jeff completely I have recommended him to both friends and family.

Joyce joined my advisement team at Seasons of Advice Wealth Management a few years ago and has been instrumental  in providing expertise and helping to facilitate and implement the plan. She is knowledgeable and a pleasure to work with and has a real knack for explaining financial issues that are beyond my limited knowledge.  Joyce has been a reliable and trustworthy part of my team at SOAWM and I highly recommend her and SOWM to anyone searching for  financial advice.

I've been a client of Charlie for close to a decade and I wholeheartedly recommend him as a financial advisor and manager. For me, the trust I have in Charlie as an advisor is paramount, and he has consistently earned that trust throughout our collaboration.  His proactive process for managing my financial life, not just my investments, has been very helpful  in making critical decisions  regarding retirement, estate planning ,etc. His guidance regarding my investments has consistently had very positive results. Additionally he manages a very professional organization. Working with the professionals and staff  at SOAW has always been a pleasure due to their  expertise and commitment to  customer service. I believe Charlie would be an excellent advisor to anyone, no matter the size of their portfolio, and I enthusiastically recommend him.

I needed help with tax planning on retirement and Josh has been able to provide that advice! Josh is very easy to visit with and able to understand my needs. I would highly recommend Josh if you need tax planning advice.

I have known Ramiro for almost 40 years and he has helped guide me in my retirement financial decisions like they were his own.  He spent a huge amount of his time with me initially and helped me understand exactly what choices I had.  We worked together to choose the right fit for me and my retirement planning.   We now meet together regularly to review performance and make changes as needed.   I trust Ramiro and his integrity implicitly and look forward to many more years of his help, friendship and guidance.

I reached out to Sara during a career transition, looking for a clear, unbiased view of my financial situation and mid- to long-term outlook. CW’s assessment was thoughtful and thorough, and I’ve continued working with them ever since. Sara and her team are responsive, honest, and genuinely caring. They’re always happy to answer my questions and take the time to walk me through their reasoning. I’m very glad I found CW—and only wish I’d found them sooner.

With the very first telephone conversation with Erik, I had the feeling we'd finally found our financial advisor and after the first meeting, I knew we had. I love that he has the background with some of the big financial companies and that he had rejected them to work on his own terms, advising individuals with their best interests at heart to achieve their financial goals. His"getting to know you process" is very thorough and patient. He never is condescending and treats every question earnestly. There are no stupid questions. He also has a great sense of humor and believes in giving back to his community. My husband and I immediately felt comfortable with him and are confident we can now relax about our finances, knowing we are in good hands for our retirement years.

Josh took the time to listen to us, and get to know our goals, he has been helping us achieve those goals and even exceed them!  we would 100% recommend working with Josh to put your financial plan for retirement in place!

I have been working with an advisor at JF Williams for about 8 years. When I came to the firm, I was recently widowed and did not have much knowledge about financial planning.  They provided strong support for me at a difficult personal time.  Much has changed for me since I started to work with them and they have accommodated my changes.
Everyone at JF Williams is well educated in his or her role.  This includes support staff as well as financial planners.  I have great respect for my planner.  He brings substantial education and experience to helping me determine and meet my goals.  He listens carefully to me as my life and future change. He also is knowledgeable in all areas of the financial world and is certain to use that knowledge for my benefit.   Plans, needs and goals have changed and I feel supported as we work out the financial issues together.
My financial planner has my total confidence in his technical knowledge and listening skills.  I intend to continue this relationship.
Ive been with Ramiro for about 20 years, and he has tailored his recommendations to my needs, never the "hot, buy now" push. You don't stay that long unless you like and trust someone.

Working with Charlie Hamowy for over a decade has been one of the best decisions I’ve made in my life. Thanks to his guidance, expertise, and unwavering support, I was able to achieve something many dream of but few accomplish—early retirement. I am now living my best life, and I truly owe so much of that to Charlie.

From the beginning, Charlie took the time to understand where I was in life and crafted an investment and savings strategy that was both realistic and forward-thinking. He not only helped build a solid financial plan, but also challenged me to think about aspects of my future I hadn’t even considered. His insight opened my eyes to possibilities and priorities I might have overlooked on my own. He has a remarkable ability to explain the complexities of the market in a way that’s easy to grasp, always keeping me informed and confident in the decisions we made together.

Charlie’s advice has been invaluable, not just in terms of financial returns, but in giving me the peace of mind that my future was in capable hands. His professionalism is matched only by his sincerity and the genuine care he shows for his clients. Over the years, he has become more than just a trusted advisor—he’s become a friend.

If you are looking for someone who is smart, strategic, and truly invested in your success, I cannot recommend Charlie Hamowy highly enough. He is the only person that I recommend when my friends are seeking financial advice. He helped make my dream of early retirement a reality, and for that, I am forever grateful.

Money is an emotional issue, whether you're  rich or poor or someplace in between.  I am well into my second decade of working with Mark, and continue learning from him about the market and managing my own financial life.  His advice over the years has been not solely about the portfolio, but also about such diverse and specific issues as insurance, real estate, and any life choices that involve money.   He is always on target and non-judgmental.  The quarterly meetings are easy, fun, and informative.

It can be a bit unnerving to choose a financial advisor when you have been making all investment decisions on your own.  I have done well enough with those decisions, but I had no strategic plan. I was not sufficiently diversified, had way too much money in CDs (which were barely keeping up with inflation), and didn't know enough about annuities and my life insurance policy to make intelligent decisions.

My initial meeting with Alexis went very well, with the exchange of a lot of information, history, goals and comfort levels.  He explained his services and we agreed to move forward with a preliminary plan, with each of us having assigned tasks (homework) to fill in the gaps of missing information.  Eventually, all the questions were answered and all the required information was obtained, and Alexis went to work creating a very detailed and complete financial plan to match my specific needs, with diversified investments and an appropriate level of risk management. He took into account my own preferences as well as making a number of solid recommendations himself.

I am extremely pleased with the results of changes I have made in adhering to the devised plan, and am pleased that my financial future is now on more solid footing, ensuring a bright outlook for my retirement and sizable inheritance for my estate.

I highly recommend Alexis Hongamen and Total Financial Planning to anyone seeking financial planning. You will find Alexis is dedicated to exceptionalism and client satisfaction.

My family has been working with Erik for more than a dozen years now. When we needed to move my Dad's trust, my Mom and I interviewed 3 large financial firms, including the firm where Erik worked.  Erik was the deciding factor in going with the firm he represented.  He was clear and patient with my mother who was 80 at the time.  He also worked directly with the firm's Trust department for my Mom, even though this was a separate division.  He worked proactively to ensure her investments aligned with her wishes.  This was critical because the trust department would regularly default to their base parameters which were not inline with what my mom wanted and sub-optimal for returns.

My wife and I ultimately moved our investment portfolio over to work with Erik a couple of years later.  Erik has also been extremely proactive and creative in terms of helping us think about investments and taxes.  When we came into a large payday after selling the company, Erik again came up with a creative way to make some good investments and pay the tax bill at the same time without taking everything out of our investment portfolio.  This turned out to be a home run.  My wife and I have worked with 5 other financial "advisors" over  almost 40 years - none of whom created the value Erik has.

Erik is not only proactive, but looks at more than the latest financial reports.  He considers your entire financial situation.  expenses, future expenses (both long term and short term) and tax considerations.  If there is a change in tax policy, something to do with our investments or monetary policy Erik calls before we hear about it.  With all other investment "professionals" I always had to call them to understand what was going on or to tell them to make changes after I had done the research or discovered a change or issue.

Finally, Erik is transparent with his fees, expenses and rational for the approach to your money matters.  With regard to fees and epenses, it has been my experience in speaking with many friends over the years, that most people who work with an individual or a firm do not know how much they are paying for advisory services.  If you are working with someone who invites you to steak dinners, gives away turkeys or pumpkin pie at the holidays, hands our concert or event tickets or invites you to golf tournaments, you are likely paying considerably more than you should.

If you are looking for guidance with your financial matters or looking for help for a loved one, there is no one else I would recommend.

In any industry, you want to align with and work with the best. In my family's case, especially considering we have a special needs individual in the family, we not only wanted to but needed to work with the best financial advisor we could. Ramiro has provided sound financial guidance in a chaotic market and we are very pleased with his services. I/We highly recommend Ramiro Marmolejo as he is one of the best CFP's out there!

As clients for 25 plus years the team at Bouchey Financial Group has helped us navigate creating a financial plan catered to our needs making sure that we are on track for our retirement goals. Through all the ups and downs of the market, and life, they have  made sure we felt financially comfortable/secure along the way.  We could not be happier with the entire staff who has never failed to have our best interest in mind.  Samantha and Scott are fabulous to work with, always available and ready for any concerns we have.  We happily have our grown children working with them as well to help secure their futures.  Highly recommend  working with any of the team!

advisor_name: Sean Gerlin, CFP®, CPWA®, ChFC®, CLU®
review_text_raw: I highly recommend Sean Gerlin as a financial advisor. Sean takes a holistic approach, creating customized strategies tailored to the unique goals of high-income and high-net-worth individuals and families. His expertise and dedication to his clients' financial well-being make him a trusted partner in achieving long-term financial security.

Working with Cadence has been a great experience—Sean and the team are caring, responsive, and give practical advice without being pushy. Leslie’s follow-up and the clear, graphic financial illustrations have been especially helpful. The new platform is much clearer and more user-friendly than what we used before. I appreciate the transparency, the improvements suggested for our plan, and the focus on the right financial tools. The content on business exits and succession planning is spot-on, especially for blue collar business owners.

The members of Mt.Olive AME Church truly enjoyed the presentation given by Mr. Scipio. It was very intuitive and informative and we enjoyed his expertise in sharing his knowledge on financial preparedness.

We are planning to bring him back again for another session.

Flavio Medeiros has been excellent to work with throughout my rollover to reinvesting my money.  I feel he is not only honest but a hard worker.  I feel fortunate to have met him since I was new to the area and he has been very helpful!  The best part is that he is making me money!

Erik has helped my wife and I develop a retirement plan that is based in reality and considers our (low) risk tolerance.  Erik is also there to work with us on questions and changes that occur as we navigate our retirement finances.   We are very pleased with the support that we receive.

Ramiro has been amazing advisor for more than 15 yrs. His greater characteristic is his transparency and ethical standards always looking to protect the financial assetts of his clients. He is trustworthy and I would definately recommend him to my friends and family.

Working with Igor has been truly transformative for us. He took the time to really understand who we are and what we want, and helped us totally reframe the way we think about financial planning. Thanks to his understanding approach that builds our confidence instead of our insecurities, what once felt intimidating and stressful now feels approachable and even empowering. That foundation of trust and genuine care has made all the difference. From there, he’s helped us stay accountable by checking in, following up, and connecting us with helpful tools and people, so we keep moving forward. I’m incredibly grateful for Igor’s guidance and proud of the progress we’ve made with his support.

I contacted Erik approximately three months prior to retiring from New York State service. I was looking for information and a commonsense, tax efficient plan to withdraw and/or invest the funds from my Deferred Compensation Plan (457-B), other investments, pension and future social security benefits.
Erik was very knowledgeable, super easy to work with, and responsive to any questions or concerns. I was not looking for a financial advisor for fund management, but the most tax efficient strategy going forward and a flat fee for that information. Erik checked all the boxes, and I would highly recommend him.

advisor_name: Sean Gerlin, CFP®, CPWA®, ChFC®, CLU®
review_text_raw:
I located Sean through a website from a book I read that recommended trusted and honest financial advisors. Sean is a CFP which means he will act in the best interest of his clients. I have been with Sean for approximately 5 years and he has helped my financial progress grow tenfold. Sean is very considerate and very responsive with questions you have.

I am currently 33 years old and with the help of Sean my families retirement is projected to be significantly higher than my peers around me. Sean helps with anything financial and gives unbiased advice to do what is best for you.

Nick is a great fee-only, fiduciary advisor. He’s independent and doesn’t take any commissions like the larger firms do. He gives great comprehensive financial planning advice and I would definitely reach out if you’re looking for someone in the Cary/Raleigh area!

We have greatly enjoyed working with Igor Aronov.  He's professional, knowledgeable, very thorough and attentive - and he knows how to listen to what is important to his clients.  We have known him for years and know his high ethical standards, and how high he sets the bar when he does anything; so when he became a financial advisor, we were only too happy to sign up to be one of his first clients!

My husband and I have been working with the Whitman Wealth Management team since 2014. We feel very fortunate to have been involved while they have grown and expanded their support services in personalized consultation concerning tax management, financial planning, and growing stage-of-life concerns. We are happy to be a part of the Whitman Wealth Management family!

Mr. Marmolejo is a cut above the rest.  He is professional, knowledgeable and genuinely client-focused. He took the time to understand my goals and created a clear, personalized plan. He explains complex accounting and planning in simple, proactive terms. He is always responsive and thoughtful and makes me feel confident about my financial future. Highly recommended!!!

Ramiro has been our financial advisor for over 20 years. During this time, he has helped my husband and I plan and manage our finances to include building a portfolio that would carry us into a very comfortable retirement. We always trusted his advise as he is ver knowledgeable in his field. He is always very available to answer our questions and guides us so that we feel secure in our finances in our retirement.

Mark has been my financial advisor for over 20 years.  During that time my portfolio has continued to grow impressively.  He listens and is responsive to my inquiries.  He has always focused on achieving financial goals to fit my life style.  He is completely apolitical in his selection of the financial instruments to meet my needs. Before he makes changes to my portfolio he takes the time to explain the financial instrument and the reasoning behind its selection.  Most importantly he always asks for my permission to make the changes.  He maintains a good rapport with my accountant by sending, with my permission, information that helps in the preparation of my federal and state tax filings.

I have trusted my finances with J.F. Williams Co., Inc. and team for over 20 years. After several years of significant economic challenges in the early 2000’s, I brought what was left of my meager investments to Jim Williams. Jim started me on my financial recovery journey through planning, setting goals and monitoring progress. Since then, I have had the pleasure of working with the whole J.F. Williams team. The journey has not always been easy. But, I always felt like the people I worked with were not only my advisors, but a partner working toward my best interest. No matter how challenging the situation, they always kept me focused on my financial future. Because of their guidance and dedication to building a healthy financial portfolio with me, my husband and I were able to reach our goal of retiring early.

I have had the pleasure of Mr. Marmolejo's advice over the years and have found it to be quite beneficial.   He clearly has a passion for what he does and knows how to conceptualize things in an easy to digest fashion.  I am certain that you will find his advice to be profitable as well.

Having Ramiro as our financial advisor has given us a sense of security by keeping us very well informed  & educated about all of our investments. He is not only professional, but also shows that he truly cares about our financial well being. He is always available to answer our questions & concerns at any time, and he does it with a smile.

Bouchey financial group is everything we could have hoped for when seeking out an advisory firm and in all honesty, my husband and I underestimated how much we needed their expertise.  Every single member of the staff that we have had the pleasure of interacting with has gone above and beyond.  They all provide a level of customer service rarely seen in todays business.  We have called them on a whim and whatever we need is taken care of promptly and professionally.  They are also so in tune to the what, where and how of the financial world..we have been able to let go of trying to figure out how we ourselves should invest our money.  With an understanding of our goals, they invest for us wisely and it has been such a relief for us to leave that part of our lives to the professionals at Bouchey.  They are also always willing to share their expertise (when appropriate) with financial decisions outside the realm of investing.  We have put our faith and trust in the professionals at Bouchey financial both for the here and now and for the future as we plan for our daughter.  Thank you Ryan, Angela, Shelley, Samantha, David and the rest of the professionals at Bouchey..an amazing company that my family will continue to do business with far into the future.

After more than a decade with a large national firm, I switched to Ryan and can confidently say he is in a different league. He’s a CFP® with several other respected designations, but what truly sets him apart is how he applies that knowledge through strategy. Most advisors make promises...Ryan delivers with a comprehensive approach.

In our very first meetings, he uncovered a significant tax savings opportunity in my portfolio, saving me thousands of dollars.

After 17 years in law enforcement, my career transition to a large tech company was seamless thanks to Ryan’s rare blend of public service and corporate experience. Today, he continues to manage my growing wealth, including the complexities of RSUs.

If you want an advisor who is both highly credentialed and genuinely invested in your success, Ryan is the professional to have on your team.

Great experience with Eagle Ridge in all aspects of financial planning for retirement, including moving from full time employment to a consulting business.  Highly responsive, knowledgeable and great communication.  Highly recommend if you are looking for a high level of great personal service.

We recently started working with Coast Wealth Management Group in Myrtle Beach, and specifically with Flavio Medeiros, and we couldn’t be happier with the experience. Flavio has done a wonderful job taking over as our financial advisor. He takes the time to clearly explain the decisions we need to make regarding our 401(k)s and IRAs, making sure we fully understand our options without ever feeling pressured.

What we appreciate most is his approachable style—everything is explained properly and in a way that makes sense. Flavio also keeps in regular contact, listens to the types of investments we’re interested in, and makes sure our financial goals remain the priority.

We highly recommend Flavio Medeiros and Coast Wealth Management Group to anyone looking for a knowledgeable, trustworthy, and client-focused advisor.

As a tech professional with a growing income, I found myself at a turning point. I had multiple income streams, a couple of properties, and a mix of investments, but keeping track of everything—from cash flow to tax implications across multiple K-1s and business interests—was becoming overwhelming.

Like many of my peers, I considered myself financially savvy. I had tried robo-advisors, self-service tools, and traditional wealth managers, but none provided the holistic, proactive approach I needed. Self-service tools required endless research and still left gaps, while traditional advisors followed the same outdated playbook: collect fees, allocate to a basic portfolio, and check in once a year.

What initially drew me to Range was their tax optimization strategy, but what I found was something far more valuable. From day one, my advisor took the time to truly understand my financial goals, lifestyle, and long-term vision before recommending anything. Instead of a cookie-cutter financial plan, I got a personalized strategy tailored to my situation.

The Value & ROI
💰 Worth every penny. The tax strategy alone covered the cost of membership, but the peace of mind, clarity, and confidence in my financial future have been truly invaluable.

Looking back, I realize I wasn’t just looking for financial advice—I needed a true partner who could help simplify and optimize my increasingly complex financial life. Range has become that partner, giving me both the tools and expertise to feel completely in control of my financial future.

Highly recommend Range for professionals, entrepreneurs, and anyone with complex finances who wants more than just a generic investment portfolio.

We've been clients for just over a year and it's been transformational for us. Liz and Caroline have given us a framework to wrap our heads around our finances and set goals, and clear direction to start meeting them. They are great communicators, dispensing thoughtful advice calmly and with empathy. They're also absolutely trustworthy and a pleasure to work with. Can't recommend Sara and her team at Cultivating Wealth highly enough.

I have been working with Sara and her team since 2018, but I met her during my divorce some years prior to that. At a difficult time in my life, in mediation meetings, I found her to be smart, and a calm voice with good judgment. So I reached out to her later to advise me. She has given me good counsel, with thoughtfulness and consideration and no judgment about the many things that I did not understand.
She has a great team, each of them have a particular area of expertise, so they can explain and provide structure to a process that I found intimidating and quite overwhelming. Very happy to have crossed paths with her 10 years ago!

Chris and I  have worked together for the past 20 plus years.  I have had many opportunities to join other advisors and after reviewing benefits of continuing outweighs changing advisors
Chris understands my financial needs and has delivered good advice in these uncertain times
He also worked with us on our estate and insurance plans
The team working with Chris is attentive and responsive and trustworthy
I wholeheartedly recommend SOA Chris Conigliaro to anyone looking for a trustworthy and skilled financial advisor.

Working with Preston Foreman for over 20 years has been one of the best financial decisions we’ve made. My husband and initially were overwhelmed but Preston took the time to understand our goals and created a clear, personalized strategy. Preston consistently communicates and explains complex market shifts in simple terms. Preston truly earned my trust.

Preston has been our financial advisor for over ten years now, so we've experienced boom times, recessions, career changes, city changes, a major renovation, three property purchases, and a pandemic together! During that time, our investments have steadily grown in Preston's care. More specifically, he has always carefully taken into account our career and retirement plans and appetite for risk when advising us. He's also reliable, responsive and just a great guy. We highly recommend.

Very pleased with the financial and investment advice I have received from George at the onset of my career, and from Steve as I near retirement. They have always taken the time to explain things to me thoroughly and make me aware of my options.  The story of the name is such a beautiful way to honor a loved one(s).
I have had a great experience with Oath. The staff is very knowledgeable and always accommodating to my needs.
Brindle & Bay continues to be a class act. We really feel like part of the family.

I've been working with Mark for over 25 years and from the beginning he helped me establish financial life goals.  Goals that we achieved and exceeded thanks to his thoughtful management of my assets. And it wasn't just the investment portfolio, he has assisted with so many other aspects of life including life, health and property insurance, purchase and renovation of homes, and thoughtful analysis of spending patterns. He will truly assist you in a manner that will not only help you achieve your goals, but put your mind at ease.

Twenty five years ago I started asking Jim Williams questions about risk management, asset allocation, diversification, etc.  Jim provided understandable and common sense answers, and Matt Elliott and Adam Van Wert have continued to do so after Jim retired.  But what they've really provided for the last 25 years is financial peace of mind, giving me the freedom to pursue my favorite hobby:  spoiling my grandchildren. Who could ask for anything more?

When my financial advisor retired, he recommended Jim Williams as a good fit for my needs, values and resources.  Twenty-one years later, after much company growth and a change in leadership, I am still a happy, satisfied client.   Integrity has been key to our relationship, fostered by open communication and transparency of fees.  Through all the ups and downs of the market, they have insisted on sticking to the plan they developed to fit my needs providing me security during my retirement years and making sure my accounts will pass securely to my heirs.   All of the staff are well-trained, personable professionals with whom I enjoy working.

I just recently retired and needed a lot of questions answered pertaining to my retirement accounts.
James took the time I needed to thoroughly understand the ins and outs of retirement.
I would highly recommend contacting James Regan to anyone needing financial planning advice.

We have worked with Sara and her team for several years and have had a fantastic experience. Sara’s team has helped us navigate both good times and a significant family emergency, and I always found the advice thoughtful and measured. I strongly recommend the Cultivating Wealth team as trusted advisors.

Our experience with Cultivating Wealth took us to a new level of managing our finances. Each time we meet we move to a new level insight.  The team of advisors takes time to know us personally and respond as our big picture evolves.  We are grateful for their help.

I wanted to offer a big thank you to Liz from Cultivating Wealth.  I have been working with Liz for the past three years.  From day one, I have found her and Rebecca to be extremely helpful and constructive in their guidance.  Liz has the ability to explain complicated ideas and to break down financial concepts in such a way that I can both understand what is being suggested and also follow through on those suggestions.  Whenever something financial comes up, I immediately send Liz an email and always receive a timely response.  Simultaneously, I am offered a meeting if necessary.  Ultimately my trust in the Cultivating Wealth crew enables me to breathe easy and proceed with my financial goals and plans.

My fiancé and I have had a great experience working with Daniel. He’s highly knowledgeable and takes the time to explain everything in a way that’s easy to understand. He’s thorough, flexible and very easy to work with. We feel confident in his guidance and would absolutely recommend him to help you reach your goals.

Myself only working in creative jobs all my life.

Choosing Charlie as our advisor stands out as one of the wisest and most impactful decisions we’ve made for our financial well-being. For over 30 years, Charlie has provided guidance that goes far beyond just numbers. His approach embodies the philosophy behind his firm, Seasons of Advice—that financial planning is a lifelong journey, with evolving needs and goals at each stage of life.

Charlie takes the time to understand our personal goals, not just our portfolios. Whether managing risk, developing a tax-efficient strategy, or navigating retirement, Charlie is always thinking proactively, helping us adapt to life’s seasons with a sense of purpose and balance.

In 2006, I started thinking about leaving my job and my career to do something that would be interesting and socially worthwhile, but wouldn't pay me a dime. I had no idea whether I could afford to do this. A friend suggested I talk to Charlie, whose guidance over many years had been not only been financially sound, but sensitive to her goals and values. And so my first meeting with Charlie was a conversation about my future. His reaction to my plan was not a simple yes or no, although he gave me that, but a tutorial in how to think about financial planning as support for a person's goals and values. It should surprise no one that by the end of our meeting, I wanted to continue this conversation with Charlie as my guide. For 20 years, I grew wealth through rental properties—my comfort zone. But outside real estate, I felt lost. The equity in my house was substantial, but I didn't know how to effectively leverage it. My CPA filed taxes with standard recommendations, not personalized solutions. When I asked about retirement planning, they'd direct me to financial advisors.

These advisors pushed products: "Buy my mutual fund, you'll be rich." But they weren't seeing my complete financial picture—just focused on selling investments while ignoring my real estate portfolio.  Having a young child made everything more urgent. My grandfather passed away at 68, my father at the same age. At 50, that timeline felt uncomfortably close. I needed to establish proper financial safeguards.  I researched other financial services, but during onboarding they were pushy and fixated on stock investments. Their services lacked the comprehensive approach I needed. Range's transparent, flat-fee model immediately appealed to me. It was refreshing that they didn't require me to move my assets to work with them. The pricing seemed reasonable for year-round advisor access—much more affordable than paying annual AUM fees.  The experience has been transformative. Now I have someone to ask questions to. When my wife and I discuss matters like HSA limits or tax strategies, instead of saying "I don't know, let's Google it," I can consult Range and receive thoughtful, personalized answers within 24 hours.

What's most valuable is having experts I can trust who are on my side. When I learned about qualifying as a real estate investor for tax purposes from YouTube, I couldn't validate it. With Range, my advisor helped me understand all qualifications and evidence required, warning me about IRS scrutiny and guiding me through proper documentation. This guidance enabled me to execute Roth IRA conversions I wouldn't have attempted alone—it would have been too risky without expert consultation. Range has also assisted with estate planning, protecting our investments for our son's future.  With Google, you get information that might be from Reddit or AI-generated content requiring validation. With Range, you have experts you can trust to provide the best answers.  Range gives me access to a team of advisors for any tax or investment questions. I finally feel like I'm optimizing my finances instead of leaving opportunities untapped.
