advisor_name: Denise Sarkor, MIA, CEPA®, CAP®, IPA
review_text_raw:
I didn’t come to Sarkor Financial Advisors looking to be rescued. I came with a clear sense that financial freedom was mine to live into; I just needed a partner who could hold the weight of that vision with me.

And that’s exactly what I found.

What Denise offered wasn’t just financial advising. It was strategic companionship. She didn’t flatten my life into budgets or spreadsheets, she saw the layers: I’m a builder, a leader, and an artist of possibility. I’m someone who thinks about legacy and land, joy and justice, community care and capital.

From our first conversation, Denise didn’t rush to fix, she slowed down to understand. She asked questions no financial advisor had ever asked me before. Not just “What do you earn?” but “What do you want to sustain?” Not just “How do we grow your assets?” but “How do we root your wealth in rest, reciprocity, and vision?”

Together, we crafted a plan that felt like a map, one that honored what I’ve survived, reflected what I’m stewarding, and stretched toward what I’m creating. Denise helped me build with integrity: protecting what matters, structuring for scale, and anchoring my work in rhythms I could actually live with.

And here’s the truth: working with Denise didn’t change who I am. It affirmed what I already knew, that I’m worthy of wealth that feels like alignment, not just accumulation. That care and clarity can coexist. That leadership can be financially literate and spiritually grounded. And that money, when held with intention, can be a tool for liberation, not just for me, but for the people I pour into.

Denise didn’t just help me “get it together.” She helped me build a future that’s mine on purpose.

If you’re carrying a vision that’s bigger than a financial formula, if you want to design a life that feels free, resourced, and true, I can’t recommend Sarkor Financial Advisors enough. They didn’t just meet me where I was. They met me where I’m going.
Always promt and courteous. Service. I’m very satisfied with this firm.

My family and I have had a very positive experience with Daniel this year. He has a warm, positive energy and is more than happy to explain complicated concepts in layman's terms. Daniel's friendly and intellectual vibe is great for anyone seeking to look for financial advice, estate planning, wealth management or long-term/short-term retirement goals. Daniel has been essential in helping us navigate the difficult turns and waves of my mother's estate -- thank goodness we found him! We highly recommend!
Very experienced and knowledgeable. Really appreciated his help in planning our portfolio. Would highly recommend his services!
My husband and I started our trust with OATH. Years later, as a widow, I have found them to be helpful and able to quickly getting money released when I need it.

We've worked with Charlie for almost 20 years. In that time, he has done an outstanding job of helping us establish a financial plan to achieve our personal goals, especially as they evolved over our lifetime. Charlie understands how to advise as life cycles change - from marriage and combining assets, to buying a home, ever changing work situations, and getting to retirement, he is always there to help us move forward. He works with us to create our portfolio to match where we are and it has consistently yielded positive results. We have recommended Charlie to many of our friends and family. Charlie has not only been our finical adviser (and rock and sanity) throughout the years but he has become a good friend.

I have been wuth SOA since its inception and have know Chris many years prior to that. Guess you can say we have matured together. Chris and his team are responsive, caring, and always willing to listen to my point of view. There is never any pressure to go a certain way . I have always felt secure as their recommendations are followed up with research and I am always provided with information.

Brett has been working with us for a few years now. He always offers sound advice, but never pushy. He checks in to understand our current life situation, future goals, and anything that has changed that may impact our current financial strategy. On top of all of that, he is a pleasure to work with. I would highly recommend Brett and his team to help strategize on your financial plan.

I highly recommend Traveka. My trusted advisors, Tony and Sean, have been invaluable in the lead-up to my retirement, which is now on the horizon. Their thoughtful guidance has helped me navigate both the financial and emotional aspects of this transition with clarity and confidence.

Genuine and personable, they consistently show up prepared, responsive and ready to help—making a complex process feel far more manageable. I deeply value their expertise, not only in managing my financial accounts, but also in the broader aspects of planning. They’re quick to respond between calls, and their support extends to reviewing my tax return and trust/will, offering insightful suggestions, and helping me evaluate employer benefit options. Their comprehensive approach has made a real difference.

I’m looking forward to a continued and long-term partnership.

Zach is a rockstar! Extremely knowledgeable and service oriented. He takes the time to understand your situation and helps create a plan tailored to your needs! What makes him stand out is his authenticity, Zach practices what he preaches! He has proven time and time again his exceptional knowledge in his field. 10/10 Recommend working with Zach and his team. They will take care of you. As a Veteran owned business they have a high standard of service to their clients.

Zach helped me navigate a major life decision that had been weighing on me for years. His perspective brought clarity, confidence, and peace of mind — something I couldn’t find elsewhere. Working with him changed the trajectory of my life, and I still lean on his guidance today.

We just started working with Flavio and feel so much more comfortable than with our previous advisor (different company).  He is easy to understand and offers options that make sense to us.  We are ready to enjoy our retirement!

Flavio Medeiros was recommended to us, and we were impressed with him from our first meeting. Flavio listened to our goals and concerns and provided guidance that allowed us to make the best decisions for us. We have confidence that we are in the right investing hands with Flavio’s expertise.

I was referred to Abundo for help managing my father’s estate after his passing in April. In our initial meeting, DJ spent over an hour with me and my sister, helping us understand the forms we had to fill out, make good choices, and get things in line quickly. It was an emotional and overwhelming time and DJ made it as easy and painless as possible. I’ve now signed on for additional coaching with him. I’m excited to see how my inheritance and savings can grow and improve over time with his help. So far, his patience and support has made me feel more comfortable making decisions and taking action.

Working with Josh was an incredibly helpful and productive experience. Josh didn’t just tell me what to do, but walked me through the “why” - sharing the history and research behind each financial decisions so I could move forward confidently. He really listened to my situation as an expat planning a move to a expensive U.S. city, and his fee-only model kept the focus on my goals. Couldn't recommend more highly.

Zach provides a comprehensive approach to looking at your financial portfolio. He guides you to look at your short and long term goals so that you can live and enjoy life while strengthening your financial position. Additionally, Zach personally has a passion for health and sharing his pearls of wisdom to improve your health! Using Outlive for your financial journey is a dual advantage! I highly recommend!!!
Exceptional, financial advice, and future planning
Flavio does a wonderful job. He is there for you and explains everything.

We consider Brett one of our most trusted advisors. He has helped us navigate through various life stages and supported our family through several major decisions. Brett is not only an expert but a man of strong character. I would highly recommend him to anyone seeking a financial planner. Thank you, Brett!

Traveka Wealth offers the ideal combination of expertise, understanding my needs, providing easy access to information and reports and a high level of customer service. I have been a client for many years and appreciate that I can rely on them as my circumstances change and the world get more complicated.
Glad we picked Justin for our retirement guidance. Easy to talk to and very knowledgeable.

Over 35 years ago we literally stumbled opon Mr. Hamowy, who at the time was just starting out. Here is the long and short of it. Because of the Traveka team I sleep very well at night. Chad's willingness to go above and beyond is shown through the work and preparation he does for me.  He is easy to communicate with and gives me the information I need to know promptly.  Thanks to Chad I have no doubt my financial independence is being achieved.

We've worked with Charlie for over 20 years. During that time, he has done an outstanding job of helping us establish a financial plan to achieve our personal goals. Above all, Charlie's warm, approachable manner has made it a joy to work with him through all our seasons.

I was referred to Seasons of Advice through a friend several years ago and I've never looked back. We can't recommend Brett Fellows our Financial Advisor highly enough!
In times of uncertainty, he's a steady, calming presence--always talking my impulsive and sometimes anxious husband off the edge with clarity and reassurance. Thoughtfully guided me through all the nuances of the early years of retirement--so many details that I was unaware of. Could not have succeeded without the professional coaching of TJ. I now have confidence in my financial future. Highly recommend.

Anyone looking for a financial professional I would highly recommend you reach out to Stu! He is the most trusting and honest person I have every met.

Thanks for your help Stu!

Tom

Charlie has been my financial advisor for more than 25 years. When I started, I was a complete neophyte with no real plan. Charlie never made me feel ignorant, or intimidated. Stu Sneen, owner of TwoTen Planning, did a job that was beyond outstanding helping me with portfolio questions. For just a few billed hours, he took me behind the veil and showed me how a financial planner looks at portfolio optimization. Instead of treating me as a pesky guy with difficult questions, we had a real meeting of the minds. I value his advice enormously and will not hesitate to go back to him with further questions. If I were a different kind of investor, I also wouldn't hesitate to place assets under his management or simply trust his advice without asking so many questions.
On a more personal level, I find Stu extremely approachable, friendly, and to the extent I can judge someone I've only spent a couple of hours speaking with, I believe him to be of the highest possible integrity. Ten out of five stars!

The quick-start meeting with Justin was very helpful.  We covered both shorter-term strategies leading up to my desired retirement age and more "big picture" (will my savings be enough) projections.  He helped me analyze my current scenario as well as giving me suggestions on how to consolidate and simplify my portfolios.  I recommend Approach Financial.

Brennan is great to work with, an excellent communicator, and outstanding financial planner. I strongly recommend Brennan to help with your wealth management needs.

I was pleased to be able to move my business to Morrison Wealth Advisors and I look forward to continuing to work with Nick as my distinctive and trusted advisor.

We’ve worked with Charlie for over 30 years, and with his excellent guidance we have enjoyed steady growth of our portfolio through every kind of market. His understanding of our life goals and family needs has allowed us to enjoy the life we want with confidence and peace of mind. Charlie continues to be our trusted partner in helping us achieve financial security

Trust, professionalism and caring are the words that come to mind in describing Preston. If anyone is looking for an advisor to guide them through these often complicated matters, do not hesitate to contact him. He has our highest recommendation.

If you are looking for a thoughtful and measure approach to growth, he's your guy!

My finances are small change compared to most and yet I feel just as valued as a client as all the rest. Knowledge, trust, and peace of mind are why I have never second guessed my finances in the hands of Brett Fellows.

Our relationship with Brett has developed over a number of years, particularly after retirement in 2019. Our focus was on financial planning with handling of investment accounts, post retirement.  We benefited from his extensive knowledge and understanding and also his outstanding patience and good humor as he guided us through a system foreign(and initially, incomprehensible) to us. Brett has a very professional approach to finance management and on a more personal level is a friendly and enthusiastic supporter of your long term goals.  We came to him through personal recommendation and warmly recommend him to others.

Brent and his team are authorities not just in SEO, but how to best leverage SEO and an online presence for financial advisors.
I've worked with Advisor Rankings a couple of times over the last several years and I've always had a postitive experience. Brent and his colleagues focus on clear communications, setting expectations and delivering results.
If you're a financial advisor or financial firm and want to make the most of your online presence and content, you need to talk to Brent and Advisor Rankings!

advisor_name: Steve Troccoli, MBA, ChFC®, CFS®, CRPC®
review_text_raw: We met Steve many years ago at a presentation at our son's nursery school.  Our son is now 33.  Steve has been with us through many milestones.  Buying our first house, sending our kids off to college and in the near future retirement.  Not sure how this would have went without Steve's expertise, patience, caring and overall good nature.  We are proud to call Steve a friend who is also our financial advisor.

I had an aversion to investing until I met Charlie, and maybe I was in a month before the market tanked twenty percent. I am one of SOA’s smaller clients, yet Charlie took every one of my many whining phone calls, and listened, too, as I quoted newspaper articles about the market’s coming demise. And then my money grew back, and then some. I’m in a socially conscious class of investments, which makes me feel like a good capitalist, and have had great returns. I’ve been with SOA now for years with brilliant Saad by Charlie’s side. I feel cared for. When we met, Charlie asked what I spent a year, and then what my dreams were if I had the money, and then he made it happen. Also, SOA gives out good pens.

I have enjoyed working with Mark for over 30 years.  He has always been responsive, insightful and knowledgeable.  Even when Mark is out of the office for personal reasons, like vacations or family events, he is quick to respond and to assist.   Mark is friendly, has a great sense of humor and is a committed family man.  I recommend him without reservation.

We’ve been working with Preston for over 15 yrs and it has been a fruitful and enriching experience. He is insightful, responsive, steady and measured while also being agile to respond to what’s happening in the market. We’ve been through the recession, job changes, elections, the pandemic, childbirths etc. Preston continues to provide excellent guidance mindful of who we are and what we’ve said we want for our financial future. Through it all, Preston has vindicated our trust and faith in him and our partnership. Aside from the great substantive guidance, Preston is an extended family member. We feel seen, heard and cared about in this relationship as clients and as two people who came from humble beginnings and are building a future to ensure our son has the best we can provide and that we are able to enjoy our golden years in ways that our parents could’ve only dreamed.

It is such a pleasure working with Charlie. He really explains things and works in our interest when it comes to our finances. We, like everyone else, are busy and feel secure knowing Charlie is looking out for our interests. Working with Charlie, we are not only working toward a secure retirement, but a comfortable lifestyle while working to get there. We also are planning for our kids' exciting lives. If you are looking for someone relatable, personable and responsive, look no further. We are so glad we did.

My husband and I have trusted our financial planning with Preston for many years.  He has seen us thru ups and downs of the economy including the 2008 crisis.  His professionalism and knowledge of the market continues to give us confidence that working with him is the best decision we made.  But not only is he excellent at his job, he has also become a good friend.  I highly recommend Preston to anyone who is looking for a financial planner.
We have been working with Tony for two decades and have the utmost faith in him.  Sean has been a valuable addition to the team.  They are both responsive, patient and helpful.

Oath Planning has been a great group!  They are knowledgeable and quite helpful. I have been pleased with the returns on my investments andcwith their willingness and ability to answer questions and duscuss and explain strategies.

review_text_raw: Dan Yerger and his team do a great job managing my investments—I'm always kept informed and trust their guidance. Additionally, they host the best client appreciation parties! Last night’s event at The Roost was over the top and so much fun. Great team, excellent service.

advisor_name: Daniel Yerger, PhD, MBA, CFP®, ChFC, AIF
review_text_raw:
We have the privilege of working with MY Wealth Planners for about three years, and the experience has been nothing short of transformative. From our very first consultation, they demonstrated a deep understanding of financial strategy, investment planning, and long-term wealth management. What truly sets them apart is their ability to translate complex financial concepts into clear, actionable steps aligned with our personal and professional goals.
If you're seeking a financial partner who combines analytical rigor with genuine care for your success, look no further. MY Wealth Planners are a trusted advisor and a true asset to anyone serious about their financial future.

Mark has been our financial advisor for over 20 years, eventually guiding us into a comfortable retirement! We are so appreciative of the care he gives our portfolio, and that he always responds when we have specific needs or are freaking out about the market. He is friendly, fun, and attentive. We couldn't manage without him.

We worked with mark and co more than 20 years. Attention to detail is consistently impressive. Work is of the highest quality. Mark always delivers outstanding results. And his dedication to excellence is greatly appreciated.

My wife and I engaged Mark Dorfman's services together about a decade ago. In the time since, we've gotten excellent rates of return, but more importantly, a sound foundation for our future needs—things far beyond specific funds and investments. Through changes in geography, career, and life, he's provided not just great year-over-year gains, but also valuable advice. Moreover, he tailored his approach to fit our needs in a custom way. At this point, Mark is a trusted advisor on a wide range of matters for us. I highly and enthusiastically recommend him.

advisor_name: Steve Troccoli, MBA, ChFC®, CFS®, CRPC®
review_text_raw: We've worked with Steve for many years now.  He's helped us plan for retirement, navigate buying properties, leaving corporate jobs, opening businesses; all the big life stuff having to do with money.  He is hones, kind, caring and understands our goals.   Having an expert eye on our money gives me a feeling of safety and security that is extremely important.  Highly recommend.

I have worked with Mark and co for nearly twenty years and I have been extremely pleased. He takes the time to understand your goals—not just the numbers—and create a strategy that feels tailored and empowering. He's incredibly responsive, patient with questions, and clear in explanations. Best of all, I am very, VERY satisfied with the returns. I have recommended Mark strongly to friends and family, many of whom have taken me up on my suggestion, and are glad they did.

Whether it's investment planning, retirement strategies, or just sorting out day-to-day decisions, he brings expertise and empathy to the table.

I highly recommend Mark to anyone who values trustworthy advice with a human touch.

Working with Brett Fellows, CFP® at Oak Capital Advisors has been nothing short of a world-class experience—think Four Seasons or Ritz-Carlton level service, but for your financial life.

My wife and I recently completed Oak Capital’s Retirement Assessment Process, and I can honestly say it exceeded every expectation. From the initial consultation to the final review, Brett delivered an incredibly thoughtful, personalized experience that left us feeling both empowered and informed.

What really stood out was the professional video presentation Brett prepared. It wasn’t a generic financial report or a boilerplate plan—it was a customized, visually engaging walkthrough of our specific financial situation, retirement goals, and opportunities for improvement. He uncovered insights and strategies we had not considered, presenting them in a way that was approachable, actionable, and aligned with our family’s unique needs.

Brett’s process is not just about spreadsheets and numbers; it’s about helping you clearly understand your financial roadmap while feeling supported every step of the way. His calm, knowledgeable approach made complex topics easy to digest, and we never once felt rushed or "sold to." Instead, we left the experience with a true partner in our financial future.

If you're considering working with Oak Capital Advisors, I highly recommend scheduling time with Brett to go through his Retirement Assessment Process. It’s a no-pressure, high-value experience that will leave you better informed—whether you decide to engage further or not.

I have known Charles Hamowy for decades. He has managed my husband and my financial assets through several phases of our lives. He has helped us save and invest so we could put our children through college, retire on our terms, and live the life we have always dreamed of.  He is now helping us with estate planning and preparing heirs.  He is knowledgeable, professional, talented, and trusted. His dedicated and consistent seasonal approach on looking at all aspects of a client’s financial life is priceless.  I highly recommend him and his team.

advisor_name: Steve Troccoli, MBA, ChFC®, CFS®, CRPC®
review_text_raw:
**Five-Star Review for My Financial Advisor**

I am thrilled to share my experience with Steve. From our very first meeting, it was clear that his integrity sets him apart in the financial industry. He took the time to understand our unique financial situation and goals, demonstrating a genuine commitment to our success.

His attention to detail is remarkable; he meticulously analyzed our portfolio and identified opportunities that we hadn't even considered. It's evident that he stays deeply informed about the ever-evolving financial markets, showcasing an impressive depth of knowledge that instills confidence in his recommendations.

What truly makes Steve exceptional is his caring nature. He always makes himself available for questions and concerns, ensuring that we never feel rushed or overwhelmed. His intelligence shines through in every discussion, as he explains complex concepts in a way that is easy to understand.

Thanks to his guidance, we feel more secure about our financial future than ever. I wholeheartedly recommend Steve to anyone seeking a trustworthy, knowledgeable, and compassionate financial advisor. He has truly made a positive impact on our lives!

Charles Hamowy has managed our financial assets for the past 35 years and has been a joy to work with.  He always approaches an essentially boring subject -- our modest holdings -- with excitement, imagination and a funky sense of humor.  As a result, our life has become happier and more abundant.  He now oversees our daughter's accounts as well.  To us he's more than an advisor, he's a friend.  His best advice: "Live your life!"

Charlie has been our financial advisor for the past 4 years. He helped us think strategically about how we could maximize our asset holdings and develop a long term strategy for retirement. In a volatile environment he is a calming and thoughtful advisor who helps us think outside the box. We deeply value his counsel and could not recommend him enough.

We have been working with Charlie and his team for nearly 20 years. From private high schools to funding college for 3 children, to wedding plans, to second homes to eventual retirement; Charlie and his team have been instrumental and comforting every step of the way. They made goal setting a priority and helped us achieve our family dreams. Could not recommend them more!

Michael and I met for an initial consultation, and right away he was asking questions (and providing immediate recommendations!) as to how I should approach and refine my financial planning. His advice was tailored to my situation, provided me insights that were immediately actionable that I had not considered and was unaware of prior, and has given me a great path forward - all in our first conversation. I would highly recommend Michael and his services for anyone looking to get started on their personal finance journey!

I can’t say enough good things about working with Dave Liegakos at Intrepid Financial. After selling my home, I was faced with an important decision about how to invest the modest profit I had made — and to be honest, I felt overwhelmed. I didn’t have a retirement plan in place, was launching a new business, and with the economy being so uncertain, I was hesitant to take on any high-risk investments.

Dave took the time to really listen and understand my unique situation. He walked me through every option in a clear, thoughtful way that made me feel informed and confident in the choices I was making. What really stood out was how personalized his approach was — I never felt rushed or like I was just another client. He made me feel like I was his only client, offering steady guidance, patience, and reassurance every step of the way.

On top of the investment support, Dave helped me think through critical aspects of my business plan, including future tax planning and how to stay financially flexible as I grow. His advice has already made a meaningful difference in how I manage my finances and look ahead to the future.

If you're looking for a financial advisor who is not only knowledgeable and strategic but also genuinely cares about your individual goals, I highly recommend Dave. Working with him has been one of the best decisions I’ve made.
Brendan and Luis have been a pleasure. They are uniquely empathetic, creative and thorough. I highly recommend their financial planning services.

— Gerald Duran, Managing Partner at CanaGlobal

Charles Hamowy and his Seasons of Advice associates have been wonderful custodians of our investment portfolio for 15 years. Through the many ups and downs of the markets, Charles has been a steady and reassuring hand, and a successful one. He has adjusted our holdings appropriately as we age. He has counseled us knowledgeably on other financial decisions. And throughout he has been a delight to work with.

I met Charles Hamowy in 2008. I was in my 60's still employed as the Director of a not-for-profit, small pre-school. I had a TIAA Cref account and equity in a coop apartment in Chelsea, New York City. My Board of Trustees suggested a financial review, predicting that my retirement was not far off. I retired 16 years later!

He immediately advised the following to a Board Committee:
        Bring my salary up to a level comparable to colleagues in the field.
        Designate contributions to my 403b account to match my social priorities,
        Create a SERP (Special Executive Retirement Account) to be awarded upon my retirement.

The Committee agreed and I became his Client.
I was impressed by his practice of seeing clients 4 times a year for analysis and any adjustments to our goals.
He is always available  to me and my accountment by phone and/or meeting in person or via Zoom.
Our relationship has grown so that I trust that Charlie knows me very well, what my priorities are, and can advise me effectively especially now that I am retired.

I highly recommend him...... as I have to my entire family and many friends.
He put the puzzle together!

For over 15 years, Charles and his team have looked after our financial assets. Through thick and thin, ups and downs, our investments have matured well, even with the inevitable market fluctuations along the way. We couldn't be happier with his stewardship. I cannot recommend Charles Hamowy and Seasons of Advice more highly.
Fifteen+ years of spectacular advice through market ups and downs. We sleep at night knowing Charlie and his team have all seasons of our life in hand. Superb advice and service always. Thank you.

We’ve been working with SOA for just over seven years and couldn’t be more satisfied. Charlie, Saad and their team of professionals have been an absolute pleasure to work with—always keeping our best interests at heart. Their financial advice has been consistently sound, thoughtful, reliable and their ability to remain agile and responsive to market changes has helped us achieve steady growth over the years.

While we formally meet with the team quarterly, they are always accessible for questions and support. Their responsiveness is exceptional—often near immediate. We greatly value the personal attention we receive from the entire group and have complete confidence in the custodianship of our portfolio.

Charlie has been our financial advisor for almost 30 years and we couldn’t be more pleased with his service and professionalism. He is an exceptional financial planner who has guided us through some of the most challenging financial circumstances. He and his very competent team are tapped into the most up to date financial instruments and, as a result, we are confident that our finances are in great hands. He is always available to discuss issues and concerns (including evenings, weekends, holidays, whatever) and has become a good friend. We would not hesitate to recommend Charlie as a financial advisor/planner. He is the best.

We first met Charlie Hamowy when we had no money at all. We had three small children and Charlie helped us map out a financial plan to get our kids through school, pay for weddings and bat mitzvah, and save enough money to retire. Now thirty years later, we are still clients, as are all three of our children, and we are well situated for the retirement of our dreams. Thanks Charlie.

I not only totally trust that I can rely on Charlie and his team for my financial investments and planning I must shine a light on Seasons of Advice's four quarterly meetings and how helpful they are. Even if you think you don't need them they force you to focus on issues, like impending changes or estate planning and beneficiaries, and the date that approaches every few months is a forced reminder to actually get things done that we humans tend to avoid or procrastinate about. It is his comprehensive way of taking care of my financial life + that I find invaluable! No reservations for a 100% recommendation.

Charles always provides us with valuable information and guidance on the nuances of our financial planning journey. Each year he answers our questions with the details we need to make informed decisions. We love working with PAX!

Stacy is the rare combination of a top notch professional and a compassionate and caring person that understands why these two qualities should go hand in hand. If you want a skilled advisor that sees you as more than a client I highly recommend Stacy.

I was hesitant at the beginning to pay for a financial advisor but now I have seen so many benefits in return. I wish I would have done it sooner. Luis Guardia has been so patient and I feel so much trust in his guidance. I am so glad I found him.

Couldn't be happier to have put our trust in Larry Sprung and the Mitlin Financial team to manage our finances. Josh and Carmen are a pleasure to work with as they always go above and beyond for us, always with a smile and kind words. Highly recommend this firm that makes you feel like family.

The greatest benefit of working with Kris is the confidence that he is putting my interests first, rather than trying to find ways to charge me more.

It has been a joy to work with Kris and I continue to recommend him to friends and family.

A few years passed and I again found myself attending his presentations, only this time I brought along my wife to hear what he had to say. Soon after I availed myself of his offer of an assessment to determine where I was and what I could do as I neared retirement.
I have now been retired for about 7 years and couldn't be happier with all that Scott and his team have done for us. I could provide a list of everything, but suffice it to say, we are very very pleased with where we are today and for what they have accomplished for us. A special thanks to Jeff Lindsay who stuck with us as we worked through some unique issues. I know I couldn't have done it without his help.
I wouldn't hesitate passing along their name to someone who was in need of assistance. In fact I have. Great company with a great staff.

There's no doubt God sends people at certain points in your life to help you make better decisions. They truly listen and get to know what you and your family want in your life and help you get there.

Having worked with other financial “advisors” in the past, and having been approached others since, I can say the difference with SWM is clear. Many are focused on selling products or funds, often driven by commissions. I much prefer their fee-based model, which ensures the advice is genuinely in your best interest.

Meredith takes a disciplined, thoughtful approach to investing that captures upside opportunities while managing downside risk. I've learned a lot from her over the years. I can't recommend Schneider Wealth Management highly enough.

Over time, she has become much more than a financial advisor. She has become a confidante and a trusted guide to some of our biggest life decisions.

Thank you, Jane!

After reviewing the annuities and speaking with representatives of the annuity issuing company RHP advised that we not move the funds over to the investment account we had opened with RHP. I knew then that their advice was truly based on what is in our best interest, not theirs.

I rarely make recommendations for any business, but I have recommended RHP more than once to family and friends.

Although I have a background as well in this field, his strong tax expertise helped my husband and I balance out our current income goals with our future transfer of assets to our children.

One year prior to my retirement, Markham took the time to fully understand my financial situation and my plans for the future. My circumstances involve more than just my 401(k). During several discussions, Markham was able to answer all my questions and quickly analyze scenarios, making me feel at ease with my retirement readiness. I could put to rest any racing thoughts and indecision.

Now three years into retirement, working with Markham continues to be a positive experience. My monthly distribution “paycheck”, based on tax-efficient withdrawals and Markham’s full analysis of my circumstances, has allowed me to enjoy my passions each day, post-career. Markham and Joe are always available to talk and give advice when I’ve had market concerns. The Quotient newsletters also serve to remind me how my money is being invested to reduce exposure.

I’m fortunate that I can now enjoy the fruits of my labor with confidence that Markham will be the first to tell me if and when I should make changes to my financial strategy.

His guidance is clear, strategic, and tailored, making it easy to stay focused on what matters most while knowing your finances are in good hands. Working with Evan is an effortless, smart investment in your long-term success and something I confidently recommend to those closest to me.

The team is consistently informative, timely, and responsive. Whether it’s big-picture planning or day-to-day questions, I always feel like I have a trusted partner in my corner. I highly recommend Mitlin Financial to anyone looking for a long-term, relationship-based financial advisor who truly has your best interests at heart.

As we considered with whom we would like to engage as our financial planner, we researched the characteristics of those that are successful in this field. Brett embodies them all!

From day one, he has been clear about his mission- assisting us to achieve sustained growth and security while we enjoy our retirement years. And, he left us with a sense that we were a team in doing so. As part of the clearly defined process that he has used to support us, he spent considerable time getting to know us, including details of our family, our goals, and interests as well as our concerns and fears. He's pushed us to think about how to maximize our lives while providing for each other and our heirs.

We appreciate that Brett "maintains a presence." We hear from him regularly (at least monthly via newsletter) but in-person at least twice a year and "as-needed" when specific questions arise. We count on both the newsletters and personal meetings for a clear picture of where we are financially, an explanation of things impacting the market and our finances. He's inquisitive, and always looking to keep up with changes in our status.

As a communicator, Brett strives to provide the detailed understanding we want without overwhelming us with data, though there's certainly plenty at hand whenever we've wanted to take a deeper dive.

Brett often shares current articles and books that he's reading when he sends newsletters, and that's comforting knowing he's keeping very current.

We feel like we're sitting down with a knowledgeable friend or family member  when we see Brett, and we're thankful that he strives for this relationship.

advisor_name: Thomas Ouellette, AIF, CFS, LUTCF, CRPC
review_text_raw:
Our Journey with Tom
It was over two decades ago when we met Tom for the first time. Actually it was my spouse, who went to one of Tom’s seminars by herself and told me about his practice. As an engineer by training, I was not convinced that Tom could provide what he said and told my wife that we needed to be more cautious about our hard earned money. A few weeks later, Tom offered to meet with us to address our concerns. At the meeting, he clearly explained his philosophy and approaches in helping his clients manage their money, and took time to answer our questions. Impressed by his financial knowledge, passionate enthusiasm and heartfelt sincerity, mu wife and I soon became one of his clients on Nov. 24, 2004.
For almost a decade since then, Tom always made himself available for us to meet with him in his office whenever there’s a transition in our family finance and some adjustments were needed. Often and again, he would take time to understand our financial goal in the long run and advise us not to be easily swayed by any seemingly attractive winds in the financial market. As we began to prepare for our retirement,
he helped us timely with great proficiency and efficiency to determine the options
for our pensions.
About a year after we retired and moved to San Francisco to be close to our grand children, Tom made an effort to visit us to see how we the uprooted trees settled in the city, after taking root in Lexington for over 37 years. It was a short yet very sweet visit and we’re very happy to have the chance to introduce to him a couple of friends visiting from Boston, who later also became Tom’s clients.
As retirees no more holding any key positions in a company or a church, my wife and I feel more comfortable recommending Tom to our friends seeking financial advices.
We are very happy and relieved to know that those who’ve decided to stay with Tom are very pleased with his advice and turned around recommending others to Tom as well.
May Tom and his great OWMG team continue to be as trustworthy and helpful to
the clients as the day when he just started his journey

review_text_raw:
How has OWMG impacted our life?
 Being a client of OWMG, first of all, has felt like being a member of a special family. We have always felt like we are being taken care of and our best interest has been a top priority of the entire team.   OWMG’s services go beyond financial advice.  When our mom passed away in 2013, I remember how the angst of  “what do we do next” and “how do we handle the financial side of her business” and “what are all the things we have no idea we have to do”  was just taken care of without question.  That took so much pressure and stress from an extremely difficult situation.  We felt cared for - just like a valued family member.   One of Tom’s most memorable comments talks about “how will we sleep at night”.    Working with ALL the professionals at OWMG has certainly made our quality of sleep exponentially better!   Just knowing that I can pick up the phone at any time for almost any reason and get a friendly knowledgeable person who is more than willing to help in any way they can is PRICELESS.  We trust OWMG, always have and always will.   Back in the beginning the team was a lot smaller and your presence Debbie was always warm and welcoming and an important part of the OWMG.  Your willingness to help with anything asked, without exception, was so important and comforting.  Although we will miss you Debbie, we know we will be good hands with the exceptional caliber of team that Tom continues to build at OWMG.

review_text_raw:
The greatest impact is probably the “peace of mind” we have by having our investments in
place to fulfill our retirement plan. Some of the things that contribute to that peace of mind are
as follows:
We began with Ouellette Wealth (I think) about ten years ago in 2014. We were not retired at
that time. We did retire in 2019. During this time, Ouellette Wealth has always taken the time to
understand our unique situation and goals for retirement. There have been various
circumstances during these past ten years in which Ouellette Wealth’s guidance and assistance
has been invaluable.
We have had in person meetings every year to review our specific progress toward our goals
and make adjustments, if needed.
We know we can call or send an email at any time to Ouellette Wealth to ask a question or get
advice.
Ouellette Wealth also communicates with all clients in several ways during the year, such as
updates via Zoom in which current economic conditions are reviewed and often times we
receive perspectives of past events in relation to these current economic conditions. In addition,
copies of current informative economic articles (by Nick Murray) are emailed to clients
periodically. These meetings and articles help provide “peace of mind” in reinforcing our goal focused investment philosophy. In other words – not trying to “time the market”
Also, during the year, there have been social events for all clients to participate in. This allows
for meeting clients and provides an exchange of ideas.
On a lighter note -- some of the other perks we have received over the years which impact our
lives:
A greater understanding of the New England Patriots and in particular Tom Brady.
Various gifts received at events over the years and of course we can’t forget
The Thanksgiving Pies.
In summary, in our opinion, this is a Five star company! *****

review_text_raw: We've used an international tax accountant to advise us on filing US tax returns when we spent time abroad.  But, we wanted a financial planner to take stock of our financial plan, and advise us on the long term tax implications of spending additional time abroad.  Would any time of international based assets help or hurt our tax situation, are there countries more or less favorable to expats from a tax perspective.  We interviewed several firms and individuals, and in Malissa's free consult, she gave us new and sound advice that essentially pre-paid her fee so it was a no brainer.  The financial planning with her was broad, deep and insightful and I sleep better at night knowing what the risk/reward considerations are for certain decisions.  We whole heartedly recommend Malissa for anyone thinking of being an expat for any period of time, or frankly anyone who needs a smart, patient, and completely professional financial planner.

Over the years, I’ve worked with several incredibly intelligent financial advisors, yet none provided the clear, comprehensive guidance and tailored planning I truly needed—until I met Jeremy. Unlike “assets under management” advisors who focused primarily on portfolio management, Jeremy took a refreshing approach, centering on what mattered most to me: what I can safely spend, what I need to save, and a planning strategy designed specifically for my unique circumstances. As I approach retirement, this level of personalized guidance is crucial. In hindsight, I wish I had received such support during my early earning years, but despite diligent efforts and carefully selecting advisors, it remained elusive.  And it cost me MUCH more.

I wanted answers to pivotal questions: How much can I spend today? How much do I need to invest? And most importantly, when can I confidently retire knowing my financial future is secure? I also sought clear advice on supporting my children, grandchildren, philanthropic goals, healthcare, insurance, and other essential future expenses—questions I’ve wrestled with since achieving a solid income.

What truly sets Jeremy apart is his proactive and methodical approach. He seamlessly integrated my entire financial picture into a real-time software platform, enabling him to grasp the nuances of my situation even before our first meeting. His ability to identify critical details I hadn’t considered—and that I initially doubted he’d catch—was both impressive and reassuring. The software itself is a game-changer, letting me assess my portfolio in real time and explore various future scenarios—not just good market versus bad market, but more complex situations, like early dips in retirement followed by growth, or the reverse. It helps me prepare for anything, and the fact that I can use it independently is a huge plus.

Additionally, Jeremy’s commitment extends far beyond our scheduled meetings. His readiness to assist—even during unconventional hours—underscores his dedication. Whether by email or phone, his thoughtful responses consistently demonstrate his expertise. As someone who subscribes to an index fund philosophy, I find Jeremy’s experience at Vanguard and Schwab invaluable. His insights informed my investment strategy and dispelled several preconceptions I held about diversification. His surprising yet sound advice has completely transformed my approach to diversification, making me feel more confident in my financial decisions.  I was sure I was too aggressive in my investment mix but I am now convinced I am perfectly tuned, no matter what comes up in the markets...and am confident I will be able to adjust as needed. Now that my plans are set, I have a todo list.  He checks in to make sure I am keeping up with the list and is available for advice if I need it.

Another important point.  Jeremy is not my peer (I am 62).  He is in his 40s.  You can find the perfect advisor...but if he isn't there for you during your retirement years (because he is retiring or losing his edge when you start to lose yours), it isn't so perfect anymore.  I am thrilled that Jeremy will be with me for the long run.

Jeremy’s expertise, combined with his calm and reassuring demeanor, has instilled a sense of confidence as I move forward with my financial plans. I couldn’t recommend him more highly.  And frankly, his rates are so reasonable, you just can't go wrong giving him a chance!

I’ve always been a private person about my finances, and while I knew saving was important, I struggled with how to invest what I saved. That’s when I met Terry at Scipio Financial. I can’t recommend him enough! Each session boosts my confidence and empowers me to be more strategic with my savings. If you’ve been thinking about hiring a financial advisor, take the plunge with Scipio Financial. It’s been such a positive experience for me!

Part of the appeal is that Kevin doesn't sell and he doesn't desire to create a situation where a client is dependent upon him...His approach is distinct in that he desires, and succeeds, in educating and preparing the client to understand, monitor, and take on their plan independently.

review_text_raw:
Working with Emily, Richard, and the rest of the Archer team has been an absolute game-changer for my financial well-being. From our very first meeting, their friendliness and professionalism put me completely at ease. I feel like they genuinely care about my goals, and they’ve been incredibly patient in answering all my (many!) questions. If you are anything like me starting this process with no idea what the heck your financial goals are, don’t worry, they will gently guide you. They do a thorough intake process over several meetings to identify goals, risk tolerance, and get to know clients.

I had a scattered mess of accounts due to changing employers and random investments over the years. Now all of those accounts are organized and manageable from a single place. Their expertise in the tech startup industry is invaluable to navigate company stock options and instill confidence when exercising. What truly sets them apart is their high quality tooling. I love love love that they have everything in a secure cloud with custom dashboards, and all signatures are electronic – no more printing and mailing, thank goodness! They also pre-fill any necessary forms with my personal info which is a huge timesaver. Their responsiveness is truly remarkable; I’ve always received incredibly fast replies. This level of dedication is rare and greatly appreciated. Last but not least, I get to sit back and watch my investments grow. For the first time in my life, I can see a path to early retirement.

I wholeheartedly recommend Archer Investment Management to anyone seeking a trustworthy, knowledgeable, and highly responsive financial planning service.

I’m a recent client of Mr. Guardia’s, and I couldn’t be happier with the decision my wife and I made to have him guide our current and future finances. From our very first discovery call, it was clear that he genuinely cared about helping us find the right advisor for our needs—not just gaining another client. He even provided a checklist for interviewing other financial advisors and offered valuable tips on how to evaluate them.

Ultimately, it was his deep expertise and authentic, caring nature that won us over. Since partnering with Mr. Guardia, the stress and anxiety we once felt about financial planning have completely disappeared. Having him as our advisor has given us peace of mind—and more importantly, our time back—so we can focus on what truly matters: spending time with our children and growing our business.
Brett is knowledgeable, personable, and trustworthy. He is willing to devote the time to ensure that you have a thorough understanding of the decisions that you make regarding your finances.

Josh recently reached out to collaborate with both of us on financial planning, helping us maximize our current finances - such as consolidating stock and investment portfolios - and advising on the best strategies for allocating money in a high-yield savings account (HYSA) for short-term goals versus investing in the market for long-term growth. He has also guided us in preparing for future milestones, including buying a car, paying off our mortgage early, and planning for child-related expenses from birth through college.

One of our most notable experiences with Josh was his ability to connect us with an independent insurance consultant for our home insurance. Love Dave’s 4 season strategy. He’s super helpful in helping me understand complex topics and is great to work with. Highly recommend!

If you are reading this, you have probably worked hard all of your life too and have found a way to provide for the needs of yourself and your family. What we do next is very important. For me, it was just as important to protect the money we saved as it was to make it.

Nathan

After 22 years of working with Continuum Wealth Advisors, we continue to be pleased by the detailed and personal attention we receive from the entire staff. Tim, Jen and the team at Continum are fantastic. They have done great things with my portfolio. They are always there if you have a question and the response is very quick . I have been with them for many years and will continue to do so. The best!

advisor_name: Michael R. Acosta, CFP®, ChFC®, RICP®, CSLP®, CEPA®
review_text_raw: I met Michael through James, our financial planner. James knew I was worried about my seemingly endless school loan payments and said that this is Michael's specialty (or one of them). That is an understatement. Michael knows the ins and outs of school loans like I know my favorite sweet is chocolate. In a matter of a few minutes, Michael explained what I needed to do and even walked me through each step of the multiple forms I needed to complete. Whenever I had a question about the process or what next steps might be, Michael either answered via email or was gracious enough to schedule a meeting. This week, after patiently waiting, I received notice that my school loans have been forgiven (because I made the correct number of payments) and had I not met Michael, I would not have even known that was an option. When I say he changed my life, I mean it...the weight lifted off my shoulders was immense. I will be forever grateful.

I have been working with Matt for at least six years and couldn't be more pleased. With all the market ups and downs we have "stayed the course" with a sound strategy, execution and very favorable results. Matt is professional, thoughtful and pleasant to work with. His advice and company resources are excellent. I highly recommend Matt as your financial advisor

My wife and I have been working with Matt and his team essentially since I retired from ExxonMobil several years ago. These past few years have had their ups and downs and whenever we've had questions, the Quotient team has been readily available and prepared to provide a complete overview of how we're doing.  Even during recent uncertainties, I'm confident that we are in good hands.  Even though we no longer live in the Houston area (Virginia now), it makes no difference, since communication tools have gotten quite good, especially in recent years.

He takes his time with us, talks very easily, and often makes great recommendations for our financial goals.  We feel extremely comfortable that he has our best interests at heart and have definitely recommended him to family and friends.  We are very grateful to have Matt and his team overseeing and managing our accounts.

James has provided periodic reviews which always cover short term recommendations and longer range simulations.    His recommendations are provided with sound logic, but he will also not insist or push if I am not comfortable with any proposed changes to my portfolio.

In my case,  that meant uncovering blind spots that look and feel like security in the moment, but have the potential of far greater abundance in the future.    By understanding the level of risk and knowing I could always reach out with questions,  Hazel has helped me better manage these blind spots.

While I haven’t personally used Charles’s services yet, the feedback I’ve received and the impression he made on me speak volumes. He’s also actively involved in the Ridgefield community and serves on the board of directors for the Kiwanis La Center chapter.

If you're looking for a knowledgeable and trustworthy financial advisor, Charles is definitely someone worth connecting with!

We have been working with Michelle's team for 8 years.  She steered us towards a Life Insurance Retirement Plan (LIRP)  that is now paid and ready.  The Gessner office staff is ready with personalized & customized solutions to improve your financial planning and the execution of your financial choices for your best future.

Brett’s professionalism and expertise have given me confidence in my financial future. Whether it’s retirement planning, investments, or budgeting, he always offer insightful guidance and make complex concepts easy to understand. I always look forward to annual check in meeting where we discuss last years results and goals for the future.

I highly recommend Capital Oak Advisors to anyone seeking a reliable, knowledgeable, and trustworthy financial advisor. Brett’s dedication and personalized approach make all the difference!

We had a fantastic experience with Jeremy! With so much information on the internet about doing Roth conversions, we wanted to understand if that made sense for us, as well as any other retirement tax strategies we should consider. We did not want to give up control of our money and pay annual money management fees, so engaging The Hourly Advisor was a perfect fit.

After understanding our current financial picture and short/long term retirement goals, he used the Smart Capital tool to give us a complete picture of scenarios we envisioned and their probably of financial success. He even reviewed our current investment portfolio and pointed out a number of optimizations we could make in both taxable and tax-deferred accounts. We loved that he also gave us access to the tool so we could make updates or adjustments and see how these would affect our plans.

We look forward to working with Jeremy in the future as we need tune-ups or our life plans change. We strongly recommend The Hourly Advisor to anyone looking for quality affordable financial guidance!

Just prior to my retirement I can't deny that my wife and I were a bit nervous about our financial future. Although we did our best to save and prepare, we were in strange waters and not sure how to condition our spending and lifestyle.

I had a scattered mess of accounts due to changing employers and random investments over the years. Now all of those accounts are organized and manageable from a single place. In 2016 after my retirement, my husband and I started investing with Brandon Ross and Matt Davis at United Capital, and continue with Matt as our trusted and reliable financial planner at Quotient Wealth Partners.

Matt has been very responsive to our financial needs as a retired couple. A couple of years prior to my retirement from a major oil and gas company, and after a lot of background research, my wife and I chose to work with Brandon Ross and Matt Davis at United Capital as our investment advisors. Over the succeeding ten years (it’s been that long?) we have remained with them as their company has morphed from United Capital to Goldman Sachs and now to Quotient Wealth Partners. Over that time, too, Matt’s skills, capabilities and responsibilities have grown, reflected in his ascension from Wealth Advisor to Senior Wealth Advisor and now Partner. At present, Matt is serving as our principal wealth advisor.

We have elected to continue working with Matt for several reasons.  The Quotient and Dynasty teams provide many tools and concepts to their clients, and Matt does an outstanding job of translating these, and any recommended strategies into “civilian speak” to my wife and me as non-professional investors.  He then works with us to identify appropriate tactical adaptations to our portfolio that best fit both our long-term and immediate requirements.

We meet with Matt biannually to review the state of our portfolio, go over potential choices, and map out our investment plans.  However, Matt does not hesitate to respond at any time should we text him with a question or concern, or if any notable strategic changes need to be communicated from the Quotient investment team.  Matt is diligent about following up on questions that he is unable to fully address during our discussions.  And perhaps most importantly, although my company retirement earnings have provided the lion’s share contribution to our portfolio, Matt ensures that my wife, too, is equally involved in our investment decisions and planning.

Beyond his technical acumen, we have found Matt to be a friendly and caring individual who is genuinely customer oriented.  We always enjoy catching up on each other’s family activities before we get down to business during our meetings.  All in all, we have been very pleased with Matt and Quotient and have every intention of sticking with them for some time to come.

I have been working with Matt Davis since 2021, I was referred to him by a friend, and he has been a trusted and reliable Financial Advisor. Matt Davis is a highly skilled financial advisor with exceptional interpersonal abilities and extensive market knowledge. In 2021 after 22 years, I retired from Exxonmobil . There were many questions and insecurities about what tasks and efforts were required on my part to prepare for the brave new world of retirement. Leading up to this moment I had my "head down and butt up" exploring for oil and gas around the world and had not anticipated this next step in life. Several co-workers had recently retired and were taking a monthly pension from the company, but given the insecurity of inflation eating up a pension down the road; I asked around the office to find someone who was in the same boat as I was, and was fortunate to find a co-worker who was working with Matt Davis.
I contacted Matt at his corporate office and he invited my wife and I to come down to his office for an introductory session. I had written up a list of questions for Matt and He also had a list of questions for us.
Our meeting went well, we discussed:
-Living expenses and requirements
-Family situation
-a Will
- Benefactors in case something happened to me
-Investment strategies and investment products
-Inflation/recession and how to maintain and gain value in changing the economy/market
-Yearly Disbursement and family events (marriage of children)
-Taxes
-Social Security
My wife and I discussed our goals and provided these to Matt who was able to provide us with a diverse portfolio which has grown above the rate of inflation since our retirement.
Matt has always been available, and we have bi-annual meetings to review our portfolio and discuss any questions/recommendations for change to be made as well as a look ahead as to our needs as well as investment strategies for the future, given the state of the economy.
Matt is always available as our retirement/investment advisor. We can call or meet anytime on short notice and he will answer any questions and take any action that we may require.
My wife and I are very comfortable with our decision to work with Matt and Quotient Wealth and highly recommend their services.

Some years back I was faced with a very unexpected decision - retirement.  It came earlier than expected and I was unprepared.  A co-worker recommended Bruce and it was great advice. Since Magda retired from Bechtel, Matt has been our retirement portfolio manager! Thank you, Matt!

I have had the pleasure of working with Jonathan and his staff for over 10 years, and I can say without hesitation that they are one of the most outstanding financial professionals I have ever encountered. From the very beginning, Jonathan has demonstrated an exceptional level of knowledge, integrity, and commitment to helping me achieve my financial goals.

Whether it’s retirement planning, investment strategies, or tax optimization, they always offer thoughtful, tailored advice that aligns with my long-term objectives. Over the years, Jonathan and his team has not only helped me grow my wealth but also provided invaluable guidance during uncertain times, offering reassurance and sound advice that has enabled me to stay focused on my long-term financial success. Their strategic insights and proactive approach have been critical in navigating some of the more challenging financial environments, and I’ve always felt confident in their recommendations.

In addition to their professionalism, they have always been incredibly responsive, ensuring that I have access to the information I need whenever I need it. Whether via email, phone, or in-person meetings, they’ve consistently demonstrated an exceptional level of client service.

I wholeheartedly recommend Jonathan and his team to anyone seeking a knowledgeable, trustworthy, and dedicated financial advisor. Over the past decade, they’ve not only earned my respect but also my complete confidence in their ability to manage my financial future.

review_text_raw: Shikha has been my advisor since 2017. Since then, my portfolio has grown over 45% while making yearly RMDs. She has been a friend who shows she cares for clients.

In our time with him, we gain valuable knowledge regarding our current retirement plans, insight into ways we need to look into building our retirement and ways we can better plan for the future.
We inquired about what his services were and his prices. He quoted us a very fair and reasonable offer to sit down with us to create a financial map. Additionally, he showed us the programs and documents that he would use with us and they are very easy to follow and understand.
Terry is a financial expert that treats his clients and future clients with a very high level of respect, provides a relaxed environment and avoids the expert language; putting it on a level that you can easily understand and follow.
Just wanted to say Nic has done a nice job with my retirement account. Looking forward to working with him through the next few years!

Would I be able to enjoy my later years comfortably? Would I have to work longer than I planned to?
Nestor casually asked me a question one day: “Has your advisor spoken to you about doing a Roth Conversion?” The answer was no. As a matter of fact, I hadn’t heard much from that advisor over the many months prior to his question. It was a simple question, but it made me wonder why I hadn’t been prompted by my then advisor to do something like that.
I was curious. Was Nestor’s view of financial planning and wealth management different from what I had previously experienced? One official meeting after that thought, gave me my answer. Absolutely.
His team will take a deep dive into everything that affects your estate and finances. Not intrusive. Just thorough. After, he will provide recommendations and suggestions. It is truly a concierge financial experience, unlike anything I have ever had. He has my trust, and he has my back. I feel like I have “financial overwatch” now! Many thanks to Nestor and his team at AlignPoint Wealth. I can’t recommend him enough!

Townsend Financial Planning has been a godsend for us. They helped us plan for retirement while we were working and are helping us navigate our retirement years with confidence. Everyone on the team is professional and makes us feel like we are the best hands!!
Jeff is extremely thorough, trustworthy and knowledgeable. He is always available and willing to explain any questions I have. I highly recommend working with Jeff and Water Street Wealth Management.

We are very thankful for the wise advice and prudent guidance we receive from Townsend Financial Planning.  There is no doubt our financial position is much better because of their close monitoring of our accounts and direction provided.  We could not recommend them more highly.

advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®

advisor_name: Malissa Marshall, CFP®, MS Tax, EA
review_text_raw:
My wife and I have been planning to relocate from the USA to Europe for several years, however we had been struggling with a few hurdles on the international tax planning front.  I consider myself more or less competent in US tax law and planning, but lacked the knowledge to ensure we had the right strategy when moving abroad.  We interviewed several advisors, however struggled finding anyone that met our needs until we met Malissa.

After initially working with a firm in the EU country we'll be relocating to, we were referred by word of mouth to Malissa and hired her to help validate and corroborate our understanding of how our US based assets would be taxed after relocating out of the country.  Malissa not only helped provide additional detail and clarification around several nuanced aspects of how our assets would be taxed, she also interfaced directly with the firm helping us in the EU giving me the confidence our plan has been optimized before we pull the trigger and become tax residents of another country.

Some additional background on our particular situation, I previously worked for an international company as an expat with both 'standard' and 'hypothetical' tax returns.  Malissa felt like a perfect match given her prior experience working as a tax manager for one of the Big Four accounting firms handling expatriate tax returns.

We have not used her tax preparation services yet, however we have full confidence in her abilities and plan to leverage her in few years when we need to submit returns both in the EU and USA.

Lastly, it should go without saying but she's a fee based advisor not working off a commission which is the only way to go if you want a true fiduciary.

Working with Justin was an awesome experience. He took the time to get to know me and my goals, was incredibly helpful, and really helped me sort out my finances. If you are on the fence, I highly recommend scheduling a call with him.

Excellent help at an excellent price.
I was a DIY personal finance guy for decades, following a 'Bogleheads' type of approach, at least in principle.  I naively thought that financial decisions would get easier around retirement time, kids through college, etc.   I was very wrong about that.
After much research and talking with a bunch of firms, including the big, low-cost Usual Suspects, we decided to try working with Abundo Wealth a little over a year ago.  It's a low risk decision to try them out:  they follow a low-cost, advice-only model for their services.  So if you don't like it, you drop it.  It's literally that simple.

As it happened, we were not happy with our first advisor at Abundo, though we could see that the model had great promise.   We said that we wanted to try someone else - see if it worked better.  The founder reached out to get the details on the issues we had experienced and was great and supportive about helping with a switch.  He recommended we try working with Olivia, one of their financial planners.

To put it simply, Olivia is fantastic.  And Abundo suits our needs right now very, very well.   We now have truly responsive, buttoned up, expert advice and guidance on the complete array of financial questions and doubts that I had before we joined up with Abundo.  And Abundo's investment philosophy, in my experience, is squarely in line with the Boglehead approach (low cost, index-fund driven, simple, diversified, ride-out the dips, etc).  I love that they never take "possession" of our assets - they just give us great advice about what we should do with them.    Heck, if you're not certain how to implement something that Abundo has suggested, they'll even jump on line with you while you're in your brokerage's web site and walk you through, screen by screen.   It gives you a safety net if things get tricky to figure out.

And let's say I want to manage our finances some other way next month:  I just cancel with Abundo and go my merry way.  Nothing to liquidate, nothing to transfer.  All of our assets have been in our hands all along.  Abundo charges its very inexpensive fee on a monthly basis, like paying for most typical services.  All of this make it a great model for folks that feel reasonably comfortable doing financial transactions but find themselves having important questions they'd like expert advice on.

All that said, I would love to see Abundo offer a second tier of service someday, where we could authorize them to directly do the (infrequent) trading on our behalf, should we wish to do that.   That would take care of those of us who are uncomfortable-with or uninterested-in learning how to work the gears of financial institutions.

Having a good financial advisor is necessary in order to navigate all the complexities in the financial world, especially when planning for retirement. Right out of the gate, Mike and Jason asked pertinent questions about us in order to customize a financial plan that would safely get us to retirement and carry us into and through our “golden years.”   Through the use of several models and what if scenarios, Jason was able to demonstrate to us that from a financial aspect we were on the right track to not only reach our goals but exceed them in order to comfortably retire to the lifestyle that we were hoping to achieve.  Their models took everything into consideration – lifestyle and spending habits, health insurance and Medicare, social security, life insurance, and long-term care needs, if necessary, taxes, monetary gifts to our children and grandchildren, and fluctuations in the market.
Mike and Jason, after careful analyzation of our investments, formulated a rebalancing of our funds that would afford us better returns while minimizing exposures. Mike and Jason demonstrated to us how and when withdrawals from our accounts are to be managed so they do not expose us to excessive taxes or fees.
We meet at least twice a year with Mike and Jason to review our plan, and to adjust our financial plan strategy if required. And both are always available to answer questions through email or the phone should they arise.
They introduced us to a consultant who has helped us and continues to assist us with our health insurance needs. We plan to collaborate with an attorney that Mike and Jason are recommending in order to update and redo our estate plans.
DVB is really a one-stop shop for all your financial planning needs.  Mike, Jason, and Justine are overseeing every aspect of our financial future.  We have confidence in their advice and in the decisions we’ve made because of their advice.

Amir and I met once per month until he revoked his availability to quarterly only.  As soon as it was clear that I would not be scaling up to his asset management services, Amir complained about "losing money" working with me because he felt he was using too many hours servicing me - !

Having worked with CFPs in the past and unexpectedly laid-off a year from my planned retirement, I was thrilled to find Amir. I chose him for his clear and broad skill set, his engaging pitch, and technologic adeptness; and I have not been disappointed in any of these. I deeply needed expert help to understand if it was safe to stop working, how to plan for retirement withdrawals, and to model investment what-ifs going forward that included whether or not to purchase a second property.

Unfortunately, Amir's "Unlimited Hours of Financial Planning," as it turns out in the fine print, have explicit hour limits that are determined by Amir. During onboarding I provided a detailed view of my financial status and existing plan, which happened to have been created and delivered on the same software platform that Amir uses. so there was minimal startup burden and an instant shared language.

I was conscious of constantly being "sold to" (long-term care insurance planning, his tax planning, etc.) but overlooked it. The first true concern was that Amir was surprised that I wanted a written financial plan. Other than that all I would have is a bunch of emails summarizing what we had discussed in our calls. The real problem is that he refused to provide a second version without a 2nd property purchase, stating "If you never got the 2nd home and had a more aggressive asset allocation and only traveled on "good" market return years, the 2 scenarios would be pretty similar."

So, NOT unlimited hours, hours as determined by Amir as provider. This is not what I consider to be in my best fiduciary interest at all.
