advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®
review_text_raw:
As a 53-year-old woman looking ahead to retirement, I knew I needed more than just vague financial advice—I needed a solid plan and a partner to guide me. Fully Financial, and specifically Ben and Cody, turned out to be exactly what I was searching for.

From the moment we sat down, I felt at ease. Our planning meetings were anything but rushed. Ben and Cody dove deeply into my financial situation, asking questions, listening carefully, and explaining strategies until I was truly comfortable. Their patience and commitment to making sure I understood my options were genuine, and they never glossed over the details. Instead, they empowered me, showing how each decision could impact my future. It felt like a team effort, with no pressure, only clear guidance.

What really stood out was their holistic approach. They carefully examined my work-related benefits, spotting opportunities I hadn’t noticed, like optimizing my 401(k) and taking advantage of employer perks I’d overlooked. They even explained how best to manage my health savings account and maximize tax advantages. I came away feeling like I was finally making the most of what I had earned.

Beyond that, they extended their support in unexpected ways. When I needed some financial court documents notarized, they didn’t hesitate to help. This went beyond typical financial planning and showed me they cared about my whole financial journey, not just my investments. It was clear that my well-being was their priority.

Of course, the core of our work together was planning for my long-term goals. I shared my dreams of traveling and sending my son to my college alma mater, and Ben and Cody crafted an investment strategy that balanced growth and security. They explained how it could evolve with me, making me feel prepared for the road ahead. Their advice was not only about returns but about how to enjoy my retirement without worry.

Fully Financial isn’t just about managing money; they’re about understanding the life behind the numbers. Thanks to Ben and Cody’s thoughtful guidance, I now look forward to retirement with genuine excitement. If you’re seeking planners who care deeply about your future and will support you every step of the way, I can’t recommend them enough!

We started working with Zack about 5 years ago and were immediately impressed with his comprehensive knowledge of financial markets. My wife and I both work in finance and valued Zack’s fee-only approach, especially after seeing other advisors put their clients in high-fee, commission-based products throughout the years. Zack helped us create a simple, effective plan that allowed us to meet our required return without getting overwhelmed in the process. We also value Zack’s Christian approach with his practice. He helped us prioritize charitable giving in our plan, which was a goal we struggled to meet prior to working with him. He is a man of high character and I would recommend him to anyone looking for financial advice!

My husband and I were looking for a financial planning team that would be a trusted fiduciary and offer fair billing.
When you are planning retirement, it is important that your financial planners know your thoughts, dreams, resources and plans.
We met and worked together with Sarah and Jim Charles, Sanctuary Financial Planning. The fact that Jim and Sarah took the time to listen to our plans and helped guide us greatly eased the trepidations that we held about retirement planning.
We had long held frustrations with holdings that we were unsure of how to handle or even get a straight answer from the plan manager.  Jim and Sarah provided us with details and support about what our options were and how we could proceed.
We are now in a much better frame of mind about our retirement plans.
Working with Jim and Sarah is a true pleasure, and we look forward to continuing as we move into actual retirement and beyond.

For that I'm extremely grateful and indeed impressed with both Holly and BMM. So this then is a most hearty thumbs up.

advisor_name: Michael R. Acosta, CFP®, ChFC®, CSLP®
review_text_raw: My husband and I were four years into a comfortable retirement last October when student loan payments resumed and we were faced with a crushing amount of student loan debt and unmanageable monthly payments on limited incomes. Although I'd read and researched everything I could to find solutions to our desperate dilemma, I could find no viable answer, even after talking repeatedly with our loan servicer. It wasn't until we were introduced to Michael with his extensive knowledge and expertise about the federal student loan system as a Certified Student Loan Professional that we were able to see some light and hope at the end of a very dark tunnel. Michael was able to guide us through the morass of changing student loan initiatives, explain confusing and convoluted regulations and requirements, and provide sound advice based on his experience. He was also tireless in his efforts to help us find a way to reduce the unwieldy monthly payments we were facing. Our original goal in seeking Michael's assistance was just to get our payments to a manageable amount for us. However, through Michael's dogged persistence and insistence on looking into every possible option for relief for us, he was able to uncover our eligibility for Public Service Loan Forgiveness. With his help and guidance, we navigated our way through a year of unexpected twists, turns, setbacks and uncertainty to finally be informed that we were eligible for complete student loan forgiveness due to my husband's extensive career in public service. While we had looked at the PSLF program initially as an option, it was Michael's understanding of the intricacies of the program that helped make it work for us. How any regular people can navigate the convoluted and undecipherable student loan regulations and environment alone is an unfortunate mystery. We could not have done it and reached a better than hoped for resolution without Michael Acosta's knowledge, expertise and persistence. Thank you, Michael!

As the Director of the B-Smart Entrepreneurship program supporting early-stage entrepreneurs, I had the pleasure of working with Zenith Wealth Partners for a financial forecasting and fundraising workshop. The comprehensive spreadsheet they provided was a great resource. Nate’s ability to connect with the group made a complex and often intimidating topic feel more accessible. I was not happy with my previous advisor. Then I met Flavio, he put my mind at ease, made me feel  like an actual person not just someone investing my money. Felt like I have known him all my life. Very happy with my decision! I highly recommend him. I have referred 2 people to him already! Thanks Flavio

I can’t recommend Endeavor Advisors enough as my investment manager. Their team really took the time to understand my goals and created a strategy that fits me perfectly. My communication with them has been top-notch, and their market insights have consistently led to great results for me. I truly feel like they’re partners in my financial journey, always prioritizing my success.

My wife and I have been looking for a local/fee only financial advisor for months, until we found Daniel.  Daniel truly is a rare find.  We are fortunate to be partnering with him.  Daniel is very approachable and flexible. He takes time to know you and your needs, he asks well crafted questions, and he listens intently to personalize and stress test a custom plan that suits our unique needs and circumstances.    Thanks to Daniel, we now have full confidence in our plan. I recommend Daniel as your "co-pilot" in your retirement planning journey.

Chelsea and Fahmin have been amazing ! They are very knowledgeable and provided a clear picture of my financial situation and a strategy around how I can achieve my financial goals. Most financial advisors focus on commissionable products but Zenith focuses on you and how you can improve your financial situation. Thank you Zenith! Highly recommend!

I have been with PAX for several years, beginning with Bryan Wing, who was always friendly, knowledgeable and trustworthy.   I can say the same about my current advisor, Laura Simpson.  Experiencing a sudden job displacement during Covid was disheartening, but Laura's wise counsel allowed us to put a plan in place to where I could rest easier.  Even though I am now back at work, honest discussions have continued and due to her suggestions, I will now retire earlier than expected.  I'm grateful not only for her wisdom and integrity, but for her kind nature and caring spirit. How fortunate I am to have her in my corner.
John has been a great help. This is the guy you can trust with your money and  watch it grow. Truly genuine gentleman and always watching out your back.

So thankful for Tim and Dawn at Eagle Ridge. It is a true feel good to know someone has your best interests at heart. It makes so much sense and it is a true feel good to have my financial planning and tax planning handled by people who listen, care and follow through.

We've been working with Vishal and Tushar for a decade now. We trust them with not only our larger long term investments but have also over the years run nearly every financial decision by them. Nothing is too big or too small. We've an open, honest and mutually respectful relationship and trust them implicitly. We've recommended many of our friends to them over the years and  look forward to nurturing our relationship with Twin Peaks for many more years to come.

So thankful for Tim and Dawn at Eagle Ridge. It is a true feel good to know someone has your best interests at heart. It makes so much sense and it is a true feel good to have my financial planning and tax planning handled by people who listen, care and follow through.

Working with Jeremy has been an absolute game changer! I always felt overwhelmed by financial matters, but he has made dealing with numbers easy and stress-free. Jeremy is not only extremely knowledgeable but also patient in explaining everything clearly, making sure I understand each step of the process.

Jeremy has consistently provided insightful advice and helped me make confident, informed decisions about my financial future. Beyond expertise, he is approachable, reliable, and truly great to work with. I recommend The Hourly Advisor highly enough for anyone looking to take control of their finances with a trusted professional by their side!

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: When Justin and his team decided to start up Peek Wealth, there was no question we would move our portfolio and pivot with him to his new practice.  He consistently provides stellar guidance and makes time to consult and catch-up several times a year (or whenever we seek financial advice!). His team is smart, creative and a great group of people we wholeheartedly put our trust in to help us achieve our long-term financial goals.

I met Rob through my accountant, who is also part of Rob’s group, Birdseye wealth management. I was thinking of retiring and my accountant suggested I meet with Rob. A couple weeks later we all met and Rob and Brendan laid out a plan for me and assured me I was on the right track financially. They reviewed my needs and plans for the future. Rob keeps in touch with me and guides me through the constantly changing investment landscape and is always available to answer any questions I have or to discuss various investment options. The whole team at Birds Eye financial are amazing to work with and are knowledgeable, friendly and accessible. I am so happy I decided to work with Rob, and…he also knows where all the best pizza joints are!
We feel very lucky to be working with Twin Peaks Wealth Advisors. Everyone on their team is thoughtful, knowledgeable, kind, patient, and engaging.

I have worked with Meredith since 2019. Highly recommend her. She is both numbers-smart and people-smart, meaning she really listens to you and tailors strategy based on your goals. She is a great communicator, with a special talent for distilling financial situations into clear, concise terms.

I've been Matt's client for nearly fifteen years. He and his team are knowledgable, experienced, and singularly focussed on client success. I highly recommend this team to anyone seeking a secure financial future.
Truly the most attentive service- Melody is organized, motivated, and friendly. We happily trust her with all of our financial decisions!

We have worked with Melody for several years and it has been great. She meets with us quarterly and goes through our situation and explains our options clearly. Even though she has moved out of state, we see no difference in her service.  We are hoping she will transition us into our retirement years seamlessly.
Covenant Wealth Advisors has been wonderful to help us plan for the future and retirement.  They are excellent at what they do and obviously care about you as a person.  I highly recommend them.

Melody has been a wonderful financial advisor. She has my best interests at heart and guides me in my investment decisions wisely. She is very pro-active and schedules regular meetings with me to know if my goals are being met and how to improve returns on my investments. Due to her advice I have been getting a good income from them. The service she provides is far better than any other advisor I have had. I am so happy I moved my portfolio to her. I highly recommend her.

Melody is an experienced advisor that I trust mine and my family's financial well being too. She's understanding of our needs and able to help with the earliest stages that I am in to nearing retirement like my parents.

Melody Brady with Beechmont Financial has gone above and beyond to help secure my family's financial future. Her guidance has helped to improve our current financial position and long-term plan for a full and comfortable retirement. Her customer service has far exceeded that of the other financial advisors with whom we've worked. I cannot provide a more full-throated endorsement of Melody and Beechmont.

I was thoroughly impressed with the service I've received from The Hourly Advisor! They took a holistic look into my finances and provided me with a detailed plan to help me achieve all of my financial goals and prepare for the future. Unlike other financial planners that take a commission of my earnings, The Hourly Advisor incorporates a flat fee structure which I really appreciate. 10/10 would recommend!!

My experience with Zenith Wealth Partners has been exceptional. Nate goes above and beyond to ensure he is prepared and providing you with a wealth of knowledge. He strives to ensure his clients achieve their financial, professional and personal goals. In order to provide the highest level of service to his clients, he aims to be sure we are on target to meet our financial goals. I look forward to continuing being serviced by ZWP and their team.

Amazing Financial Advisor!
I recently switched to Jeremy from another advisor, and I couldn’t be happier with my decision. Not only does he provide better advice, but his services cost a fraction of the price. He’s incredibly fair! He takes a quiet and thoughtful approach to responding, the advice he offers is always on point. It is evident that Jeremy truly wants to help his clients on their financial journey. Because of this, I have shared information about his services with my friends and family. Jeremy’s professionalism and expertise have made a huge difference in my financial planning. Highly recommend!

I have worked with Stephan Shipe for several years, and I have been very pleased with the detailed financial plan he provided to me. While my hope was to find someone that could help make sure I stayed on track, I have in fact gained much more than that over the years.  His patience in providing financial education each year has been invaluable.  In addition, the entire team at Scholar Financial Advising are incredibly helpful and very professional.

I’ve known Lauren for many years.  Throughout her career, she's developed a reputation for being the best financial advisor for healthcare workers. As a Nurse Practitioner, I appreciate other professionals who have a mastery in the craft.  If you're considering working with an advisor and happen to be healthcare worker, you're in the right place for great financial guidance.

We have been with PAX for approximately 7 years, and we recommend them to everyone we know. We discovered them through our Dave Ramsey studies, and we were so impressed by their ability to comfortably counsel us with very important investment decisions. Charles Garcia is our advisor, and we feel like he cares deeply about our financial peace and comfortable lifestyle. He listens carefully, he jokes with us, he provides different perspectives, he challenges us - he realizes what makes us happy while also making sure we are making smart decisions. He explains options clearly -  in a language everyone can understand. We look forward to our meetings, and we are always proud to report our progress to him - he has made the journey to retirement fun for us. Not many people can say that about their financial advisor! We highly recommend PAX - life changing!
ProserPlan Wealth is an wonderful place filled with amazing people who are with you every step of the way. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone who is reading this!!!

advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®
review_text_raw: Ben and Cody were exactly the right team to help our family at a difficult time. They are both absolute professionals and handled our situation with compassion, thoughtfulness, and clarity (and humor!). We feel confident that we made the right choice to work with Fully Financial. After talking to Ben and Cody, we feel empowered to make the right financial decisions for our family and know we can trust their advice in the future. I cannot recommend Fully Financial highly enough.
Very professional service. Got me better than what I expected.

My husband and I had not worked with professional advisors until earlier this year when Covenant was recommended to us for retirement strategy consultation. We are so pleased with Matt, Adam, and Marleigh and grateful for their wisdom and infinite patience. We sleep easier knowing we have experts watching over us!
Always keeps me in the loop and updated.  Really cares about his clients! I highly recommend

I was referred to Lauren as their best Kaiser retirement person and she didn't disappoint. She presented me all my options in a no pressure manner. I made my decision and she made the transactions with ease.
She continues to communicate with strategies and adjustments.
When my coworkers found out about how easy it was and how much my portfolio has increased I am asked for her number frequently.

Chris's integrity is impeccable. He is straightforward, honest, and his commitment to being a proactive financial advisor is stellar. He is an excellent listener, compassionate, and demonstrates great understanding of your financial needs and goals. You can always count on his advice to be clear, relevant, and prudent.

I have been working with Chris at Impact Fiduciary for about a year now, and am really pleased with not only the financial outcomes, but also the level of care, kindness, and professionalism in his approach. I really appreciate all the tools that have been passed along to me and the personalized plans and guidance. I feel listened to and have learned a lot about personal finances, at all levels. I also am glad to know that my investments are aligned with my values and that I can trust where my dollar is going. I am happy I chose Impact while searching for a fiduciary, and would highly recommend!

Brett and I recently worked together in a focused session. He is excellent at actively listening and individualizing his planning and advice to fit our family's needs and goals. His logical and linear thinking helped keep complex topics clear and concise. Thank you, Brett for your help!

Frank (and his partner, Jenn) have been helping my wife and I manage our investments and plan for our future retirement for about six years.  They have listened to our vision for our future and ask a lot of questions to make sure we’re considering things we hadn’t necessarily thought of (such as long-term care insurance) and work out a plan to help us reach our goals.  They are very patient in explaining the thought process behind their plan and always make time to hop on a call to talk about questions we have or potential changes to our vision.  He has also taken time on several occasions to offer advice on investments that he’s not managing for us.

David Dodd at The Other 90 Financial, LLC is fantastic! As a fee-only fiduciary, he’s focused on what’s best for his clients, not selling products. He really knows his stuff when it comes to retirement and tax planning, and the personalized plan he created for me has saved me a ton and set me up for the future. No pressure, no sales pitches—just solid advice. If you want a financial advisor you can trust, I highly recommend David!

My husband recently retired.  We decided to invest his pension and retirement assets with David Dodd and The Other 90 Financial, LLC. This turned out to be one of the best decisions of our lives!

David is so honest and trustworthy. He informs us immediately with any changes to our account. He also explains everything thoroughly.  David is the only person we would have trusted with our retirement. He cares about all of his clients deeply and he treats your money as if it was his own.

If you are looking to invest in your retirement David is a great option. For my husband and I, he was the only option.  We are very pleased with his services and retirement planning expertise!
ProsperPlan is my go to financial security planning. They know what they’re doing here and are very professional and knowledgeable.

Earlier this year, I began trusting Matt and Adam with my financial future and I have nothing but positive accolades to share. They exude honesty and integrity. They have deep market knowledge and significant experience in various economic cycles. No question is too ‘dumb’ and they take the time to make sure you are comfortable with and understand the plan. They treat you like family. Meg R

We reached out to Daniel to help us navigate the transition from the earning phase of life into the first years of complete retirement. Daniel is knowledgeable and listens well. My husband and I have different approaches and concerns about our finances. Daniel's questions and insights help us greatly. Daniel is very approachable, knowledgeable and responsive to the different financial habits that people have. I strongly recommend his services.

Chris Grellas stands out as a financial advisor who puts his clients' interests first, combining expertise with genuine care. His ethical approach and Christian values shine through in every interaction, creating a foundation of trust. With Chris at the helm, clients can feel confident navigating their financial journeys, knowing they have a knowledgeable and honest partner by their side.

Sources

My family has worked with BMM successfully for 20 years. More recently Scott guided me through Medicare and Social Security planning. When it came time to retire 2 years ago, we had extensive conversations how the pieces of the puzzle would best set me up in years to follow. I don’t hesitate to recommend BMM for financial planning and investment needs!
Hazel is compassionate, knowledgeable and smart. The perfect combination to guide me through financial decisions for myself and family.

Working with the Reston team you'll see that they deliver on all of the expectation that their clients value in their approach to financial planning.  I highly recommend Covenant Wealth Advisors if you are looking for a high quality firm for your financial planning.

I've known Daniel for years before he started Masuda Lehrman Wealth. Since then, we have both grown largely in our respective careers. I was previously working with Facet and had discontinued that relationship as I felt that they we had reached a limit to how much they could help and the added value they could bring to my financial life. I reached out to Daniel when I found out he was starting his own wealth management company initially to support a friend. However, Daniel has shown me, over the past few months that there was still room to grow in my financial literacy, expanding my wealth portfolio, and planning for the future. Even better, he has special certifications with student loan borrowers which has been INVALUABLE. He has been very accessible, friendly as always, and knowledgeable. I recommend him to anyone looking for a financial advisor no matter what walk of life they are in. His advice and services are bespoke, keeping in mind the small nuances of life, actionable, and specific.
Dan can also help you with other things besides financial advising he helped me and my family get a trust set up for me and my Family. Dan made the process easy

I just love these folks!  They are a "wealth" of knowledge and have a strong desire to help you to live your life to the fullest with what you've worked and saved for all your life.  They're always available to answer any questions and address any problem(s) you may encounter.  Can't say enough good stuff about them.  Joyce B

I've been a client of this firm's leadership for about 20 years and can wholeheartedly recommend them for their professionalism, knowledge of the market, and time/attention they give to each of their clients.  In addition to them being proactive through portfolio updates and management, they are always responsive to any questions (however 'dumb' the questions may be) I have had always leave me feeling secure about my family's financial future.

I partnered with Berkshire Money Management primarily to get peace of mind as I worked my way through some significant financial decisions and in preparation for retirement. They have provided not only peace of mind, but the confidence that my assets are in good hands. Quarterly reviews with my financial advisor assure me that BMM has my interests in mind. And if my advisor has any question about his advice or if I have questions he cannot answer, there are several others in the organization that are ready to jump in. BMM is also a fiduciary, which is very important to me. I highly recommend BMM.

Frank is a knowledgeable and amazing financial advisor. He has delivered clear and comprehensive guidance to me and my wife for many years with the highest level of integrity.
We have continued to find his personal yet professional approach always reassuring.
Frank is articulate, responsive, respectful, trustworthy, intelligent, a great listener and always available for questions.
Frank has made an enormous difference to me and my wife’s financial life and future having handled some complex situations regarding pensions, transfers, etc.
We consider Frank a very important part of our lives and are grateful and thankful for his expertise and service.

Frank has been our financial advisor for so many years that I have lost count. Through his sound advice and council our investment results have met our retirement lifestyle financial needs, while also providing portfolio value stability and growth.

He is like a family member who knows and takes interest in our family’s personal and financial goals.

I am confident and trust that Frank and Talisman Wealth Advisors are committed to our shared wealth management vision.

Jenn has been an incredible advisor, guiding me through both marriage and divorce over the past 10 years with equal grace and strategic insight. Her non-judgmental approach and ability to meet me exactly where I am have been invaluable. She doesn't overwhelm with financial jargon; instead, she speaks in layman's terms and is clear, patient, and compassionate.

From the start, her approach has been completely personalized—she took the time (a lot of time!) to understand exactly what matters most to me personally, rather than giving me conventional advice or a one-size-fits-all plan. Even though, at the beginning, I wasn't sure what I wanted, Jenn asked all the right questions to help me prioritize my wants and needs for now and well into the future.

Jennifer is truly exceptional at what she does and a rare find! She's brilliant, and you won’t find another advisor who cares as deeply as she does, all while possessing an impressive breadth and depth of knowledge. I’m incredibly grateful to have Jenn in my corner!

My wife and I found Patrick because he had the only resource, a YouTube video, on a tax law that had specific details for Georgia. There was something about the way he presents himself that gives off an honest and trustworthy vibe. Still with our guard up, we booked a consultation and peppered him with our scenario and questions. He answered then all our questions accurately and honestly.

Patrick is a fiduciary so legally has your best interest, but still, you are relying on him and his team for your hard earned money of past and future and a decision to use him, or anyone else, should not be taken lightly.

We've been customers of him since then, which is almost a year. He has advised us on our ever changing scenarios for our small business. He lays out all the options, pros and cons and even calls out minor details that are easily missed. He is very organized, keeps us on track and great with follow ups. He is a professional and takes his role as an advisor seriously, but with his easy going personality, it is almost like talking to a friend.

If you think Ironclad Wealth Management's services are a fit for you, I would not hesitate to talk to Patrick.
Nothing but a positive experience. Respectfully will take his time explaining every detail and will provide honest feedback. Highly recommend!

Kevin is an excellent financial planner. My spouse & I had already set up retirement accounts, 529s, life insurance, etc based on our own research, but we needed someone to double check our assumptions, fill in any gaps, and tie it all together into a long-term plan. Kevin's flat fee model made sense for our situation. One aspect of his approach that I particularly appreciate is his ability to tailor his coaching & advice to each individual. On matters where we were well educated, Kevin discussed with us like a true partner. On topics that we were unfamiliar with, Kevin patiently coached us. Throughout our engagement, he was gracious, professional, flagged outliers in our finances without judging our life decisions. My spouse & I walked away with much more clarity & confidence in our financial future, which is exactly what we were seeking. We felt like we not only gained a key advisor who unlocked important life goals for us, but also a new friend. Hope to see you in person someday, Kevin!

As I began tackling the transition from savings mode to distribution mode, I quickly became overwhelmed.

In searching for help, I discovered the team of Eric and Rachael Johns at EFP through their "Accessible Finance" podcasts. Their podcasts address generational financial planning topics in a casual, conservational style. Not only is this a team of skilled professionals, but they are armed with powerful software that provides scenarios for optimizing retirement planning over the life of the plan. I started working with EFP in the summer 2024.

In addition to his financial prowess and enthusiasm, Eric is a great listener, responds quickly and is highly organized. Receiving an agenda before each meeting facilitates an efficient use of time without feeling hurried. Rachael, with her background in law and education, is excellent at explaining obscure financial/tax concepts.

Equilibrium Financial Planning (EFP) has taken the stress out of retirement planning for me.

Chis is one of the most intelligent and financially literate individuals I have met. He provides very sound financial advise from a very holistic standpoint encompassing all areas of wealth building and financial preservation which is key to building generational wealth. Lots of financial advisors out there are just stock brokers trying to put you in the highest commission paying investments and not truly looking out for your best interest. Chris treats his clients as if he were giving advise to his own family which is something that the industry is seriously lacking.
Wonderful team of advisors. I work specifically with Matt, who is smart, patient, thoughtful, and generous with his attention to detail about what is the best approach for your investments.

I have been with Matt and the team for almost 20 years. I trust them with all my financial decisions and asset management. They go above and beyond to care for your family and help you achieve your goals. I have made countless referrals to this team and trust them 100%. It is great to have solid counsel on all the major milestones and decision points life and your career can throw your way.

Choosing ProsperPlan has been one of the best actions I've taken regarding my financial well-being.  I couldn't recommend Lauren and her team any higher. The knowledge and support I've received here are inspiring.  Navigating financial management and my future/retirement can be overwhelming, however, I feel confident and cared for.  I've been with other financial planning services but I didn't get the same mentoring that I have at ProsperPlan. I wish I had known about them sooner!!!

It’s difficult to put into words just how AMAZING Denise is! She exudes great personality and mastery of her art- NUMBERS. From the moment my husband and I met with her, she assured us financial freedom was not a far fetched dream. Rather,  it was  a road map in which she had in her possession. We were CLUELESS. And now I feel like a professional after working with her. If you follow Denise’s plan- you will not only meet your financial goals- but you will be profoundly successful in WHATEVER endeavors you start, long after you have graduated from her class. We can’t thank this extremely talented, warm, light hearted, PATIENT, passionate- professional enough. You’d be remiss not to have Denise on your team.

My husband and I have been with Rob for years. Before we retired he was extremely instrumental in organizing everything we had all over in different places. Now everything is easily accessible.  Meeting with him yearly going over any changes or needs makes our lives easier. He answers any phone calls or emails in a timely manner. I recommend him to all my friends and family. He is very knowledgeable and frequently sends out clarifications of what is happening in the market in layman’s terms 🙂.  He is very trustworthy and easy to work with.  Don’t miss out call him today!

Rob is our financial advisor here at American Tire & Auto Care. He manages our pension plan and all of our personal and business investment portfolios. He is always available to us and we rest easy with him overseeing our investments. He is a pleasure to work with as well being a friend.

Eric and Rachael are a dynamic power couple, that handles their clients with grace, professionalism and confidence. Their depth of knowledge rivals any large scale firm, all while maintaining the personal touch of a boutique firm. Efp will be managing my finances till death does us part. The value of their services far exceeds any other competitors I've considered.

Would give 6 stars for their professional candor if Google allowed it.

Eric's dress choices exudes professionalism beyond reproach. Which reminds me, I need to ask them where he got the red power tie from the last meeting!

advisor_name: Derek J. Delaney, CFP®, ChFC®, EA
review_text_raw: My husband and I interviewed several different financial advisors and we chose Derek. He has been exactly what we wanted - smart, thoughtful, transparent, and helpful. I have recommended Derek to a few friends and will continue to do so.

Covenant Wealth Advisors are the best at managing and assisting in any and all financial matters. I have been a client for the staff for 6 years.They handled the eatates of both my deceased parents. I am grateful they were the advisors referred to me by a neighbor in my home town.

They put a personal touch on everything they do. My advisor feels like part of the family after all these years and they have gone above and beyond in helping my family get through some difficult times. They have the financial knowledge backed by historical data coupled with legal expertise. On top of the estate assistance, they have helped me with other financial matters such as my 401k, HSA, and investment property. I would not hesitate to recommend them to anyone and have with my friends, coworkers, and family.
Love working with my team in the Reston office. The expertise, education and transparency they provide has given me all the peace of mind I could want with my finances. Highly recommend.
David is awesome. He treats you like family. He takes his time, he explains everything step by step, he shows you split screen action about everything. Always friendly and inviting. Highly recommend.

Ryan Derousseau, CFP is the best! He is professional and knowledgeable and a nice human! Hire him as soon as you can. Engaging his services has been an excellent decision for us, he has saved us both time and money. Ryan takes the time to research all our questions with promptness and speed. He is an excellent listener and has helped to guide me and our team towards a healthier financial future.

At ProsperPlan Wealth, Lauren and Chris understand the importance of wealth management and client care. I confidently recommend ProsperPlan to my clients who are looking for a financial advisory firm who understands wealth management is not just a numbers business, but a people business.

I have been working with John for decades . It started with a disability policy in the beginning of my career and progressed through life insurance, the move from hospital employee to self employed retirement planning , and now the proper strategy for my post retirement years . His guidance has helped make my retirement years financially secure .

We have really enjoyed working with Archer Investment Management. We reached out to them because we wanted financial guidance and reassurance as we move toward reaching education goals for our children and retirement goals for ourselves. We knew we needed to diversify some of our assets but had no idea how to do so in a financially savvy way. Before meeting with the Archer Team, we had concerns about the value wealth management would bring to the table. Those concerns were quickly squashed after meeting with the team. They pointed out things we hadn’t thought of and questions we hadn’t asked ourselves to help create more specific goals than we would have set for ourselves. They kindly and patiently walked us through creating a plan that fit our comfort level and helped us take the steps needed to put that plan in action. If any of this sounds overwhelming, I can’t reiterate enough how much patience and support we received. It never felt overwhelming. We are so relieved to now have the support of these specific experts to help us stay on track to hitting our goals.

advisor_name: Daniel Yerger, MBA, CFP®, ChFC®, AIF®
review_text_raw: Daniel, much of my enjoyment of the last year was a direct product of your management of my finances. What a wonderful service you provide! I'll never forget the butterflies in my stomach that day that I signed over my life savings to your care. I was hoping and praying that it wasn't going to be a huge mistake. Instead, it was one of the smartest decisions I've ever made. Now, for the first time in my adult life, money is no longer a worry. Over the last three years, you have more than proven your worth as my financial advisor. Thank you so, so much!!!

Blake is awesome. He is quickly able to understand your financial situation and comes up with multiple strategies you can implement to improve your finances. He took my stress levels from a 9 down to a 3 as he’s been helping me set up my new business.

Blake is thoughtful and so thorough with his methodology. On top of that he has a subtle but sure, dry sense of humor. The totality of which makes him the best financial advisor you could work with.

Frank has successfully handled our investment account for more than twenty years, always staying within our risk profile and allowing us to have the peace of mind knowing that our “later” years (older?) would be comfortable and without financial stress. He listens to us, and that has always been one of the most important aspects of our association.

Frank has several qualities which have helped make him successful in helping his clients achieve their goals.  Here are three key ones;
1) Character- he is someone you can trust
2) Energy- he has the energy to get the job done regardless of difficulty
3) Intelligence- Frank knows what to do and how to do it.

It's been a joy working with Chris. There is clear communication and trust in our meetings. He makes you feel confident and safe about your decisions while trying to move the needle forward,  maximizing your earning potential. After all he's a fiduciary or wizard so he's sworn by law (or magic) to protect your assets at all costs. My husband and I are very happy with our progress and only wish we met with him sooner. Anybody would be lucky to work with him and ultimately call him a friend.

I have had the pleasure of working with Lauren Williams for many years, and I cannot express enough how invaluable her expertise and dedication have been to my financial well-being. Lauren has not only helped me navigate the complexities of my investments, but she has also managed my mother's trust with the utmost care and professionalism.

From the very beginning, Lauren has taken the time to understand my financial goals and has consistently provided insightful advice tailored to my specific needs. Her deep knowledge of the financial markets, coupled with her ability to explain complex concepts in a clear and understandable way, has given me immense confidence in my financial decisions.

When it came to managing my mother’s trust, Lauren approached the task with the same level of commitment and attentiveness. She ensured that the trust was managed efficiently, respecting both my mother’s wishes and the needs of our family. Her compassionate and thoughtful is really helping to get things in order for my mom as she gets older.

Lauren’s professionalism, combined with her genuine care for her clients, sets her apart from others in the industry. She has always been readily available to answer my questions, address concerns, and provide guidance whenever needed. I am truly grateful for the peace of mind she has given me over the years.

I highly recommend Lauren Williams to anyone seeking a knowledgeable, trustworthy, and dedicated financial advisor. Her many years of experience and her unwavering commitment to her clients make her an exceptional partner in managing financial investments and trusts.
Great team with exceptional expertise helping you manage and invest your funds. I highly recommend working with them!

advisor_name: Michael R. Acosta, CFP®, ChFC®, CSLP®
review_text_raw: My wife and I are both healthcare workers in our 30s dealing with student loan debt, a mortgage, 401ks, Roth IRAs, and other pretty normal things for people in our demographic. We considered enlisting the help of a financial advisor for a long time prior to pulling the trigger with Michael and Brady. Michael and Brady assured us that they could help us develop a plan to strategically pay off debt while optimizing our investments and protecting ourselves from financial risk. These guys are the real deal. They helped us understand difficult concepts and navigate the confusing, paper-work filled world of getting our finances streamlined and optimized. If you are reading this, you are probably weighing the pros and cons of spending money on a service designed to preserve your money. You may be wondering if these services are worth it. The answer is a clear and resounding “yes”. The amount of education these guys imparted upon us left us feeling like we had taken a course PLUS they even take the hassle out of much of the legwork associated with restructuring financial matters. We feel very fortunate and comfortable to have Michael and Brady in our corner and actively recommend them to our friends. They are passionate about what they do and they have a gift for making this stuff easy to understand. Most importantly, they are honest experts.

As a private business owner in the mental health field, I realized I needed professional guidance to help me make sound financial decisions for my business. Ryan has been attentive in answering all of my financial and business questions. He is very diligent at seeking the answers when research is needed. He is trustworthy and reliable. He has provided me with great suggestions and I have been implementing them gradually. I am very thankful for his professional guidance. I recommend Ryan’s services to those small business owners who have questions about their finances but also need a personalized and warm approach to financial growth.

Working with PAX has been a breath of fresh air!  We have worked with a financial planner for over 20 years.  We recently moved from Merril Lynch. The service and "hands on" help has been amazing.  I was nervous to move but now I see how our old FP was just getting us by.  We are actually making steps from the encouragement/advise that our advisor, Laura, is providing us.  We are now moving into the PIVOT planning program they offer since we are small business owners, and we are looking forward to what we learn from this process as well.
Joseph and his team are always so kind, knowledgeable and ethical.  They are thorough and can answer any question I have AND I’ve made money thru the years!  Isnt that the point??
I’m so grateful to PAX for their financial guidance.  They take the worry out of investing

Allen presented different scenarios, complete with supporting data and in-depth analysis, tailored to address my concerns, goals and objectives.  He went through each option, and we discussed which made the most sense for me.  Allen’s advice was instrumental in providing me peace of mind.  I also appreciate his regular investment reviews to determine if I am still on track or if any adjustments are needed. Allen also provided assistance by reviewing my personal insurance coverage.  I highly recommend 7 Saturdays Financial.
Flavio is always available to answer any questions you have. He gets back to you quickly. We feel confident that he is going to invest our money wisely

I have been working with FFG and in particular, Trevor Scotto, for a number of years and can honestly say, they are the best.  I worked with several financial advisors in the past and continued to be frustrated with their inability to work with a investor who made it clear that their investment portfolio was as much about socially and environmentally focused choices as it was maximizing profits.  Not only do I have conversations with  Trevor and the FFG team on a regular basis, I know I can reach out to them at any time with a question or a concern and they are on top of it immediately.  In addition to providing great financial consulting, they are resource rich when it comes to needing other financial consulting.  They helped me find a terrific mortgage broker who saved us thousands of dollars on a complicated refinance and a wonderful Estate Planning lawyer who guided us through a  challenging planning process for a blended family.  Finally, collaborating with Trevor has yielded a very strong return on investment.  One simply can't go wrong with this group.  They listen, they advise, they provide solid research, respond quickly, and give honest insight utilizing a variety of well established sources.  They also patiently do all of the above and help you deal with the technology for self empowerment and understand the variety of investment possibilities. They make you feel you are their only client and not only one of a mass of investors.

I got  in on the ground floor with Fiduciary Financial Group in 2016 when I was referred to Richard Davey and subsequently, Trevor Scotto by my former financial advisor, and I have never looked back. It is one thing to possess all the necessary education and post-name initials that qualify you to do a job. But it is rare to find a high level of expertise that those degrees confer combined with character, honesty, professionalism, and integrity. Richard and Trevor are “hands on” and worked hard to understand my goals and my risk tolerance in developing a wealth management plan. They educate regularly, and they actually encourage questions and regular portfolio review. They are proactive, personable, accessible, and caring. They are there when you need them. They have now also assembled a “deep bench” of professionals who offer accounting services, tax planning and prep, as well as estate planning. They have done excellent work for me. I recommend them highly.

advisor_name: Michael R. Acosta, CFP®, ChFC®, CSLP®
review_text_raw: Michael Acosta has been my financial advisor for approximately three years and has done an excellent job in guiding me through the evaluation process of my previous portfolio and his recommended changes.  He advised me to create a pension for myself that would generate a lifetime of income--something I had not considered when I was investing on my own--that would be accessible immediately or in the future.  My investments were reallocated to those that are not engaged in immoral activities; thus, allowing me to sleep peacefully, knowing that I am investing in companies that I would be proud to own.  Michael meets with me regularly to review my portfolio and to make any adjustments that we jointly feel are necessary.  Should I ever have additional questions, he is always readily available.  After our meetings, he sends me a detailed synopsis with next steps that I have to take.  I highly recommend Michael for anyone looking for an advisor who is knowledgeable and trustworthy.  He is a man of high moral integrity and someone you can trust to guide you through market complexity and volatility.

The FFG team are such great advisors and partners to work with from everything to asset management to estate and tax planning.  I've been with them for years and the level of service is beyond what any other firm has ever provided to me.  Highly recommend FFG.
