Allen has helped us to consider additional factors in our retirement prep and helped us to focus our thinking. He has been a huge help to us, and we definitely already feel significantly more confident in our retirement plan and better prepared for the actual retirement. I highly recommend him and 7 Saturdays Financial.

I started with Ryan because of growth in my group private practice. Ryan has provided, in the moment support, as I worked on wage models and financial concerns in my private practice. Alongside his help with practice growth, he has been a great support in helping my family strengthen our vision for our short and long term financial goals. We find his support valuable and he takes initiative in also helping us to challenge ourselves. One initial bit of advice from him was that we are on a solidly good track to our retirement goals. He has stretched our imaginations while also providing continued reassurance that we are already on a good path. I wish we had started with him many years ago! I encourage others to trust his financial wisdom! You will find he cares in a genuine manner while assisting you with your own plans!

My Husband and I were in a unique situation. We needed advice how to best pay off debt while also creating future cash flow with our current investments given some current life circumstances. We were not looking for a fee based advisor as it didn't fit our needs. Chris was recommended to us via a specific network of hourly based advisors. The help and guidance that Chris gave us was of tremendous value and positioned us to be in a much better situation financially. The value Chris gave us for the rate we paid was exactly what we needed and fit into our budget perfectly. We will be reaching out to Chris in the future as our financial situation changes and stabilizes in order to set up future investment plans.

I had a great experience working with Zenith Wealth Partners, specifically with Chelsea and Raeonna. They are extremely knowledgeable and took the time to help me with financial planning and investment advice during a transitional period in my career. Raeonna answered all of my questions, making sure I fully understood my new budget and how I could further optimize my spending habits as I searched for a new job.  Both Chelsea and Raeonna were very professional and regularly go above and beyond to ensure I’m fully understanding their financial planning and investment recommendations and how they will benefit my financial future. I would highly recommend Zenith Wealth Partners for their expertise and excellent customer service!

I feel at ease knowing that Brian is my financial advisor. He takes the time to explain everything to me in layman terms. I highly recommend Brian & Twin Peaks Wealth Advisors for your investment needs!
Patrick & Ironclad Wealth Management have become trusted wealth advisors to our entire family. I highly recommend Patrick if you are considering engaging a financial advisor.

I was impressed during my initial consultation by Ryan's approach to looking at my financial situation from a holistic perspective. I was in the process of transitioning my business from a group practice psychotherapy service to a solo practice psychotherapy / life coaching service. Ryan's initial approach as a financial advisor was to help me create a comprehensive plan for managing my money in all areas of my personal and professional finances by taking an in-depth look at my income, assets, debts, investments, and goal setting. This approach felt supportive, educational and empowering - all elements that are important while in a life transition.

advisor_name: Jonathan Owens, CFP®, CEPA®, AIF®, AEP®
review_text_raw: We have been very happy since moving our portfolio to your firm. We appreciate the time that you have spent with us to come up with a plan that works for us!

I've known Mr. Derousseau for almost thirty years. He gives practical advice that are tailored to my financial goals while account for my lifestyle and risk tolerance. I am very grateful that I made the switch from a big brokerage firm that wasn't giving me much for more than Mr. Derousseau's rates. He also takes the time to make sure you understand your investment strategy and always has time to answer my calls and emails.

As a new private practice owner I wasn't sure how to prioritize where to allocate revenue. How much should go toward retirement? Emergency Savings? Taxes? My business? Ryan helped develop a plan that provided a lot of clarity and peace of mind, looking on a longer time horizon. When I sit down each month to allocate monthly revenue I now do so with confidence and joy rather than anxiety and uncertainty. I think any private practice owner would benefit from this service!

Working with David has been awesome! His superior knowledge and experience in crypto and alternative investments was unlike anyone we've ever met! He's also honest and easy to talk to with a great sense of humor. We've been very pleased
David is the best guy to go to for wealth management. He has been there every step of the way for all my major financial decisions. Wouldn’t trust anyone else.

Ryan is super patient and clear and has demystified the saving/investing process for me. The experience has been educational and empowering, especially as a self-employed recent college grad managing my finances for the first time.

I learned about Ryan through a training sponsored by Spruce Health. I came to him a complete financial wreck. I have always been less than stellar with money management. Recently, I took on starting my own counseling business and realized I needed adult supervision to reach my goals and gain accountability. Ryan is very professional, nonjudgmental, and very knowledgeable in the services he provides. He is focusing on my strengths and providing honest feedback, insight, and suggestions. He is respectful in working with me within my current situation and considers where I’m at when he provides his feedback. I highly recommend Ryan for anybody looking for financial guidance no matter what situation you are currently in. Ryan’s expertise and approach is exactly what I need to get me where I want to go.

Jeff helped get us on track with spending, budgeting, and saving, and helped provide us with the tools we needed to make progress towards our goals. He exhibited excellent communication skills, did research on things we didn't know where to find information on, provided clear, concise presentations of his finding, and thoroughly informed us of how our decision making with rather ambiguous details from us would impact our financial plans. I highly recommend working with Jeff if you need advice on how to take control of your finances, learning how to manage your money, make wise investment decisions, and work toward your goals. Jeff is also very personable, and you can be sure to have a positive interaction with him. Money well spent!

Trevor Scotto and the group at Fiduciary Financial have been amazing financial advisors and tax preparers. They are trustworthy and take time to listen and help with all your financial planning needs. Couldn’t recommend them more!

We have used Twin Peaks since they opened. Our advisor, Brian Nguyen is amazing! He has guided our investments and has been spot on! He’s professional, honest and personable. We love him! We have recommended Brian and will continue to do so.
Smart, patient, & funny advisor!

Lake Water is an excellent firm to work with. Dan is knowledgeable and always answers questions with the heart of a teacher. If you’re looking for personalized, high quality, and uncomplicated financial planning, give Lake Water a call!

Mike has been my financial advisor for several years. He makes suggestions on the best way to invest my money but ultimately leaves the decision up to me. He has helped me with converting money from my company 401K and stock accounts to my IRA when I retired and continues to work with me on the best way to manage my retirement income. On a personal level, he is always polite, easy to talk to, and has a good sense of humor.

advisor_name: Michael R. Acosta, CFP®, ChFC®, CSLP®
review_text_raw:
We have been working with Michael Acosta for some time now, and we couldn't be happier with the experience. Here are a few reasons why we highly recommend him:

- Extensive Knowledge Base: Michael has an impressive understanding of all financial situations. Whether it's student loans questions, retirement planning, investment strategies, or tax advice, he always provides insightful and well-informed guidance.

- Comprehensive Feedback: After every meeting, we receive detailed feedback that helps us understand our financial standing and the steps we need to take next. This level of thoroughness gives us great confidence in our financial planning.

- Approachable and Easy to Talk To: Discussing finances is stressful for us, but Michael makes it a breeze. He is approachable, listens carefully, and always ensures our concerns are addressed.

- Simplifies Complex Concepts: My wife often feels overwhelmed when it comes to financial discussions. However, she actually looks forward to our meetings because Michael has a unique ability to break down complex financial situations into simple, easy-to-understand terms. This has made a world of difference for us and our financial goals.

Overall, Michael has exceeded our expectations in every way. If you're looking for someone who is knowledgeable, thorough, and easy to work with, we highly recommend him!

advisor_name: Michael R. Acosta, CFP®, ChFC®, CSLP®
review_text_raw: I am a physician and started working with Michael when I was in medical training. He has guided me through best choices for my future at varying levels of income. He takes the time to explain why he is recommending a specific strategy, incorporates my goals as the primary driver of decisions, and personalizes his recommendations to my situation. Michael is always up to date on changes with student loans, which has happened multiple times in the previous years, and projects my savings based on what he is recommending. I am very happy with how my accounts have grown under his advice and cannot recommend him enough.

I've worked with TPWA for many years now, and I've always been very pleased with the service I receive.  They've always been immediately responsive to questions and requests, available and open whenever I'd like to review things.  They have demonstrated excellent knowledge in financial planning and investing strategies, with an exceptional ability to tailor that to my evolving goals and circumstances.  Highly recommend this team!

I became a Cordant client in Jan. 2024 and have been impressed with the firm so far. They took the time to listen and learn about my family situation and our approach to investing long before they recommended a path forward. I interviewed several other firms that quickly tried to sell me on financial products and solutions. This was not my experience with Cordant. We spent a ton of time strategizing together and have recently put our plan into action. My advisor Scott Gerlach truly understands how I think, and he explains complex topics in a way that makes sense to me. He even records videos prior to our discussions so I can effectively prepare for our meetings. He documents every detail and quickly follows up on all action items. His team is extremely responsive, and I always get quick answers to my inquiries. I am excited to see the partnership grow in the coming years.

advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®
review_text_raw: My husband and I have been working with Fully Financial for our financial planning needs, and the experience has been exceptional. From the very beginning, we were impressed by their professionalism and organization. They took the time to understand our financial goals and provided us with a comprehensive plan that was tailored to our unique situation as a gay couple and small business owners.

advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®
review_text_raw: My husband and I started working with Ben and Cody after many of my friends recommended them. As a young couple wishing to retire and with no previous finance experience, working with Fully Financial has been amazing! Ben and Cody are very thorough, knowledgeable, and patient with my endless questions! They have helped us make better financial decisions, think about out short and long-term goals, and how to better prepare ourselves for the future. We are very please with the job they have done and will strongly recommend them to friends.

advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®
review_text_raw: Fully Financial is extremely knowledgeable, highly organized, and trustworthy. I have trusted them with my family's future and have felt confident with that decision since day one.

I have worked with Chris 5* years. In the beginning, I had just begun a complicated divorce from a decades-long marriage, and I was overwhelmed. Chris' empathy and compassion were immediately apparent, as was his wisdom and compassion. His careful attention to detail; his clear directions about what to consider and do when, and his willingness to prepare for and testify in court, were profoundly timely and helpful. In the process I gained knowledge and increased competence in managing my own financial affairs, something I had not done much of during my marriage. Chris' respectful, trustworthy, expert, and mindful guidance around how to run my sole proprietorship clinical psychology practice, build my personal savings strategy, consolidate and restructure my retirement portfolio, and most recently orient me to a comprehensive money management strategy and retirement planning, has been utterly eye-opening and very welcome. I trust him completely. Chris is truly a gem as a financial advisor and human being, as are the other people he recommends, hires, and mentors. I am deeply grateful to Chris, and he has highest praise without reservation.

We have had the pleasure of working alongside Brett Tushingham for 13 years. From the very beginning, Brett helped us establish retirement goals that would enable us to comfortably retire at the age of 60. Throughout our partnership, Brett has been instrumental in connecting us with the right insurance professionals, assisting with estate planning, and guiding our retirement investments. It brings me great joy to share that, thanks to Brett's expertise and support, we were able to achieve our retirement goals.
Brett has truly been an invaluable partner, trusted advisor, and friend throughout this remarkable journey. He consistently keeps our goals and interests at the forefront, going above and beyond to ensure our financial well-being. In comparison to other individuals we have spoken with who have certified financial advisors (CFA), we have observed that they do not receive the same level of personalized service and individual attention that Brett provides. He genuinely acts as our personal CFO, offering unparalleled dedication and commitment.
Choosing to work with Brett and Tushingham Wealth Strategies is an excellent decision that you will never regret.

We couldn’t be more pleased with our experience with the Eliot Rose team. We have been working with Jason, Paul, and Kris for a year and a half. Their service is comprehensive, detail oriented, and personal. They are excellent listeners, and they provide sound advice. They helped us get organized in preparation for my partner’s retirement last year and we now feel confident making informed decisions looking ahead toward my retirement. Seeking advice from Eliot Rose was an excellent investment in our future. We look forward to working with them for years to come. They are professional, organized, efficient, and a pleasure to work with!

advisor_name: Derek J. Delaney, CFP®, ChFC®, EA
review_text_raw: Derek has been extremely  helpful for our retirement transition/planning,  combining accounts, answering all our questions and is a very genuine person who loves what he does! Highly recommend !!!

We decided that we no longer wanted to try to manage the multifaceted complexities of investments, finances, taxes, social security, health care, long term care and Roth conversions. We interviewed at least 3 flat fee financial advisors and decided to partner with Joe and we feel that it was a really good decision. Joe has provided us with a complete financial plan that incorporates a holistic approach on all our financial matters. He has always been available whenever we needed advice or questions answered and responds in a very timely manner, usually the same day. We would definitely recommend Mayfair Financial to anyone seeking a comprehensive financial plan.

I have been using TPWA’s help with financial planning since the last couple of years. They’ve been a huge help in making us understand and manage our finances better. The team is easy to talk to, responsive and clear with their guidance. Would highly recommend!

advisor_name: Derek J. Delaney, CFP®, ChFC®, EA
review_text_raw: Derek is personable, professional and courteous. He is attentive to detail. He explains my portfolio in terms I understand. It has been a pleasure working with him. He makes accommodations for me easily. I have complete confidence in his recommendations for my needs as well as my own personal investment choices. He has explained options clearly. With no hesitation I recommend Derek as a financial planner partner. I am certain you will feel confident in his keen foresight to help your investments grow.

We’ve been with PAX about 10 years. Have had 3 advisors (one left for solo practice, one promoted to mgt) Greyson Hanna is relatively new, but an up and comer. Very personable, willing to do/research anything, not pushy at all. Pleased with returns and advice x 10 yrs!

I've relied on Twin Peaks Wealth Advisors for financial guidance and managing my portfolio, and I couldn't be happier with  them. They are responsive any time I have questions, and they take time to listen to my concerns.Their transparency and professionalism are unparalleled and I always feel informed and confident when making decisions. Vishal and his team are not only knowledgeable but also incredibly friendly and trustworthy. I highly recommend them for anyone seeking reliable financial advice.

I've worked with Taylor for a few years now and can say my family has made significant strides financially with his advice and support.

He's extremely organized, responsive and accessible. I'm always confident he's looking out for our best interests and value the relationship we have.

Whether you're a young professional just starting out, someone who's nearing retirement, or anyone in between, I would highly recommend.

Becoming clients at Berkshire Money Management is perhaps the smartest financial decision we’ve ever made. We enjoy working with Peter and the entire team. Our retirement nest egg has grown significantly in spite of our drawing down on it as a retirement income source. Our regular reviews and assessments have been spot on and give us the confidence and peace of mind that is so essential to an enjoyable retirement.
Thank you BMM, Bob and Mary Edwards

Transitioning from a managed-asset fee-based portfolio and very little or no contact from a team of brokers and sales associates, I decided to hear Jim and Sarah out on their philosophy of hourly based financial advice.  All I have to say is I wish I had known this existed well before I started working with them.  Jim and Sarah heard my concerns and frustrations about the lack of communication and guidance from my former brokers during the 10 plus years they "managed" my accounts including retirement, taxable and my small business.  With my former brokers, there was no direction about preparing for retirement.  With Jim and Sarah, I now have support and a clear path about what is needed to reach my retirement and business goals.  Paying for financial advice on an hourly basis versus performance based fees makes more sense to me.  Why would I EVER continue to pay brokers a fee whether I receive advice from them or not?  My relationship with Sanctuary Financial Planning will be ever evolving and I feel them holding my hand every step of the way towards retirement.  So much gratitude for the both of them!

Maureen's financial work is excellent.From the first initial meeting, her thoughts and inputs were very thorough and exceptionally insightful. Her process of from start to finish is top notch. Also she's is very quick responding, on any questions that might arise. I would highly recommend the use of Maureen and her financial services to anyone that is in the market for financial guidance.
We have worked with Tushar and Vishal for over 10 years, and have always had a very positive experience and a very good professional relationship. Highly recommend!
I am very pleased with the management of my financial accounts and advice that I have received from TPWA. They are a very agile and dynamic team.

Hazel and her team at Align Financial Solutions have played an instrumental part in organizing and implementing a solid financial plan for my retirement. She listens to questions and ideas and always has thoughtful and insightful solutions. Hazel keeps in touch regularly to provide information and updates that apply to my plan. I feel confident about my financial future with Hazel and Align as my guide.
David is a high character man full of wisdom and knowledge. My wife and I have come to trust him completely over the years and cannot commend him highly enough.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
It is rare today to find people with qualities including integrity, professionalism and caring for others.  Justin and his Peek Wealth team certainly have shown all of these qualities and more since we began working with Justin when his career began with Edward Jones.  His guidance for our modest portfolio has been taken on with expert communication and guidance.  He has heard our concerns and offered his expertise without fail.

We recommend Peek Wealth to anyone in the market for a professional financial advisor.  What a fantastic office group to work with!
Nick is always accessible and puts up with my very conservative financial aspirations!

Nick has handled my wife's and my retirement planning for the last four years. After taking the whole of our financial situation into consideration, he has gone to great lengths to make sure it meets our retirement wants and needs.
He will give sound  financial advice, and take the time to address any questions or concerns.
We would recommend Nick and Emergent Wealth to friends and family without hesitation.

About 6-7 years ago, I was feeling unhappy with my then-current financial advisor. I interviewed four possible advisors, all recommended to me by friends or other professionals.
I came away with no choices that impressed me positively. One of them used a computer game model to assess my needs. Another bragged about his own wealth. Those experiences could not have been more unprofessional and told me nothing about the advisor himself. As I said, I was interviewing, not being interviewed.
I was feeling concerned that I could not find an advisor who listened to me and wanted to know who I am. I got one more recommendation, and I met Nick Efthemis. I was thrilled with the interview! I hired him. I could not be happier. Nick listens, he asks questions, he lets me know what he is thinking and why. My finances have greatly improved due to his advice. I highly recommend that you meet him and his team, and I am sure you will be as pleased as I am to have him on my personal advisory team!

Nick and his staff at Emergent have proven to be very effective in managing the portfolio for me and my husband. I was so happy with the results we transferred over assets that were being managed by a different financial advisor. He is responsive to our questions and his follow through has been great. Couldn't be happier!

I could never imagine investing in a financial advisor because I didn't realize what an impact good ones make. My husband and I, both were skeptical at first. However, based on a recommendation from my manager, we decided to give David and Jack from Avid Planning a try. And we're so glad we did!

From the get-go, Jack and David have been financial rockstars. In less than a year, they have helped us streamline and simplify our debits and credits. We now have better clarity on our financial goals and long-term plans. Their expertise has guided us to align our different financial goals and meet in the middle, something we struggled with before.

Thanks to their advice, we're able to spend on what matters most to us and intentionally save, knowing exactly what we're saving for. Jack and David have been incredibly helpful and patient throughout the entire journey. Their personalized approach and genuine interest in our financial well-being have made a significant difference.

For anyone looking for a financial advisor, we wholeheartedly recommend David and Jack from Avid Planning. They’ve transformed our financial outlook and have given us the peace of mind we never thought possible. If you want to feel comfortable and confident about your financial future, David and Jack are the ones to trust.

I absolutely trust these guys! They have always demonstrated an excellent understanding of my financial needs and goals, as an individual and a parent. Their advice at each stage has helped me learn and navigate the investment and saving opportunities available to me, and plan accordingly.  I have complete confidence in the Twins' and their professional abilities. Their advice is always clear, relevant and prudent.

My interactions with Equilibrium Financial Planning have been professional, cordial, informative, and focused on my individual circumstance.  There is a great attention to communication in both directions, and a flexibility in designing and developing a path forward that satisfies my goals and needs.
Michelle is knowledgeable, professional, and a pleasure to work with. Michelle has been very helpful to us and we wholeheartedly recommend her as a financial advisor.

Moving to the retirement phase of our lives was bringing a degree of anxiety we were not accustomed to.  Working with archer Investments, in particular Emily, has allowed us to feel comfortable with our decisions.  The wealth of knowledge and creative thinking is a welcomed breath of fresh air.

We have been searching for an honest, informative financial advisor that doesn’t do AUM and finally found it! Jeremy provides great insight and information and we truly feel he has our best interests at heart. I really like the Abundo subscription model and find it very fair, especially in comparison to previous planners who put us in a set it and forget it program while collecting 1%. We are so happy to have found Abundo!

I've worked with Tushar and Vishal for over 13 years and they continue to give me white glove service. I know I'm not their biggest client but they always make me feel like I am. They come prepared to our quarterly meetings with solid insights about what's next for our investment strategy. And most importantly, I'm very satisfied with my returns. Couldn't recommend Twin Peaks more!

We recently moved our money to Ron when we realized the large amount of fees being paid to our then current advisors.  They were not the obvious fees but the ones you don't see readily on your statement.  They are the additional fees attached to the ETF's and Mutual funds that the other advisor said was 'normal in all investing.'  We met Ron, spoke with him and learned these don't have to 'be normal' in investment accounts.  They are there to make the firm extra money that you aren't aware of and eat away at your hard earned retirement savings.  The moving of our accounts was painless and our portfolios look much better now.  Ron guided us all the way, answered all our questions and has been easy to connect with during this whole process.  He is a great communicator and educator with his clients.  I would highly recommend Ron Lang to everyone.

We have been working with Maureen for many years. Maureen took the time in the years leading up to our retirement to work with us to craft a very personalized retirement strategy. As you all know, financial planning can be challenging and complex. Maureen has always taken the time to work with us as a trusted advisor to ensure we always have a very clear understanding of the financial planning and retirement process.

When we started our transition to retirement she was instrumental in helping us navigate our way through the many Medicare options and enrollment challenges. She also worked with us to ensure we had the appropriate estate planning in place.

We have always appreciated Maureen's attention to detail, tax strategy advice, and her ability to listen to our personal goals and risk tolerance and build our financial plan accordingly.

Found Ron on Dave Ramsay's site and really liked his approach and passion to finance. We feel much more at peace knowing him and his team is working hard and keeping an eye on our investments. He is very personable and available to answer our questions and concerns when we have them. So far we are happy with our choice to go with Atlas Wealth and looking forward to our investments grow.

Twin Peaks Weather Advisory has been awesome! They’ve not only managed my finances expertly but also educated me along the way. Thanks to them, I feel confident about my financial future. The team is professional, knowledgeable, and always there when I need them. I highly recommend their services!

Joe has been an absolute joy to work with! After meeting Joe on a video conference for the first time, we knew right away that he was the one to manage our finances. His soft tone voice and calming demeanor just puts your anxieties and fears at ease. Aside from these traits, he is very knowledgeable at what he does. He took his time to explain in detail what we can and can’t do based on our future goals. He took his time and listened to what our needs were and suggested the best way to go about it so that we can achieve our goals. He has an even keeled attitude which helps you when you are in panic mode and that’s something we can’t help but appreciate in the long run. Not only is he a knowledgeable financial advisor but he is also a great person for other resources besides finance! If you are looking for a financial advisor, look no further than Joe Petry!  We highly recommend Joe to handle your finances.

Thanks Joe!

I have been a client of Cordant Wealth for nearly a decade. The financial planning process, regular check-ins, and online portal have greatly simplified my life and provided reassurance to my wife. Whenever I had a question, the Cordant team responded promptly. They have also provided valuable guidance on property investments and a startup I launched. I have worked with other wealth planners, but none have offered the same level of professional tools and support as well as personalized service.
The TWA team is highly knowledgeable, responsive and a pleasure to work with.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
Justin and is team are amazing. They are readily available when you have questions. They explain their answers in a way I can understand.
My aunt stumbled upon Justin when he was just starting out by knocking on doors.  I am so thankful she let him.
You wont going wrong using Justin Peek.

My wife and I are grateful for the tremendous work the Eliot Rose team has done for us.  With retirement coming upon us they helped us take stock of our assets including retirement plans, social security, etc as well our needs and wishes for our retired life and for our heirs.

The process is comprehensive, personal and ongoing.

We appreciate their patience and ability to explain in simple terms what seemed complex to us.

What was once a stressful topic to us (retirement finances) is now something we are comfortable with and at ease.

After being with a large NY financial firm for many years  we felt it was time for a change and started the process to find new advisors.  We interviewed several large and small firms and, after several meetings with Peter and Nate, decided on Berkshire Money Management for many reasons.  First and foremost was their knowledge of financial markets and their philosophy of money management.  As they say, “the proof is in the pudding” and the pudding has been beyond our wildest expectations.  But the bonus has been how Peter and Nate got involved with and helped us with all aspects of our financial lives from estate planning to gifting to even helping our granddaughter through the college admissions process.  We are thrilled with Berkshire Money Management and thankful to have Peter and Nate in our lives.  We feel we are so lucky.
Pommy and Jerry Levy
Great financial planning, great team.  Very responsive, you'll get email/phone responses super quick.  I enjoy our time together discussing the future and planning goals

advisor_name: Deaton Smith, CFP®, AIF®, ChFC®, WMCP®
review_text_raw: When we were looking for a financial advisor, our number one priority was to select a professional who would take the time to really get to know us and our family’s financial goals.  From the first meeting with Deaton, Kelly, and Allison, we knew we had to look no further. During our time with Thayer Financial, we have developed a greater understanding of how our investments can work for us.  We feel comfortable calling, texting or emailing Deaton, Kelly, or Allison regardless of the question.  We feel supported and safe.  Communication is excellent, and we have access to our online apps that ensure full transparency.  We trust in Deaton Smith, and walking into Thayer Financial has been a game changer for us.

I have known Larry Sprung for over 40 years. We went to grammar and high school together. Although we lost touch for a couple of decades, I was drawn to his energetic appearances all over social media. He had developed a skill set, talent and accreditation in a field I was in need of guidance in. Kick starting our relationship on a new level was exciting for two reasons…I had a true understanding of where “he came from” and the type of person he was…and still is. Larry puts his heart into everything he does, both professionally and in his personal life. A true family man, who is eager to help others and their families achieve financial success. It has been a real JOY for me to be reconnected, but not because of the financial planning, but rather Larry and the Mitlin team are the type of folks I like to be around. Hard working honest people who strive to do what they do, the best they can, so those they  serve can achieve wonderful things.
Such a nice group of people with a real family-ethos to their business.

Daniel Kopp has been an exceptional financial planner for us. His thoroughness and attention to detail have given us immense confidence in our financial future. Daniel’s deep understanding of military aspects has been particularly invaluable, as he is well-versed in the unique financial challenges and opportunities faced by military families.

What truly sets Daniel apart is his genuine care for his clients. He goes above and beyond to ensure that we feel supported and informed every step of the way. We always feel like a priority, and his personalized approach has made a significant difference in our financial planning.

We highly recommend Daniel Kopp to anyone seeking a dedicated, knowledgeable, and compassionate financial planner!

Maureen Demers not only keeps me informed about the latest tax law changes and their impact on my financial plan, but she also explains it in a way that allows me to ask the myriad questions a detail-oriented engineer does.  She provides a perspective of my financial gestalt, allowing me to see the “big picture” comprising the many moving parts of investments, retirement, insurance, and estate planning.

I know that once we’ve agreed on moving forward with the tasks to attain my goals, she will handle all the tasks, yet keep me informed of the progress and ensure nothing is forgotten or mishandled by the various institutions.  Above all, her integrity, honesty, and diligence set her apart as a unique advisor.  As a client, I know she cares about my goals and reaching them while minimizing the risks inherent in the market.

Although I’ve attempted to remain unbiased in my review, for full disclosure, we’re married, so that is a truly impossible task.  However, I stand by everything I’ve said, and I’d retain her as my advisor even if that weren’t the case.

advisor_name: Deaton Smith, CFP®, AIF®, ChFC®, WMCP®
review_text_raw: Highly Recommend - been with them from the beginning - Personable and Outstanding Service - Service to clients is the Number 1 Priority

advisor_name: Deaton Smith, CFP®, AIF®, ChFC®, WMCP®
review_text_raw: Deaton handles all my business and personal financial planning and I couldn't be more thrilled as a business owner. Most financial guys have to sell products to make commissions and that makes it difficult for them to work in my best interest as a lot of times my best investment is back into my business and I need someone who can make those determinations without a conflict of interest. I also have referred several of my clients to him and they have been thrilled as well.

advisor_name: Deaton Smith, CFP®, AIF®, ChFC®, WMCP®

advisor_name: Deaton Smith, CFP®, AIF®, ChFC®, WMCP®

"Thank you so very much" is an absolute understatement.

Mr. Scipio has been extremely helpful to me as I prepare for retirement. His financial advice has been invaluable as I move closer to my next chapter. I highly recommend Scipio Financial if you are looking for expert financial guidance.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®

His knowledge of financial markets and economic indicators is superb and we are 100% confident and trusting in his counsel. I have recommended him to others and will continue to do so.

We couldn’t be more pleased with Hunter and his wealth of information to help us understand the concepts of our financial planning. Hunter keeps us on top of our finances and is always available when we have questions. We have known and worked with Hunter for over 5 years and are looking forward to continuing a profitable future working with him. We highly recommend him.

Highly recommended! Hunter is not pushy, aggressive or impatient as I interviewed and navigated hiring a financial adviser. He helped me understand the value of an advisor and walked me through how it all worked and what I was to expect moving forward. He decided to leave his previous corporate company and start his own. Being an entrepreneur myself, I was excited for him and looking forward to see what he could do on his own. My financial situation is not all that complicated, but he is attentive, available and pleasant each time we talk. Thank you for helping me grow my wealth!

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: I was referred to Peek Wealth by a friend, and I'm delighted with the service and guidance I've received. Justin's expertise and personalized approach have given me confidence in his ability to guide me effectively in financial planning. His proactive communication in managing my investments keeps me informed about my portfolio's progress and ensures it aligns with my long-term goals. I highly recommend Peek Wealth to anyone seeking a dedicated and knowledgeable financial advisor.

Only I didn't know what kind of help I needed and it's easy to get overwhelmed quickly and I was on like year number whatever of being overwhelmed and I just kicked that can down the road every year. After a short search, I found Archer's team and quickly just pushed other options off the table and signed on. They've actually been able to simplify things in a way that makes me feel like I can manage my life and not worry about it all for the first time in years. I basically had all eggs, but no basket. Now I have a comprehensive plan from some incredible staff and I actually love the process instead of dreading the matter. Simply put, Archer has changed how I view my own finances and what used to be a cause of stress for me is now a giant sigh of relief. I said in the title it was the best decision ever and I mean it: this has 100% seriously no-fingers-crossed changed my life. If you're like me and you've been debating if you even need this kind of help, then yes… yes, you do!

Berkshire Money Mgmt. has been providing me with financial guidance since retiring over 8 years ago. In that time, through the guidance of Peter, as well as the savvy investing strategies that Allen pursues, I have enjoyed the financial freedom to live a worry- free retirement.
An added bonus is interacting with his capable and wonderful supporting cast of truly pleasant people.
I highly recommend BMM!
This is the place to go with any money questions or concerns. Everyone at the Dalton office is super helpful. I really trust BMM. They look after your money and they care about you!

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: We have worked with Justin for 5 years now and were referred by a friend.  We had talked about getting a financial advisor for a while as we both didn’t have the time or the energy to spend understanding all the nuances of investing and retirement.  We have been very pleased!  Justin is so knowledgeable and very personable.  He has calmed our fears or concerns while opening our eyes to different options we had never considered before.  He has helped to create the best strategy for us.   We feel like he’s a friend, not just our advisor.  We feel the same about Mariah too!   As we have attended different events and met some of his other clients over the years (many who have been with him for 15+ years),  we see how happy everyone is with Justin and his team.  That is a testament to the relationship and trust he has built with all his clients over the years!

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
When my husband and I moved to San Diego from Orange County we wanted a local financial advisor. We interviewed three offices.  Justin was near the Oceanside mall in Carlsbad at the time.  We both agreed to go with Justin.  He made a good appearance and sounded very knowledgeable.  I wanted someone who had education and a good personality. Justin fit the bill. I was a high school economics teacher so we could tell he was knowledgeable with a pleasant personality.

I’ve been with Justin close to 30 years and have been happy with his care of my portfolio.  I know he is a great financial advisor because his clientele has grown.  It has been fun watching him mature and improve in all he does.  Justin is a great businessman and just a great guy.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: Roughly twenty years ago I asked our accountant  Tom Applegate for the name of a financial advisor in the Carlsbad area. "A young guy Justin Peek is sharp. Give him a call.” I did and my wife and I are glad we did as our situation was very complicated. Tom and Justin with the help and advise of our attorney Darci Poloni got things organized and today we’re in great shape especially staying the course through his break from Edward Jones. This gave both Peek Wealth and ourselves more independence to invest. It has worked. Try it!!

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
I had the pleasure of meeting Justin Peek through mutual friends at various social gatherings. He consistently struck me as a polite, intelligent, and charming individual.
During the pandemic, I became increasingly frustrated with the poor management and lack of growth in my investments. My daughter, experiencing exceptional service with Justin at PEEK WEALTH, recommended him to me.
From our first meeting, Justin was open, clear, and objective—a breath of fresh air. I immediately felt understood, and my financial goals were clearly outlined. The transition of my investments to Justin's care was seamless, and I quickly felt at home.
Since then, Justin and his team have been incredibly attentive to all my questions, needs, and concerns. Justin is always available, and I know I can rely on him. His advice and knowledge have significantly benefited my investments.
I am immensely grateful to have found Justin and to trust him with my financial future. His dedication and care are unparalleled. My only regret is not joining PEEK WEALTH sooner!

Fiduciary Financial Group offers an invaluable service. From the very beginning, working with them has been incredibly easy and convenient. They have a large team of knowledgeable professionals who always have the resources and information needed to address any questions or concerns.

What sets Fiduciary Financial Group apart is their proactive approach. They consistently reach out to perform account reviews, ensuring that my financial plans are always up-to-date and aligned with my goals. Their assistance with financial planning has been excellent, offering personalized recommendations that have significantly improved my financial health.

Recently, their expertise in tax harvesting and debt payment plans has been a game-changer for me. They provided clear, actionable strategies that have helped me maximize my tax savings and manage my debts more effectively.

Overall, Fiduciary Financial Group offers top-notch service, and I highly recommend them to anyone looking for comprehensive and proactive financial planning assistance.

Exceptional Team !. It is great to work with Tushar, Vishal and the entire Twin Peaks team. I am extremely pleased with their services - knowledgeable, professional and always have my best interests in mind. What also sets them apart is their availability, along with their commitment to clear and transparent communication. I highly recommend them.

Professional and personable help in helping us to navigate retirement planning and our income streams.  We really appreciate Dan and like working with him.  We feel he is really helpful and so glad we are working with him

Had put this together but forgot where I stored the draft.  Similar to above with a few more details.

Dan is always very responsive.  He spends a significant amount of time making sure he understands our needs and what we want to accomplish with our resources in our retirement.  He listens to our ideas and gives us great professional guidance.  We are very confident that we have a very good plan that we are comfortable with and that it will meet our needs.  We also very much appreciate Dan's ability to connect with us personally.  He gracefully works with us as our plans change, while keeping our overall goals in mind.  We don't feel like just another account in a big firm.
Had wonderful experiences with Endeavor Advisors. They are professional, prompt, and knowledgeable and has a lot of experiences with financial management and life decisions making. Highly recommend.

I learned about the IRS Rule of 55 in my early 50’s and had been working with my assigned financial planner through my 403b plan (nonprofit version of 401k) to retire early (before the 59-½ allowable withdrawal without penalty).  I was getting conflicting information from my assigned financial planner and the plan administrator, so I was unsure if I was making the best decisions for myself to begin withdrawing from my plan. It was scary to think about making a bad decision that could impact me negatively for a very long time.

After vetting several options, I began working with Sarah and Jim about 5 months prior to my selected retirement date. Their analysis made me feel confident I was making a sound decision! They recommended adjustments to my portfolio to minimize costs and maximize gains, helped me navigate some complexities around retiring with the Rule of 55, and helped me transition to the withdrawal stage. I am enjoying my days of freedom and believe I am on a sustainable path. I look forward to continuing my relationship to ensure my long-term success. My one regret is that I hadn’t found them earlier!

Note: I was initially scared off by the fees, until I learned in my vetting process how much I would be paying EVERY YEAR with other models. I am glad I took the time to understand the benefits of a fee only approach.

We've been lucky enough to work with Cassandra for several years. She's just so full of knowledge.
She is there to address our concerns, answer questions as well as reassuring us that we're on track for success!
I especially like the tools she uses so that at a glance we can keep up with our growth.
We really do feel lucky to have her managing our retirement and investments.
This is a great firm to work with.

If you're looking for a financial advisor who genuinely cares about your financial well-being and goes above and beyond to deliver results, look no further than John Boyd at MDRN Wealth. I cannot recommend him highly enough!

Peter Coughlin is our family’s financial advisor with Berkshire Money Management.  He is attentive to detail with our accounts and is a pleasure to work with.  If a question arises or there is a change in market conditions, he gives us a phone call to discuss it.  Peter has consistently grown the value of our accounts. We have developed a personal relationship that I appreciate.
Denise was very clear and methodical in her approach. She gave me options and I was able to achieve my financial goals.

Jose is an excellent financial planner.  In our very first meeting, he made sure that we were on the same page and that there was a clear roadmap for us to follow as we worked with him to develop a financial plan.  He then set up regular meetings to focus on each element of the plan and to answer any questions that we had along the way.  We were pleased with the final outcome and felt that Jose went above and beyond to ensure that we had a plan that will help us to achieve our financial goals.   He is kind, patient, professional, and very knowledgeable.  We also really appreciated the transparent pricing.  We plan to use Jose again in the future and will recommend him to others.

At the recommendation of a trusted friend, I met with Maureen Demers to discuss my financial outlook eleven years ago. The meeting went so well that we have worked together ever since. I say worked together since Maureen never makes decisions in a vacuum.  When changes need to be made or opportunities need to be reviewed, we meet and discuss all while she explains things in a way that is clear, concise  giving me the information to make decisions with her expert guidance.

Maureen is not only extremely skilled as a financial planner, she is always proactive, alerting me to the best way to grow my portfolio but also to manage risk in a way that was comfortable and appropriate. She constantly stays ahead of new trends and products in the financial arena as well as new tax changes that can affect those plans greatly. In these eleven years, I went from being employed full time, to retired, and now retired with a small income. At every turn in my financial life, she has created plans that suit me perfectly. It has allowed me the opportunity to focus on my life and not worry about my financial future. I cannot recommend Maureen more highly.
With their expertise and proactive management, Twin Peaks WM has been an invaluable partner in our retirement planning. Our portfolio has consistently outperformed our expectations year after year.

My wife and I have been clients of Berkshire Money Management (BMM) for over 10 years, and Peter Coughlin has been our advisor for more than half that time.  We are grateful for Peter and the BMM Team for guiding us into retirement, and beyond.  When you are preparing to retire, you always ask, “do we have sufficient assets to retire, and will we be able to do the things we’ve dreamed about doing”?  Its not a simple question to answer.  But Peter, along with Zack and Lauren, asked the right questions, crunched the numbers, and answered with a resounding “Yes”.  But they also developed and documented our financial planning “tools” for investing, spending, and Social Security that give us the continued confidence to enjoy travel, family and fun in our retirement years. (I use the word “tools”, because this is not a rigid prescription, but a flexible planning model that can change as your plans and dreams change.)
That’s the financial piece of retirement.  But there’s more to retirement than just the financial plan.  There’s Estate planning, the legal documents (POA’s, Health Care Proxies, Wills and Trusts), Health Insurance, and Social Security.  Berkshire Money Management has helped us with all of that, so we have a complete guide for now and beyond.
Along the way, we meet regularly with Peter; a couple of times a year, for portfolio reviews, future plan updates, and life-change updates.  Peter is always prompt to guide us, or schedule us with the appropriate expert, so we can complete the next steps.  He, of course, is available any time, if we have questions or need advice.
Do we pay attention to our investments?  Yes, of course.  It’s not that we worry but we’re curious about their performance.   Because of BMM, with Peter’s guidance, we have confidence that our financial, retirement, and estate plans are solid and strong.
We’ve recommended Peter and BMM to our family, and they’ve become clients too.  Whatever your age, if you are thinking about your financial future, we recommend you give Berkshire Money Management a call.

I am incredibly pleased with the services provided by Cordant. They have been an indispensable partner in navigating my financial journey through retirement planning, employment changes, and various family and life events. Their team is consistently responsive (thanks Scott!) addressing my concerns promptly and with great expertise. Their knowledgeable guidance has made complex financial processes understandable and manageable. Thanks to their strategic advice and personalized approach, I feel confident and well-prepared for the years ahead. If you are on the fence or looking for a firm to help guide you, don't think twice, give them a try.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: I have been working with Justin for about 5 years now and it has been a great experience. He and his team at Peek Wealth are knowledgeable, conscientious, and responsive. advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: We were introduced to Justin over 14 years ago.  We have since moved to Seattle, changed employers, had 2 children, bought and sold homes etc…and Justin and his team were right alongside us.  Not only has Justin ensured our financial needs were taken care of, he has provided recommendations of realtors and tax advisors that all centered our best interests.  We trust Justin completely with our finances and, even 1200 miles away, feel assured we can contact him or his team anytime and they will be responsive.

Working with Daniel was truly working WITH Daniel and not for Daniel. Unlike previous other financial advisors Daniel takes great care to understand us, our priorities, and our goals. Only then does he tie that to dollars ensuring that our investments are meeting our desires and priorities, not just filling out a portfolio. His system is easy and intuitive, it wasn't a long, difficult "check book" to balance and it provided clear, actionable results that have worked great for us. I recommend Daniel to all my friends and look forward to continuing to work with him.
Denise provided me with great information, guidance and advise to be successful in my business and my personal life. My goal is to legacy build and she provide the tools that I needed.

The Twin Peaks Wealth Advisors team is amazing. They've supported us with personalized advice and strategies, and have been incredible partners to us on our financial journey for several years. We recommend a conversation to any friends and colleagues who are at a critical stage of evaluating whether a financial advisor is the right choice for them.

Just like their website says. "They help you make the best financial decisions". Very happy with Barker Wealth Management. An amazing team of professionals with the expertise to get you on the right track with your finances.  I will recommend them to my friends.

Russ is a wonderful advisor. My husband and I decided to retire early… but only after speaking with Russ. He was all in even before our actual funds were available. He helped us in setting up Social Security and when my husband turned 65 with Medicare. He put us in touch with folks who do the leg work for you which in turn gave us both piece of mind. He’s very personable and makes you feel like you’re a friend not a customer. He works hard to make sure we are ok with future life changes.  You can discuss what your goals are and he will do the numbers and tell you what he thinks is best to make sure you reach those goals. When you achieve your goals he will be the first to congratulate you. Speaking as someone who had no clue as to obtain this information on my own…he had the patience and explained it in layman’s terms.
You cannot go wrong using Russ.  I would and have recommended him to my friends and family. I have nothing but good experiences with Russ and his team.

Working with Emily, Richard, and the team has been great! Their insight has been invaluable for me across a variety of domains. Their approach builds from goals backwards -- we met together to outline short-and-longterm goals and then used those goals to create a plan across a variety of decisions, from home ownership to car insurance to investment and much more. Richard and Emily truly do a great job of drawing me into the loop, ensuring that the financial plan we develop reflects my goals and wishes. Before settling with Archer Investments, I talked with a number of other advisors and none of them had the combination of professionalism, attention to detail, and comprehensive services offered by Archer.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
We were introduced to Justin years ago by a friend, a CPA. We shared that we needed and wanted a financial planner who would educate us, and make us part of the decision making process.  She said, "Justin is your man" and that is 100 percent true.  We have been with other financial advisors in our life.  We would go to meetings, felt as if we were being "told what to do", not be part of the decision making, or not feel like our needs were being heard.  When we met Justin, he immediately made us feel comfortable.  In a nutshell....this is what we love about Justin and his team....
Communication: If it isn't Justin directly (often times it is) it is Mariah who consistently emails us to send reminders of tasks, monthly newsletters and has an open communication style of business.  We can ALWAYS talk to Justin or meet with him if we have questions that come up.
Education:  This is so very important to us.  I'm not a finance major yet I want to feel like I am knowledgeable about our investments and our future and not just hand it over to someone. Justin and his team make sure we understand every aspect of our investing and the "why" to it. He doesn't just do it because he knows best, but takes the time to teach us to understand his logic behind his decisions.  Justin and his team also put out a monthly newsletter that explains current events in the news or stock market.  All the questions we have on a daily basis but don't ask, he addresses in a newsletter.  In addition, Justin offers speakers for webinars, dinner events and  even offers personal one on one meetings if needed.  For example, we had questions regarding our trust. Although Justin is very knowledgeable in trusts, he states his limitations and had a respected attorney come in to discuss our trust with us at no additional cost to us. It is his priority that we feel comfortable with or entire portfolio whether he is the expert or needs to get someone who is.
Trust:  We are not in the financial industry so trusting our advisor is a must. With Justin's knowledge base, years in the industry and communication you can't help but trust him and his team.
Family feeling:  You may not feel it necessary to feel like family to your financial planner.  That was not a priority to us.  However, Justin does make us feel like family. He shares the joys and accomplishments of his team with us. He frequently offers appreciation dinners, happy hours and events to express to his clients the appreciation he feels for working with him.  He celebrates the joys in your life, such as the birth of a child, or graduation of your teen.  He is aware of the passing of a loved one.  With each of life's milestones comes different financial decisions. He reaches out to discuss this with you without being asked. That is not intuition, that is being proactive and knowing what your financial needs will be with these changes in life.
Having Justin and his team take care of our financial portfolio has brought us sense of calm (hard to do) when dealing with finances.  We very much appreciate all Justin offers our family.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: Peek Wealth's all-encompassing financial planning has provided us with the peace of mind we've long sought in a wealth management company. The onboarding experience was enlightening and prompted a shift our mindset in our spending and financial decision-making. It has inspired us to plan not only for anticipated life events but also for the various phases of retirement ahead. By gradually incorporating recommended investment adjustments, participating in webinars on college planning, and staying updated through regular client newsletters, we remain actively involved in preparing for the years to come. We're reassured by the organized approach to our finances, tailored to benefit every member of our family. Justin and his team exhibit great expertise and attentiveness, making us feel valued members of the Peek Wealth community right from the start.

I have been with Cordant more than 10 years but was also working with the founder prior to Cordant when he was with a different firm.  I have found Cordant to be responsive, friendly, and always had good insights and suggestions.  Garrick Rozairo has been there for us along with his predecessor and any transition we have had has been very smooth and seamless.  Cordant has helped up through retiring from Intel with investments, how to manage our stock options, pension, and 401k.  We now are comfortably enjoying retirement.  When we have an unexpected event that we needed to fund and were not sure how that would affect our long term plans, Cordant was there to do the analysis and let us know what we were capable of doing.

Their advice is more than assessing your risk level, but also doing the analysis using Monte Carlo projections that take into account worst case economic scenarios to project viability of the current financial plan.  I have had them rerun these projections with different unplanned expenditures to ensure viability of new decisions, because no plan is static.

Cordant meets with us twice a year for a review and to see if there are any changes that need to be put into place.  This is very helpful.  It usually brings up stuff that we haven’t thought of.

Cordant has helped us find and support us thought estate planning for when we are gone.  I have found them to support me through all sorts of scenarios that most financial advisors don’t take on.  I consider them a “trusted advisor” and has been there for us all along.   I highly recommend them as a financial advisor if you want someone to be in your corner and be there when you need them.

We have benefited greatly from having TP manage our investments. They are proactive, punctual, and professional in their approach with excellent follow through. They worked with us to understand our goals and created a portfolio that matches our interests and values. For us they have taken the stress out of tracking our investments.

Planning one's retirement can be a daunting task and with minimal experience in investments it can be overwhelming. Going to Berkshire Money Management was one of the best decisions I could have made. I've found them to be knowledgeable, very receptive to any and all of my questions, and have never felt rushed or "insignificant". Many thanks to all at BMM!

Denise is a keen and kind advisor who listens to goals, history and hesitations to provide personalized, practical ideas, strategies and solutions from her deep well of financial and philanthropic knowledge.

Our family is extremely satisfied with Berkshire Money Management.  We can't say enough good things about our financial advisor Peter Coughlin.  He manages our portfolio with expertise, makes educated recommendations and also values our needs. The entire staff is friendly and always helpful.  We highly recommend Berkshire Money Mangement.

We chose BMM on the recommendations of a friend and it was a most fortunate decision. Every interaction with our personal advisor Peter Coughlin was handled with deep financial insight, attention to detail and sensitivity to our personal needs and goals. Peter and the entire BMM       team provided a steady hand on the rudder, helped to build and sustain our financial wellbeing and most importantly, allowed us to navigate retirement with confidence and peace of mind.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: After interviewing three financial advisors, we chose Justin at PEEK WEALTH. As a family with three college-bound children, we needed expert guidance to secure their futures and our retirement. Justin stood out as a family man who genuinely cares about his clients. He took the time to understand our goals, helping us align our finances with our dreams. Over the past two years, we've made significant progress toward our financial goals. The attentive and professional staff ensures we always receive timely and insightful advice. PEEK WEALTH goes above and beyond to make us feel like we are part of the PEEK WEALTH family. We highly recommend PEEK WEALTH for personalized and comprehensive financial guidance.

In my search to find a financial advisor, not to manage my already established portfolio and assets, but to review my overall financial situation, determine if asset allocation was on track to meet goals, and plan for the coming years before retirement, I found Life Story Financial.  Michelle was a pleasure to work with, easy to talk to, provided enough guidance but let the conversation go where it needed, and in the end of our discovery journey, was able to provide comprehensive recommendations that not only covered asset allocation, but also covered insurance, estate planning and more.  The plan had real, tangible actions for me to take and easy for me to execute.  The plan forward is to touch base once a year for a quick assessment, check for any life changes and adjust where needed.  I found her fees to be very reasonable for the comprehensive review, and I can even engage her advice services at an hourly rate, should something come up that I need to discuss.  Thank you, Michelle!

We have been clients of Berkshire Money Management for nearly 10 years and could not be happier with their service.  Peter Coughlin is our Advisor and is extremely knowledgeable in providing guidance.  Our accounts continue to perform very well - usually outperforming the overall market.  Peter, Allen Harris and the entire team at BMM are tops in their field, and we wouldn't think of turning to anyone else for financial advice and wealth management. Highly recommend!

Daniel was recommended to me by a work colleague after I became a military widow in August 2023.  I also currently serve on active duty. Daniel has helped relieve a significant amount of stress from me - though I am very knowledgeable about finances and investing and have never used a financial planner before, everything changed once I became a widow.  I now had an influx of insurance, and was in the process of applying for DIC, SSSB and waiting on SBP to begin. He has helped me invest SGLI and life insurance, rewrite my will, draft a trust, guided me through specific military gold star family benefits, and otherwise get my financial life in order to make me feel more settled and secure. I feel confident in my financial future, and highly recommend him!

He is talented and made for doing this job.

Working with Daniel has been a game changer. He has provided sound financial planning for multiple family members with dynamic scenarios. Daniel was highly recommended by a trusted coworker. advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®

From the outset, Daniel demonstrated a deep understanding of our unique financial situation, particularly in coordinating our military retirement plan. His expertise was evident, and he guided us through the complexities with clarity and confidence. He took the time to explain every detail, ensuring that we were not only comfortable but also fully informed about the decisions we were making. His professionalism, knowledge, and dedication make him an exceptional choice for anyone seeking to secure their financial future.

Thank you, Daniel, for your exceptional service and for helping us build a brighter financial future.

Working with Daniel has been so, so helpful for us. He asked careful questions to ensure that he understood our financial priorities and aided us in crafting a plan accordingly. advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: We have been with Justin and his team for almost 15 years. He is pro-active, dedicated and always available when needed. He is always professional, knowledgeable and  AVAILABLE. We have appreciated his commitment to our family's best interest, and his thoughtful guidance. I have referred Justin to many of my friends and clients, and have always received appreciation for bringing Justin to their attention. We are very grateful for Justin and the Peek Wealth team!

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: There's not much more we can say that has not been said in the previous reviews...except that it's all true. I’ve worked with Daniel for over a year after I lost my dad suddenly and started a business at age 30. Ultimately, Daniel has saved me, and made me, money in ways I couldn’t have navigated on my own. Additionally, I consider Daniel a life coach and confidant. I greatly value our relationship and would recommend him and Wise Stewardship Financial Planning to anyone seeking an authentic, reliable, and extraordinary financial ally and friend.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: Justin has been my financial planner for nearly 17 years. He is an excellent human being and has a treasure trove of knowledge and strategies that helped me build my nest egg for retirement. He has monitored my funds and made brilliant recommendations about ways to invest. He helped me transition some funds to an annuity, which has grown steadily over time.  Recently we discussed some tax saving strategies. Justin, Mariah and the team at Peek Wealth are my trusted partners. They look after my financial wellbeing and are continually assessing ways to meet my needs. When I begin my retired life sometime this year, I am in a comfortable and secure place thanks to their expertise.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: I met Justin many years ago and was impressed by his openness, honesty, integrity and ability to get things done.  Together with his outstanding investment advice.  Justin surrounds himself with a fabulous team.  Great communication and instant responses.  Thanks Justin!

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: Four years ago, we sent a cold call email to a local Certified Financial Planner asking if he had time to review our portfolio and share his thoughts on what adjustments, if any, we should make as we entered the home stretch of our peak earning years. That CFP was Justin Peek, and contacting him turned out to be a brilliant stroke of good fortune. In Justin and the rest of his team at Peek Wealth, we’ve found a trusted partner, there to assist in all aspects of our planning and always available to answer questions or concerns as our circumstances evolve. Visits to the Peek Wealth office are a kind of therapy, where Justin and his team (looking at you, Mariah!) cut through the fog of uncertainty and light up the map of what the next 10, 20, 30, even 40 years look like financially–all because there is a plan in place, a plan we built together. In an industry where it’s easy for the unscrupulous to entice with exaggeration, Justin is a straight-shooter who hires you for your values as much as you hire him for his. And if you are fortunate enough to partner with him and his team, yours will be the peace of mind that comes from knowing your financial future is in good hands.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: I have known Justin for over 20 years as we went to college together.  I have watched Justin work so tirelessly to not only break into this business but to truly make his practice the best.   When Justin started his business, I was working with a different financial advisor, who was fine, but I felt I wanted more. I felt like I was "just another client" to that advisor.  I was hesitant to switch to using a friend because I worried it would effect our friendship.  My worries were ridiculous!  Justin is a true professional.  During our initial meeting, he asked me questions about my financial worries and goals that not only had I never been asked but also had never considered.  Justin takes the time to really listen and then forms a plan of action based upon those goals.   I love working with Justin and the entire team at PEEK, and really wish I had made the switch 20 years ago!

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: We began with Justin when he was with Edward Jones, prior to that we had been with 2 other firms and financial consultants. During that time period I lost a large portion of my retirement and had to go back to work for a number of years. Our daughter in law recommended Justin as she had gone to high school with him and knew him personally. We made an appointment with him and the rest is history. I am now re-retired since 2013 and can honestly say he and his office help have been absolutely terrific with any of our needs, requests or explanations. We believe we are in the best of hands with you and your associates. Keep up the good work!
I have been with Berkshire since 2009 excellent company and Peter Coughlin as my adviser.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
I have been with Justin from the beginning back when he started with Edward Jones.  I was formerly with another advisor but  growing disappoints indicated I needed a change.   Justin took the time to clearly explain the market and create a strategy that best suited me.
I am now happily retired and thankful for his wise financial advice.

After all the years with Justin and his team,  I now know I made the right decision.   It's been prooven!

We have been working with the Cordant team for many years now (since they were Private Wealth NW).  Cordant stood out due to the caliber of their staff. Each team member exudes deep knowledge and proficiency in wealth management, displaying a mastery of the complexities within the financial domain.

We were not savvy from an investing/financial management perspective and also not familiar with the complexities of earnings, taxation, etc. Over the years, while we were heads-down with our work and raising our kids, the Cordant team were our trusted partners and handled things on our behalf ensuring that our investment portfolio and strategy were aligned with our risk tolerance.

Year after year, they would explain things very patiently and this has helped us develop an overall strategy that encompasses our needs pre and post-retirement, estate planning, our donation strategy as well as how to support our children with their critical financial needs/decisions. Cordant has developed a well-defined process with key indicators that allow us to monitor our portfolio and manage the needed drawdowns. They are always available to discuss any issues and make tweaks to our plans and strategy as needed. This is over and above the bi-annual reviews. Overall, we have become more well informed about the wealth management domain.

We are very happy with this collaboration of 15+ years and have now introduced Cordant to our children so that they can help and mentor our kids early in their investment journey.

I am a recently divorced woman who had previously been married to a CFO who handled our investments. Now it's my time to learn how to do it and with my index fund/passive investment strategy I didn't want to pay anyone to manage things full time, I felt with some education and advice I could do it myself. Sarah gave me good guidance on tax planning and overall investment strategy. I will continue working with her on an hourly basis as questions arise.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: We had formerly been with an accounting firm with financial advising for 30 years or so.  During this time, we had multiple financial advisors. We needed to make a change.  I had known Justin for 15 plus years through my business.  When I was getting ready to retire, I decided to start making some changes and switched my retirement accounts to Peek Wealth. He makes a point of getting to know the whole person, the family, goals, dreams, passions and lifestyle.  His guidance has been very comfortable and reassuring as we navigate this new stage of our life.  Justin and his team are very accessible and ready to assist with any question, no matter how big or small.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: Justin always takes the time to discuss strategy and goals regarding our financial investments. review_text_raw: The team at Peek Wealth is amazing, they truly care about us.   Their concerns  about your financial success is so important  and they really listen to your personal goals. advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: We were with Justin's prior firm due to the trust we have in Justin so it was a "no brainer" to continue our relationship when he developed Peek Wealth. review_text_raw: Justin is insightful, responsive, and always willing to help whether the question directly applies or is well outside his job description.
