advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
Trust.  It's the most important characteristic of a financial advisor/client relationship.  Justin has ours.  Check that box.
Communication.  The second-most important characteristic.  Whenever we have a question, we feel comfortable asking and always hear back from Justin.  And on the flip side, he reaches out when needed with personalized check-ins which is very helpful.  Conversations are productive and pleasant.  Check that box.
Acumen.  Financially astute, and a bit of a wonk with technology :-) , Justin stays current with the laws and good practices.  He is, however, not adverse to asking the right people if he doesn't know the answer.  Check that box.
Personality.   It is truly a pleasure to work with Justin; great sense of community and humor!  Check that box.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw: We met Justin many many years ago.  I am an Accountant and I was referred to Justin's dad to work on his books.  At the time, my husband and I were not happy with our Financial Advisor and Justin's dad suggested we contact Justin to see if we were a good fit.  Well, the rest is history.  We signed up with him when he worked with Edward Jones and then moved with him to his new endeavor (Peek Wealth).  We will follow Justin wherever he goes.  He is very trustworthy, he helped us with our financial goals, he keeps us on track when we get anxious with the ups and downs of the markets and he is so nice and friendly.  His yearly get togethers give us a chance to speak with other investors and meet his family and wonderful staff and enjoy afternoons in special places.  We have been retired for a few years and our investments that Justin helped set up have helped us travel and enjoy life.  We love Justin and have referred him to others.

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:
Eleven years ago, when we were looking to get a new financial planner, we interviewed 3 individuals. The first two spoke such gobbly goop. I think they thought it would make them sound intelligent and capable. However, to us it just meant that they couldn’t communicate well with their own customer base.

Justin was the last of the three. He spoke in terms both myself and my husband could understand. I basically told him all I want from our relationship is for him to help our portfolio grow. And over the eleven years that’s what he has done and much, much more.

Financially I’m conservative. I’d likely keep my money under the mattress, but Justin has calmly reminded me – more time than I can count - to hold the course. That with inflation you lose money if you keep it under your mattress.
When the pandemic hit, I was sure the sky was falling financially but Justin reminded me, yet again, that the number of stocks and bonds we owned would stay the same and would come back. Which they did.

Justin and Mariah are always available when needed. They make whatever time we need to understand, to talk through what’s important to me.

Peek Wealth is an ethical and reliable organization, which for someone who is advising us about our financial future, that is unbelievably important. Thanks Justin and thanks Peek Wealth.  Joanne and Bill

advisor_name: Justin Peek, CFP®, CCFC®, CLTC®, AAMS®
review_text_raw:

For years, I managed my own funds and regretted it. However, once Justin took over, our investments began generating the expected returns. I trust him completely and deeply appreciate the personalized attention he and his staff provide.

As a tax professional and business owner, I find Justin's expertise invaluable for both our personal investments and my business's financial needs. Congratulations, Justin, on successfully transitioning to your own firm!

review_text_raw: Justin is honest and trustworthy—I always tell my friends that it makes me happy to see “good guys” do well!  His office staff and colleagues are all wonderful.

Philip Hogue CRNA

I can't really envision what the last 10 years might have been like for me without Cordant, but when I look at where I am now, I absolutely see the role Cordant played in helping me get to my own personal "Rainbow's End"!

Great team that I count on for my retirement planning.  I have worked with them for over a year and am very satisfied with products and service based on my investment objectives.

I can't recommend Brian highly enough as a financial planner. He's been an absolute game-changer for me, especially when it comes to navigating the often-confusing world of investments.

Brian's knowledge is truly impressive. He took the time to patiently educate me on different investment options, making sure I understood everything before making any decisions.

But Brian's expertise goes beyond just investments. He's also been a fantastic resource for my small business. He helped me maximize my retirement contributions, ensuring I'm on track for a secure future. Additionally, his tax-saving strategies have been a major win!

Overall, Brian is a fantastic financial planner who combines expertise with a genuine desire to see his clients succeed.  If you're looking for someone to help you navigate your finances with confidence, Brian is the guy!

Brian has been a great financial advisor in helping me navigate the complex world of investments. He distills the information to make it understandable and provides the best advice based on me and my family future financial goals.

Garrick and Scott are very knowledgeable of their trade and have managed my account to our satisfaction. I tend to be in tune with the current financial trends and continue to be happy with the direction my account is going.

All the Cordant employees are top notch and easy to work with and look forward to working with them. They manage transactions quickly and professionally.

Well, I cannot express how thankful I am to have such an experienced financial expert looking after our retirement. Cassandra is so tuned into her clients current and FUTURE needs. I will pass her name around to family and friends. The personalized attention we are getting from you is so welcoming... Thanks for being you Cassandra!

Twin Peaks Wealth Advisors truly set the standard for Wealth Planning. They are terrific advisors, provide valuable insights and are always client focused.
Very knowledgeable advisors with great client service - I trust them with my savings and planning my future!

I have learned so much from David, in our meetings throughout the years.  I appreciate the values of The Other 90 Finacial,LLC. You can’t go wrong with wisdom and Godly values!

I’ve been working with twin peaks now for 2 years. They’ve really helped me with financial forecasting, planning, understanding stock and equity options, connecting me to tax accountants, and diversifying my account. I recently had the pleasure of working with Cordant for organizing and planning my family’s finances, and I must say, the experience has been nothing short of exceptional. From the very beginning, the Cordant team demonstrated a deep understanding of the financial landscape and a genuine interest in our specific needs and goals.

Their approach was both personalized and strategic, ensuring that every aspect of our financial plan was tailored to our unique situation. The level of detail and attention given to our portfolio was impressive, as is their ability to explain complex financial concepts in a way that was easy to understand.

Thanks to Cordant, we now have a clear and organized financial plan that aligns with our long-term objectives. Our investments are performing well, and we have a solid strategy in place for future growth and security.

In conclusion, I highly recommend Cordant to anyone seeking knowledgeable, attentive, and trustworthy wealth advisors. Their expertise and dedication have made a significant difference in our financial well-being.

My husband and I have been working with Brett for over 10 years now. Not only did Brett come with a wealth of experience and knowledge but the interest of us as a young family and wanting to guide us in our wealth planning for the future. He really gives us a sense of security knowing we can count on him in helping us make financial decisions for our retirement.

I looked to Brett to become my financial advisor about 10 years ago after I was turned off by my previous institutional "advisor in a box" seemed to only want to offer me certain products, clearly a sign that their advisors have a personal stake in getting me to sign up for something that either paid them some form of special commissions or otherwise.

I might with Brett after hearing good things from friends around his services and I particularly wanted to get a rolled over 401k into a more dynamic, actively managed portfolio.  I was most impressed in his understanding of my primary goal - to grow my wealth towards attaining an early retirement, but also keeping my risk as low as possible; as well as helping me understand all of the costs that I was going to need to consider to put my daughter's through college (and not having that ruin my retirement plans).

I'm happy to say every time my wife and I talk with Brett it feels to me like he's as good a friend to us as he is a personal advisor, not just a financial advisor.  We see eye to eye on priorities and I appreciate his advice very much!!
He knows me and my life. He knows me very well.

Newly working with her to navigate multiple big life and career changes. Cassandra was extremely helpful in helping me navagate purchasing a new car while separating finances from my ex husband. She was also very reassuring to me in areas where I thought I was struggling. She can give advice and help lead while simultaneously reinforcing the good things that I was already doing. Also she's just pleasant and wonderful to work with.
Great service and performance. I’ve been working with them since they started and they’ve always done well vs the market and met my goals.

Cordant has provided me with excellent financial advise the last eight years both while I was employed and as I eased into retirement.

The advisors have taken the time to get to know me personally, understanding my desired outcomes and concerns. Although I saved and invested when I was employed, I had a hazy understanding on how to best prepare for financial stability in retirement. When I became a client of Cordant, Scott, Garrick and Ryan partnered with me to put together a plan based not just on financial stability, but also my personal goals for retirement. I was able to retire feeling secure and eager to start enjoying my future plans as Cordant celebrated with me. I greatly appreciate them getting to know what is important to me and the encouragement provided to meet my goals.

I have complete confidence that Cordant will do what is in my best interest. In getting to know me, they learned my level of comfort with risk, made well thought suggestions and supported my decisions. During the pandemic, I became jittery about what was happening with the  stock market and Cordant put my mind at ease with individual conversations, news updates and Isaac's video casts. The team is professional, approachable, kind and friendly. My calls and emails are answered almost immediately. I look forward to our twice yearly meetings to review my current status and where I stand with my future plans. We’ve been with Cordant for over 15 years.  We were attracted because of Cordant’s adherence to their fiduciary duty and because of their attention to our needs and financial goals.  We are not aggressive investors, but not totally conservative investors either.  Our Cordant advisor, after evaluating our situation and asking about our risk tolerance, fashioned an investment strategy for us that bridged the extremes, that caused us (for the most part – see below) over the years to avoid the lowest lows, but caught a reasonable portion of the highs, and which, as the financial climate changed, ensured against sudden losses.  Chasing those highest highs too aggressively risks eating those lowest lows.  We made one serious financial mistake while with Cordant.  Against Cordant’s advice when the market crashed in 2008, we got out of the markets.  It was an emotional move and it cost us dearly as we missed a good portion of the following recovery.  We wish now we’d followed Cordant’s advice through that challenging time.
Our Cordant financial plan has been consistently tested using Montecarlo methods, giving confidence in their planning’s long term success.  We were not lead blindly along.  At each semiannual update, as well as between as questions have arisin, they explained their strategies, and strategy updates in terms that I could understand, and I’ve learned much from them over time.
I guess the highest recommendation I can give is that, as a naturally skeptical and curious person,  I have found no reason to leave Cordant even after all these years.

But wait...there's a bonus...what I appreciate most about working with Malissa is her coaching style and approach when working with me. She is quick to point out inconsistencies when my thinking doesn't align to my goals and desired outcomes. She offers a powerful balance of giving advise and asking thought provoking questions.

I will stop short of saying more and leave the readers with this: if you don't choose Malissa, someone else will.

Thank you, Malissa, for being that angel I had been looking for.

I would definitely recommend Twin Peaks to everyone looking for help with finances!
What a great experience with BMM! Scott is very responsive, always listens and has our best interests in mind. I feel very comfortable working with him and the BMM team.
So glad we found FFG to take care of our financial strategy and taxes.  It is reassuring that FFG is looking after us, allowing more time for us to focus on our retirement activities!

We have been with hunter for 3 years. He asked us about our goals and helped us map out a plan. He is encouraging with where to make cuts and help us reach our goals. He also lets us know when we need to re-look at our plan and adjust if needed. He is personable and very upstanding. We would recommend him to friends.

My wife and I have first met Ron Sanders nearly 15 years ago. He and his company have managed our retirement assets since that time. We have always been impressed with the service received and the financial performance achieved.

We have loved working with Richard, Tom and team at Fiduciary Financial Group. Bringing financial advice and tax into one place with a consistent approach is powerful. They are great listeners and help us think strategically about how to best achieve our financial goals. Thank you, FFG team!

Richard and team are absolutely fabulous fiduciaries with your money; I am a client of both their financial management and tax planning services. I had purposefully sought out these services to be "under one roof", but additionally, I needed a company knowledgeable in equity grants - FFG ticked all the boxes! Not only have Richard and Shayne helped me navigate my life events and financial changes, but I know they are simple call or email away to answering my questions, ANY time of year. Such a warm, friendly, personable team all around - highly recommend.

I'm glad that I was introduced to Hunter through a mutual friend.  He was instrumental in helping me begin my understanding of many different financial concepts.  I honestly don't think I'd be where I am without his guidance and wisdom.

We’ve done better with Ron in a year than we did with the big name franchise we were with for over 10 years. Ron is knowledgeable and trustworthy, patiently educates us regarding our choices as often as it takes, and is highly responsive.

Fiduciary Financial Group has been a real help and a trusted partner for us.  Trevor walked us through various options for our situation and once we settled on a plan FFG helped with all the paper work making for a very smooth process.  We have regular check-ins which prove very educational for me.  Highly Recommend.
Partners and staff are friendly, personal, thoughtful, responsive, and diligent. We could not ask for more from a financial advisor!

I had my first financial advisor meeting today with Charlie and it was such a wonderful experience. I felt very comfortable and it was pure conversation, no pressure at all. I'm grateful for the opportunity to work with Charlie and his team. Charlie was informative and provided great suggestions that will have my family and I setup for financial freedom. I can't wait to get settled so I could come back and get started! Thank you so much, and it was a pleasure meeting you! 😀

I have been associated with Chris Ward for almost 13 years. During that time, his professionalism, planning skills, comprehensive strategic thinking, and strong customer service and timely response has created a long-lasting relationship that will definitely continue into the future.
He continually strives to enhance his client relationship platform, to assist his clients in all dimensions of their financial and personal lives.

Hunter has great financial knowledge and works well with clients in all phases of life. He listens to your needs and goals and offers strategies to meet and exceed. Very timely to return calls and emails.
I enjoyed my initial meeting with Derrick. He was very helpful and thorough. He answered my many questions. Highly recommend!

My advisors proactively offer new investment ideas to diversify my portfolio and help me reach my financial goals. I especially love their strategy to help me save capital gains taxes on RSUs. They pride themselves on being there for my family at every life milestone. They are knowledgeable and trustworthy but differentiate themselves from other advisors by caring about their clients like family.

Vishal is an incredible entrepreneur and founder with a heart of gold. We met via Instagram through a simple cold DM and instantly connected on so many topics. You never know when and where you can meet people so always be open minded. Vishal has created a ton of value for entrepreneurs and tech folks between Silicon Valley and Silicon Alley. I wish him and his brother plus team the very best. Hustle on.

I’m a new client as of 2023 with Culbreth Wealth Management. I’ve been very pleased with the staff and they have been more then helpful with the technology side of things. They are patient and kind with all my questions and inquiries. Paul makes me feel very assured knowing that he has my best interest in mind while also growing my accounts. He is very reassuring and knowledgeable in helping me to know what is best for my future.
Would work with this team again in a heartbeat! Highly recommend.

I felt that I had financial planning and our portfolio mix in hand, but, following the accidental death of my brother, I realized that another opinion would be helpful, both as a check of my plans, and as financial input to my wife if something happens to me.  A part of my previous reluctance to involve a professional in our finances comes from my distaste of advisory fees structured as a percent of assets.  While I never searched for an advisor charging an hourly or fixed fee, all of the advisors that I was familiar with used the percent of assets fee structure.  On the recommendation of our son, a former colleague of Jim's at Dimensional, I called Jim, understanding that his firm provides financial advice on an hourly or fixed fee basis.  Jim and Sarah were able to meet with my wife and me a few days later.  In that meeting, Jim and Sarah made preliminary suggestions that I had never considered. They were clearly skilled advisors.  Following the meeting, I provided Jim statements of our accounts, and I input personal information into a secure template created for us and accessed through the Sanctuary website.  In a few weeks, Jim provided a written narrative and charts with suggested ETFs and their portfolio percentages for each of our accounts.  Jim followed with a videoconference attended by my wife and me.  Again, we were impressed.  I found that the changes Jim suggested were more aligned with our goals and risk tolerance than my own choices.  Also, Jim proposed funds that were less expensive than some I had.  My wife was completely comfortable with Jim and Sarah and their approach to financial advice, and she is relieved to know that she would have their help.  We have scheduled reviews with Jim every six months.  We highly recommend Jim and Sarah.

We have been coming to PAX for over 25 years and each time we come they all make us feel like family. Moncia explains everything to us so that we understand what is happening with our profile and helps us with our next steps. Now that I have taken the leap to PIVOT I can finally enjoy life. I know that Monic and the PAX team will take care of us like family. Even though I did not have much for the PAX team to manage for the last 20 years they never made me feel like they didn't care about us. They make you feel like family. They help you understand how your profile will grow based on your family needs. They truly care!!! I highly recommend using them for your financial needs. Monica, Becky and I can't thank you enough for always taking good care of us.

It has been truly a pleasure working with Jeff. I am a novice when it comes to finances, and the time we have spent working together has been education as well as enlightening. His one-on-one approach and tailoring to you as a client has eased my past anxiety when it came to choosing an advisor. I look forward to continuing to work with Jeff for many years to come. It's been a great experience.
Incredible to work with! Professional, transparent and a true expert.

Twin Peaks is fantastic! They really help people understand and manage their finances and long term wealth better. The team is super nice, professional, and well-connected. They genuinely care about their clients and provide authentic, personalized advice. Highly recommend them!

Vishal and his brother are thorough, smart, meticulous and care about clients. Financial planning is a serious endeavor, and requires high-level professionals. On that note, Twin Peaks delivers without a doubt!
Vishal and the Twin Peaks team are fantastic to work with. Their professionalism, relationship management, and sound financial advice make them a triple threat in the industry
Trusted friend and industry colleague
Big fan. Professional, sharp, and deeply client centered.
This team is pure class. They are thoughtful, supportive, and responsive. And of course, they do a great job building wealth for you and your family

Excellent use of technology with their very informative on demand portal.
They understand tech and complexities of tech compensation that is not so easy to risk manage against your inclination to double up risk in the same space as your work life.
Helped me avoid taking unnecessary risks in my personal investing.
Also helpful in other areas of importance such as wills trusts and life insurance. They are tax savvy in their advice and know when to direct you to outside professionals.
Chemistry is important in a trusted relationship to want to open up personal details.
Connected well with both husband and wife at our respective levels of interest and concerns.
Fees are in line with others and you do get better continuity of professional on your account in a boutique firm.
Most importantly they take you as a client early in your investing journey and that saves you from many unrecoverable rookie mistakes.
There client meetings and social events are at convenient locations both on east coast and west coast.
Five star is not easily given but well deserved in this case.

Cassandra has always been extremely helpful with explaining things, as well as handling things we may not be able to do.    She also cares about what we are doing and how we are doing in life.   We would not be where we are with out her!

I had a generally negative opinion of people in wealth management because of watching my parents go through a terrible past experience with different firm in another state.  I was upfront with Cassandra about my skepticism, and she explained to me how she is different from some financial advisors. (She is a highly qualified independent fiduciary -look that up)  I gave her a chance, and now I feel at ease and confident working with her.  Her professionalism, attention to detail, follow-through, knowledge and ethics are remarkable.  I really have nothing critical to say.  I'm highly impressed.
Very happy working with Peter

I am incredibly grateful for the guidance and support that Jim and Sarah from Sanctuary Financial Planning provided to help me transition my mom away from a traditional AUM manager and simplify her financial plan. They did a fantastic job with her Roth conversion strategy, modeling the potential benefits of converting her traditional IRA to a Roth IRA.

Jim and Sarah also assisted in simplifying my mom's investment portfolio, recommending a few low fee ETFs instead of several individual stocks. Their commitment to being fee-only financial planners really stood out, providing assurance that their advice was solely in my mom's best interest.

Both planners were highly professional, patient, and insightful. They made sure all our questions were answered and left us feeling confident in the financial decisions made. I highly recommend Jim and Sarah to anyone seeking competent and trustworthy financial guidance.

Sarah and Jim were absolutely fantastic to work with. As fee only advisors, they clearly have your best financial interest in mind. There were a few things that were really helpful for us as we were working through some personal and professional decisions that required some deeper financial analysis. First, they helped us generate scenarios based on the different courses of action that we might take. That helped us make more informed decisions. Second, they helped us re-prioritize our financial goals based on OUR values, not everyone else says we should be doing. Not only was there advice helpful, clear, and actionable, they are also fun! You can't go wrong with Sanctuary.

About three or four years ago I became aware of the concept of Biblically Responsible Investing (BRI), which was a big paradigm shift in my investment approach.  I had know Darryl Lyons, one of the founders of PAX, for quite some time and had always been impressed with his business acumen, along with his morals and values.  As I decided to take the step to actively focus on BRI and solicit the assistance of a Financial Advisor (FA), PAX was my first choice in local firms to approach. After discussing our financial desires and needs with Darryl, he connected my wife and I with Roger Stukkie.  Roger has been the consummate professional, alway adequately addressing our questions/needs, and going above and beyond to honor our non-typical requests - such as spending time reinforcing money principals to our four children (range from 5th-10th grade) with some of the basic concepts of money/investing (compounding interest, delayed gratification, etc.). My wife and I really appreciate having someone like Roger who understands our Christian values and desires, as well as his ability to create a relaxed environment to address financial concerns and sometimes differences in priorities that may surface.  We feel like we are in fantastic hands with PAX!  Big thanks to Roger, Darryl, and the whole PAX team!

advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®
review_text_raw: I met Ben and Cody earlier this year through a mentor/close friend. At the time, I was feeling overwhelmed and uncertain about my financial plan. Working with them has completely alleviated these feelings. They are incredibly dedicated, responsive and transparent and have simplified my financial planning/investment process. Their comprehensive financial plan is tailored to all of your individual short and long term goals, and their thought process is streamlined and easy to follow. I cannot recommend their services enough!

I cannot even begin to put into words what an incredible experience it has been working with Hazel.  I have had the pleasure of working very closely with Hazel and her team at Align Financial Solutions for the last few months.  My father was a loyal client of Hazel for many years and had the upmost respect and admiration for her. When he passed unexpectedly a few months ago, Hazel  immediately stepped in and assisted my mother and I every step of the way,  helping us understand and organize our finances and  educate us on estate planning, retirement and trust funds. Her kindness, compassion, dedication, patience and devotion to her clients far surpasses any professional in the field. I cannot recommend her services enough. As a single mother, Hazel has helped me feel more confident, empowered and educated. She  has guided and  assisted  my mother and I to make the best decisions for our family using her extensive knowledge and expertise. We look forward to working with her for many years to come people.

Fiduciary Financial Group has been a game-changer for my investments, especially my Roth IRA.  As a high net worth investor, I appreciate their fiduciary focus,  meaning they're legally bound to prioritize my needs. They don't push products for commissions, and their fees are transparent.

Their team's experience goes beyond investments, considering my entire financial picture, including taxes and estate planning. This holistic approach gives me a cohesive strategy for long-term growth. If you're looking for a trustworthy partner to navigate your investments, Fiduciary Financial Group is a great choice.

The team at Define Financial is excellent across the board. Their advice and portfolio management greatly exceeds the cost. I don't have to worry about the markets--my advisor is doing that for me while I get to enjoy improving my golf game.

Brett has been very helpful to us as we transition from working to retirement. He has helped us make sound decisions about our investments, provided excellent counsel regarding saving vs. spending, and has really helped us adjust our mindset from saving and preparing for retirement to enjoying our retirement in a responsible way. He is very responsive to our questions and his suggestions are always well thought out, researched, and spot-on. He has shown us that he has our best interests in mind and any advice reflects that.  In fact, the name of his company - Eudamonia - reflects his belief and commitment to ensuring that his clients are able to enjoy, through thought and design, happy and well-lived lives.
Always there to answer any questions you have.  Very friendly and outgoing!  Glad to have them helping me!

As a client of Masuda Lehrman Wealth, I have had the pleasure of working directly with Daniel. Daniel’s professionalism and personalized approach make him a standout in wealth management. Highly recommend for anyone looking to secure their financial future!

Hazel has been most helpful in guiding us on our financial journey.  Hannah, her Administrative Assistant, has been a wonderful help with any questions we have had.  Hazel and Hannah are always willing to take the time to listen and guide...most appreciated.

review_text_raw: Glad to work with these two smart guys! They are very patient and nice. They did much more than you expected, and that is also the comment from my friends who work with them. Emilio is very polite, and professional. I highly recommend him as a financial counselor

advisor_name: Victor J. Medina, CELA®, CFP®, RICP®
review_text_raw: I haven’t been working with Victor and his team for very long, but I already know I’m in good hands.  Their professionalism and expertise are truly confidence-inspiring, and their willingness to listen and adjust to questions and concerns makes you feel you are  an integral part of the process.

Quentara has been an invaluable resource for my husband and me. As we entered our 60’s we had no idea how to evaluate our financial readiness for retirement.  Our retirement savings were in over 8 different accounts, some of which we learned were not yielding a good interest.  Quentara advised us and held our hand through the process of timely transferring each account to a single retirement fund.
Our second step was to get all our financial information on one wealth management platform from which Quentara is able to provide sound advice regarding retirement planning and current spending. It came in handy when shortly after getting a small mortgage to cover a home renovation, my husband wanted to upgrade his car.  I thought for sure that it would impact our retirement plan but after running it by Quentara we learned it would have no significant impact!
Quentara always provides quick and thorough responses to our questions in a way we can understand. She is clearly passionate about her work and dedicated to her client’s financial welfare. We have been equally happy with referrals she has provided to our accountant and estate attorney. Working with Quentara is a pleasure and has given us confidence and peace of mind with our finances and retirement planning.  We highly recommend exploring whether she is a good fit for your financial needs and goals!

During my divorce in 2017, all of our shared assets were liquidated and I was in an “all” cash position at a time when interest rates were around 1%.  Having experienced big losses in the 2000 bust and again in the 2008 housing bust, 10 years later I did not have the confidence to make a move back into the market.  Russ came highly recommended to me by another financial consultant as a person ideal for my situation. He got to know my goals and values, guided me through his plan to reinvest me into the markets, created an investment model and retirement path. He regularly checked up with me and we would discuss any updates for the model. It was all easily understood and mapped out the risks/ rewards with clear charts and graphs.
He’s always been very responsive and easy to reach. Exactly what I needed!
Jeff has been a pleasure to work with. He is transparent, keeps his clients updated and answers all questions in a timely manner.

They are so knowledgeable! I knew what I wanted for myself for the future but I didn’t know how to jumpstart. After leaving I felt so comfortable with the next steps and ready to tackle these goals for myself. Highly highly recommend!
Jeff has been very helpful . And has help us understand investing. He has been fast to respond to our questions and concerns. I would recommend him.
Joseph provides very useful advice.  He never tries to sell me anything.  When we have a meaning he is always well prepared.  I really enjoy meeting with them.
Has been very helpful in our financial planning. Very accommodating to our schedule. Prompt response time.
The Berkshire team has been very helpful and easy to work with through the years.

Our family has worked with the team at Legacy Consulting Group for over 25 years.  During that time, we have had complete trust in their abilities to take us through life's transitions - children's education, retirement planning, moves, elder parent care, insurance protection, as well as outside factors such as employer bankruptcies and stock market swings.  Through all this, because of Legacy's calm, professional, individualized care, we have never felt that we have to "lie awake at night" worrying about family finances.  There was always a well thought out plan in place for any transitional need.  We highly recommend the team at Legacy, and continue to trust them with our financial resources.

I needed a financial advisor to check my F.I.R.E. calculations, but wanted a fee-only advisor that was a true fiduciary. Kevin was perfect for me. He helped me think through scenarios that I had not factored in, while also stress testing my finances and running various scenarios for my property portfolio (selling vs. keeping). More importantly, I have access to online software where I can change my situation easily to model different lifestyle choices as my life changes, and see those impacts immediately. It was exactly what I needed. Ultimately, his fee was affordable and I now have the peace of mind that I can move forward with my desired plan. Highly recommend.
Russ has kept my investments balanced and he is always there when I have questions or needs. Great guy!

Daniel has been helping my wife and I for over 4 years. He has a particular gift for understanding our needs and goals then translating our aspirations into tangible financial actions that are simple, yet effective. Daniel’s honestly and openness during the most challenging times of our financial environment have helped me gain unwavering confidence in his ability. I recommend Daniel to those who are looking for a candid financial advisor with proven success and confidence.

I recently met with Daniel for a consultation and it was immediately clear how knowledgeable he is. He presented different options and recommendations in a way that was easy to understand and helped give me confidence in how my short and long term investments should be set up to meet my goals.

I look forward to working more with Daniel in the future and would highly recommend his services to anyone looking for help with their financial planning!
Peter Coughlin was very helpful and thorough with all of our questions and concerns.

Always provide excellent financial advice in a warm, friendly and personal manner- the team prepares for my individual needs and is
easy to work with!! Highly recommend their services.

Chose option inadvertently; James is not only an outstanding financial advisor, but also an amazing person. I am fortunate to know him and have him on my team. James has been incredible in supporting me during this terribly difficult time of my life. He went above and beyond his routine duties to meet with me, evaluate and explain my current financial situation, and advise on how to move forward.

I highly recommend Jeff as a financial planner. His extensive experience, impressive qualifications, and genuine dedication to helping people achieve financial independence set him apart in the industry.
With nearly two decades of experience evaluating investments, retirement plans, and insurance offerings, Jeff has the knowledge and expertise to navigate even the most complex financial situations. His CERTIFIED FINANCIAL PLANNER™ and Certified Student Loan Professional designations demonstrate his commitment to staying up-to-date with the latest financial strategies and solutions.
What I appreciate most about Jeff is his approachable and caring demeanor. He takes the time to understand each client's unique goals and challenges, and develops personalized plans to help them make positive financial decisions early on. His focus on helping individuals and families become financially independent, rather than just catering to those who are already wealthy, is a testament to his integrity and passion for his work.
Beyond his professional achievements, Jeff is a cool individual with diverse interests. From playing classical and rock piano to weightlifting and public speaking, he brings a clear and focused mind to his client meetings. As a family man himself, he understands the importance of balancing financial planning with enjoying life's precious moments. I enjoy all our meetings and all his stories!
If you're looking for a trusted advisor who will put your best interests first and help you create a solid financial foundation for your future, I wholeheartedly recommend Jeff at Create Wealth Financial Planning.

Excellent personal service.  We have a close, personal relationship with Peter who is super responsive and attentive to our needs and our portfolio.  We have been pleased with investment results over many years and highly recommend him.

When I was with 2 other brokerage companies, I would get a call from someone who said they were my new account manager and  wanted to get caught up.  Not at BMM. Peter has been on top of my account for many years, keeping us aware of positive and negative events that could affect account and provide adjustments. Certainly pleased with BMM and Peter for their services, support,  professional, and personal attention to our particular needs.

I have trusted Jared, Scott and Allen for over a decade.

They have managed the good times and protected against the bad.

very attentive and knowledgeable.

My husband’s death at the beginning of COVID was devastating and I needed advice, both short and long term.  I will always be grateful that Trevor had been recommended to me.  I was impressed from the beginning not only with his financial expertise, but with his patience and understanding in educating me about my situation and my options.  He has taken the time to learn about my family, my goals, and my comfort level surrounding money issues.  I can sleep at night because I know that he is part of a team that can offer a broad range of support in any financial situation.  I wholeheartedly recommend Trevor and the FFG team to anyone seeking advice on financial matters, but especially women who find themselves in unfamiliar terrain.

I found Taylor Schulte through his Live Wealthy podcast which I can highly recommend! When we learned their team was accepting new clients, we quickly got in touch to see if they may be a good fit for us. We had just recently retired and we felt that our "traditional financial planner" was not meeting our needs. We met with Taylor and Tyler, and to say we were BLOWN AWAY is not strong enough! These guys have Retirement Planning dialed in!! They were very thorough, asked the right questions and came through with a complete financial plan that was easy to understand and covered many things we had yet to think about. They showed us how Roth conversions could make a huge difference in our lifetime tax bill.  They uncovered the (often mysterious ) fees we were paying within our various accounts and helped us simplify the assets to make them more manageable. For MANY years we paid our advisor but did not feel we were receiving what we needed. We couldn't articulate what we were missing because you don't know what you don't know!!  Taylor and Tyler turned the lights on for us and we are very grateful. I also must mention that their office manager, Karen, is WONDERFUL too! She is professional, kind, proactive, and wonderful at detail and follow-up - she plays a critical part! These are ALL-STARS, and if you are seeking a team for your financial planning needs - look no further!!

Larry at Optimum has been our financial advisor and retirement planner for almost two years now, and our decision to use his services turned out to be one of the best financial decisions we've ever made. I'm pretty savvy about the market, mutual funds, and investment in general, and for most of my life I've told myself that there was no need for a financial advisor- just put it all in a no-load, stock market tracking mutual fund. Simple, right? Well, it wasn't until we were faced with an important decision that we decided to look for an advisor. Larry not only guided us expertly through that decision, but he has been instrumental in several key decisions and actions since then that I would not have even seen. Larry and Optimum have always been there for us, and have always been thorough, insightful, fair, and fun to work with. We are very happy that we were fortunate enough to have found him.

I am a fifty nine year old married CPA who retired last year after 30+ years working in risk management at an international bank.  Larry has helped my wife and I navigate this transition with the utmost expertise and professionalism.  Coming from the financial services industry, we had been customers of my former bank’s private banking retirement services for many years. After interviewing several planners, I was very impressed with the insight that Larry provided on investment strategies, tax planning, and income withdrawal. He expertly walked both me and my wife (who is a preschool teacher) through the details and answered all our questions.  He spoke to both of us equally and patiently navigated our many questions.   I only wish we had been able to meet with him earlier in our journey.  It is a pleasure to work with an advisor who is knowledgeable in so many preretirement and post retirement planning strategies.  At the same time, he never hesitates to say he needs to get back to you, if necessary, on a technical question or provide a sounding board for different ideas.
We've worked with Allan, Scott, and their team for years, always responsive, a full line of services, and we trust they have our best interest at heart.

FFG has been absolutely wonderful for me.  My dad passed away last year and left me some inheritance.  I met with Richard and he took the time to take my full story, ask about my plans and aspirations, and get to know me.  He then made conservative recommendations that he has greatly exceeded in the ~1 year we have been working together.

I feel very well taken care of even though I am a smaller account.  Richard is also a true fiduciary, making recommendations that do not benefit his business, but instead gain my trust.  I trust him wholeheartedly with my finances and look forward to working with him and his staff for the foreseeable future.

PS. If FFG wasn't already awesome enough, they sent me high-end edible treats on my birthday and Christmas.  Thank you Richard and crew for a true high-end experience.

My wife and I have been working with Ayad to manage our financial planning since 2016 when he was with another firm.  When Ayad moved to Wealthcare of the Lehigh Valley, we moved with Ayad. Through our interactions with Ayad, we became confident that his knowledge of financial matters is substantial, that he absolutely looks out for our best interests, and that he is completely honest in dealing with us.  We appreciate Ayad and the integrity and expertise he provides us.  We would recommend his services without reservation.

We feel blessed to have Gary as our financial advisor. Gary is attention to details X 1,000 %, responsive, & throughly the BEST !

Not only did he give info that has helped my family set ourselves up for financial success, he communicated in a way that was easy to understand. Birkshire Money Management has been handling my investments for the past 10 years.  Scott Little, as well as everyone on the BMM team, has provided me with excellent advice, education and services.  I feel very comfortable in retirement that our best interest is being accounted for and we will fully be able to enjoy those things we love to do.
Thanks BMM for creating an environment and financial service that leaves me knowing we are in the hands possible.

Highly recommend Wharton Wealth Planning. You are in the hands of a very experienced money manager, who is not cookie cutter in his approach, and takes a holistic view of our portfolio. He has guided us for many years through good and bad economic conditions. He considers all aspects of our short - and long-term goals and needs while keeping focus to reduce taxes and risks.  We realized immediate benefit from the concentration in the portfolio relative to our previous money manager. He is very smart (MBA from Wharton) and is also a CFP, which gives him the knowledge to guide us in any personal financial situation. He listens, is easy to work with, and is very responsive. I can't say enough good after switching to Wharton Wealth Planning.

I highly recommend Dwight and Winding Trail for fee-only fiduciary financial planning.  Dwight provided a very thorough assessment of my current financial picture, my planning needs, and he created a customized and very comprehensive approach which far exceeded my expectations.  Because Dwight also has a background as a CPA, he was often able to provide insight about how financial planning choices might impact taxes and vice versa.  I appreciated having this integrated approach.  Financial planning can be complicated, but Dwight always explained things clearly in a way I could understand and documented it all in writing so I can go back to review our plan any time.   His service more than paid for itself and was a great value.  I can't recommend him highly enough!

I moved my Retirement fund to Berkshire Money Management in 2018. The focus and interaction with the BMM financial group has been more than our previous experience. Peter Coughlin and his team have provided us with a piece of mind that, in spite of the volatility in the markets, they had a specific plan for us and guided us with great customer service. The convenience of having someone “Local” is a bonus. Peter is accessible and proactive in reaching out to us on a regular basis. Thank you BMM – Bob & Peg Cimini

I am pretty hopeless with financial matters. I tend to buy high and sell low. I am so thankful that I hooked up with BMM when I did, in 2008. Through recession and good times they have been fabulous. Both Allen Harris and Scott Little. I mainly see Scott these days. He is a pleasure to talk to. We can talk about financial issues, family issues, you name it. He is always sympathetic to where I am, and what my comfort level is regarding risk etc. I can't recommend them too highly!

advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®
review_text_raw: We highly recommend working with Fully Financial! From the very first meeting we had, we knew that Ben and Cody would be a great fit for us. They made it clear that they’d always have our best interests in mind. We initially met with expectations of getting a handle on our investments and planning for retirement, but we have come out with so much more. From the beginning, they’ve helped us develop a customized, comprehensive, yet flexible financial plan that we feel confident in applying- not only our short, mid, and long term goals, but everything in between. Financial decisions can be stressful, but Ben and Cody truly make things feel easy. They are both excellent communicators and do a wonderful job of explaining things in a way that makes sense. We appreciate that they are always available to answer questions, no matter how big or small. It is evident that they both have a passion for helping clients reach their goals. We are so grateful to be clients of Fully Financial!

Peter and Berkshire Money management has been a wonderful financial advisor. Peter has a clear understanding of our financial needs and our goals and has provided us with sound financial advise and guidance.
We highly recommend Berkshire Money Management and their services and look forward to working with Peter way into the future.
MEC/FJC

Peter at Berkshire Money Management has been a pleasure to work with throughout the years. The attention to detail and sincere thoughtfulness of our family and future goes well beyond the “typical” Financial Manager.
The ENTIRE Staff at BMM is extremely helpful and we are happy to be part of their “family”.
Matthew P.

Have known Dan for over 40 years and have trusted my financial planning to him for almost 20 years. Always looking out for your best interests and never pushing something on you to benefit him. Great guy and great company to trust with your financial goals.

Daniel is the definition of a fiduciary and always puts his clients interest. What sets him apart is his ability to listen and create solutions that are truly customized to his clients situation. From estate planning to portfolio tax efficiency, Daniel does an amazing job. If you're not sure if fee only financial advice is for you, reach out to Daniel. He's very responsive.   Highly recommend.

Beacon wealth holds high standards in all facets of their business. With one on one visits, they offer a personal touch, truly listen and create an honest relationship. We’ve experienced financial gain, peace of mind and exceptional care like we never had before. We highly recommend them. They are fully invested in their clients and will exceed your expectations.

We have been working with Rick, Cassie, and the Beacon Wealth team for nearly a decade. We appreciate their friendly and honest approach, but most importantly their desire to honor God through their investment strategies.

Communication has always been open and transparent with consistent feedback and solid advice as they’ve monitored our investments. We’ve been blessed to be part of the Beacon Wealth family and plan to continue working with them for many years.

Phil has been my financial consultant for 6 years, helping me navigate my investments with professionalism.  He listens to what my financial goals are for retirement, and helps me plan to meet those goals.  I highly recommend you get the benefit of his expertise as you plan for your future.

My husband, Jim, in his job as the director of a park district for many years, was researching a retirement plan for park employees and came across Berkshire Money Management. Jim saw that it was showing excellent gains and started  contributing to that retirement account on a regular basis.
The family has worked with Scott Little at BMM for many years with the personal touch of frequent telephone calls. Scott was there and is always there with helpful suggestions and advice. We would encourage anyone looking for financial investment to contact Scott at BMM.

BMM has been in our family since the early days, when they were operating out of a storefront in a strip mall. Since then I have been through a divorce, the 2008 meltdown, and my father passing. And through it all, Scott Little has been my rock. He has such a calm demeanor and really understands the emotional component of investing. Besides that, the paltry sum I invested post-divorce has tripled in value.  Even though I have been taking monthly withdrawals for years, my portfolio keeps increasing. Because of BMM, and especially Scott Little, I never worry about my investments.
Scott has been wonderful to work with. He is very responsive and consistently value-add.  Looking forward to working with Scott and the team many more years

Thank you Peter for your visit.  As always, very informative and quick to answer our concerns and questions.  We are very pleased with you and Berkshire Money Management in how you have handled our accounts.  Here's hoping its another prosperous year.
Sincerely
Jim & Kim Kuni

My wife Sharon and I started working with Peter Coughlin and his team at Berkshire Money Management while going into retirement a couple years ago, and we couldn’t be happier! Coming from a mostly faceless advisor it’s been a real treat. In addition to knowing our finances are being managed well, based on updates and in-person meetings, we are very appreciative of the BMM retirement platform. This includes estate planning, which along with Peter’s great communication and guidance, helped us complete our future plan and goals. He and the rest of the BMM team also gave us the strategy to optimize our Social Security benefits with direction on when and how to file our claims. Thanks to their efforts and guidance we are confident in our financial future. Well done BMM!

Scott from Berkshire Money Management has done a great job managing my parents’ account over the many years. When my dad became ill and needed extra financial support, it was a gift not to have any financial worries. Then, after my dad passed away, Scott was there to guide us on getting everything in order and making adjustments as needed. It makes us feel so blessed to have that support!
I got hung up on twice and i'd never spoken to anyone from here before

John has always been cheerfully responsive, informative, timely in his distribution of articles that are pertinent to your age and lifestyle, and willing to discuss and or explain reasons for any suggestions he makes. Young clients, and potential clients, would do well to listen to his experience.

I love Dentist Advisors.  I have been a client for maybe 6 years or so.  Can't say enough good things about them.  I appreciate how thorough they have been.

They keep all of my finances, loans, insurance and everything else well organized.  I love their dashboard that gives me a quick snapshot anytime I want.

They are not pushy and I have never felt they are trying to sell me anything.  I am able to reach out whenever I want and get their thoughts on a purchase, or whatever situation I am in.

Recommend a thousand times over!

I feel very comfortable with his work and it is a testament to our confidence in Ron that we do not live in the same metropolitan area as One Advisory Partners.

He has always been honest, transparent and willingly addressed my questions and explained my options.  I am grateful for the direction Scott Little has taken my investments.  I am very thankful for his stewardship of my assets and I highly recommend you consider this company for your peace of mind.

He has never steered me wrong.

BMM has been managing my portfolio for 15+ years. Scott and team also offer a comprehensive wealth/retirement planning service that helps guide clients as they build for a sound financial future.   I have benefitted greatly from this service and knowledge (which is provided to clients free of charge).

We have been working with Berkshire Money Management for many years.  We feel confident that they have our best interest in mind. He is a pleasure to work with and we enjoy our visits.

We met with Peter C. whom we have known and dealt with over the years at Berkshire Money Management.  We felt very secure with Peter's suggestions as to how to invest our money.  Thank you Peter and thank you Berkshire Money Management.  They make you feel like family and they provide an awesome service.
This company really cares about its customers. Great service,great staff. Dan Bennett does an amazing job

I have no doubt that I will be working with Zeneith Wealth Partners again in the future. Their dedication to their clients' success is unmatched, and I trust them wholeheartedly with my financial needs. They are simply the best.

Scott does a great job for us

So many great things to say about Berkshire Money Management and Scott Little and the team at Berkshire.  We have used Berkshire for many years and cannot express to you how grateful we are.  Scott is on top of what is happening and therefore is constantly watching the financial happenings and what is happening in the world and is absolutely on top of any changes needed. My wife and I worked with Jordan, and we have nothing but the best things to say. He was very attentive, patient, and had a quick turnaround with his recommendations. I highly recommend working with Jordan if you're thinking about getting your finances in order, you certainly won't be disappointed.
Nothing but positive to say about this group. Excellent investments and Peter and staff are very accommodating and thorough. Great experience.

We have been using Dan Miller with One Advisory for over a decade. Dan's knowledge and personal touch are amazing. Always available to answer questions for our entire company. His availability and knowledge put him over the top. One of the best decisions our company has made.

LLC and Dan Miller as your financial adviser!

Making Dan Miller my financial advisor has been one of the best decisions I have ever made. He has been my go-to-guy for personal financial planning a number of years. After my divorce, I was confused about many areas of money management and planning for my retirement. BMM has managed my finances for decades and done a terrific job.  Fantastic customer service!  I would highly recommend.

I have been with Berkshire since the beginning...outstanding customer service for many years and they provide various no cost perks.  I trust them with all of my family retirement funds.

I contacted Tuyyo Planning Group with some questions about retirement account rollovers and spoke with Luis. Not only was he incredibly responsive but he went above and beyond by providing advice for a few tax-related factors I had not considered. Prompt, courteous, and knowledgeable!

We are in our 70s, and Carman became our Financial Advisor at the perfect time.  He guided us through all things financial as we transitioned from our retirement home of 16 years to the Continuing Care Community where we live now. We’ve applied his wise suggestions for preserving our assets, ensuring our charitable contributions will continue, making better decisions about taxes, and setting up our long-term-care plans as we age.  Carman is an A++ advisor, and now also a good friend.

Mike presents his expertise and insights in a digestible format that is easy to understand. We enjoy how he tailors to our financial situation and how he understands navigating from active duty to planning for retirement and everything in between. I  have received the benefits of BMM and Scott Little"s guidance for over twenty years. Scott and the entire BMM team have been great over the past few years I have worked with them. Knowledgeable, responsive, and always available. I have been very comfortable following their advice and know I am in good hands. Highly recommend.

We have been working with Mitlin Financial for 8 + years. We can honestly say that Larry and his team take care of our portfolio as if we were family. Larry, Jorrell and Carmen are available whenever we need them and guide us through any questions and concerns we have. It is a pleasure working with each and every one of the team and we would recommend them to everyone.

Just Scott Little a call.

Our Investment Advisor, Scott Little is a fantastic partner in whole life planning .

Since then, Scott has been doing a great job advising us along the way with excellent suggestions.   With his help, we have our retirement and estate planned and our portfolio has done well considering the volatility of the market.  We have quarterly reviews with Scott and we know we can call him anytime.   We like doing business close to home and Scott understands us!   Thank you Scott.     — James

Berkshire Money Management has handled my investment portfolio for many years with good results.   I have confidence in their decisions and I appreciate the communication and that my advisor is always available to answer any questions I might have.

BMM is top shelf. Scott Little and his team Lauren & Zack provided a very thorough financial planning assessment. Very qualified and knowledgeable!

George and I had been with an investment firm that promised many things they never got to deliver. We are so grateful to have found Archer Investments. Extremely trustworthy, and professional firm. Nate is very personable and smart. Explains things in a way you can understand.  We trust him 100% with our money.  Highly Recommend .

We are so happy we moved to BMM!  Nate is fantastic. He is friendly, smart and always knows how to help us with our long term financial needs. We are doing so much better since moving to them than we were doing on our own. We highly recommend using them to support your financial planning goals.

I would like to say a very heartfelt thank you to Richard, Trevor, and the entire team at the Boise office. They truly are a fiduciary.  They always put my interest first. They are guiding my happy retirement with care and precision.

advisor_name: Jonathan L. Booze, J.D., CFP®, AIF®
review_text_raw: Jon truly is amazing at what he does as well as being honest, brilliant, and wise. So thankful we have him in our financial corner!

review_text_raw: I’ve been working with Jon for the last year or so. He has helped my wife and me get our financial house in order and determine where we stand for retirement. He’s recommended people to help with estate planning, is helping us invest more wisely, has provided great advice regarding the difficult decisions to purchase additional life insurance and long-term care insurance, and has already helped us reduce our tax burden significantly. I’ve referred multiple people to him and will continue to do so. My only regret is that I did not hire him years earlier.

John and MDRN Wealth has been so helpful in getting my finances in order. I don’t have the best financial mind, and John has been so great at explaining everything. He is always incredibly prompt and willing to help with even the smallest tasks. I would recommend him to all my family and friends!

advisor_name: Jonathan L. Booze, J.D., CFP®, AIF®
review_text_raw: Upon a recommendation, we were introduced to Jon Booze and after a couple of meetings, we moved our investment and IRA accounts to One Advisory Partners. We found that OAP’s fiduciary philosophy was a very good match to ours and gives us the benefit of having an advisor that is younger than this retired couple. Jon has made a few non-investment recommendations for asset protection, if we were interested he would make a referral, which demonstrates that he is truly a financial advisor vs. an investment advisor. Find and selecting the right financial advisor may be one of the most impactful decisions we make in our lifetime and we believe we made a great choice in working with Jon. We highly recommend Jon Booze for your consideration when selecting a financial advisor.

Robert Warren and his team of professional, caring staff have continually provided me with solid financial options, educated decisions, and a sense of peace in knowing they actively monitor my financial portfolio. They have come alongside me during hardship and have continued to bring assurance and support in my financial future. I highly recommend this family oriented, professional and progressive financial advisor. Thank you for your ongoing support for our family!

Robert Warren is a financial planner who inspires confidence in his clients. Robert explains everything about the investment. He gives the client alternative illustrations and guides the client without being overbearing:
I have every confidence in his expertise and complete confidence he will always have my best interest at heart.
I would and have recommended Robert to others.
Thank you.
Thank you Justin for guiding me through the difficult process of choosing Life Insurance.  Your compassion and patience were most appreciated. I’m stunned by your vast knowledge… well done!!

I subscribed to Russ' Wealthcare for Women newsletter 3 years ago after divorcing at 57. I took seriously his prompt to write with questions. When I did, he decided my question merited a phone conversation. Because he consistently focuses on the lifestyle and values of his clients, he is well-practiced at listening carefully and asking the sorts of incisive questions that help to clarify my motives and objectives. I recently worked through mortgage refinance options with him, and believe I've made the best decision for the present largely because I knew my options.

We've both rescued mutts of dubious parentage and like to discover new music, so we have friendly conversation around those topics. He's very personable and easy going, and regarded as a family friend at my house though we've never met. His business phone is in the contacts on the house phone, and I've told my daughters to call him with money questions if something happens to me and they need help. I ran that past him first--he was okay with it. I always feel sorry for any friend of mine who has failed to take my recommendation to at least subscribe to his newsletter.
Fantastic advisor! I recently completed graduate school, and Tamara helped me get on the right financial path as I start my new career.

A great team all around, though Partheev Shah really stands out with his attention to service, detail, and organizational needs. Jason Ray is a great leader and we're lucky to have Zenith based in Philadelphia.

I've had the absolute pleasure of working with the advisors at BMM for the better part of a year now. In my role as a consultant for financial planning firms, I come across a lot of different firms' cultures and advisors and I can wholeheartedly say that BMM and their team are some of the most kind and competent folks who's #1 focus is on great outcomes and relationships with their clients. I've been hired to help them elevate their client experience (this goes to show that they are willing to invest in their client relationships!) but little do they know, I've learned a ton of valuable insight from them in this process as well. In getting a look "under the hood" of their business, I can confidently recommend BMM to anyone considering working with them.

I hardly know where to start with this review. Honestly, I’d give Trevor and the whole team at FFG 10 stars out of 5.

Last year, I went through a divorce, and for the first time in 30 years, I had to learn to manage my own money, something my husband had always taken care of. I quickly realized what a mistake i had made in not keeping my knowledge in the financial arena up to date. As I tried to navigate my way through bank accounts, the stock market, IRA’s  and pensions, one thing became quite clear: I wanted someone to help guide me. Not to take over completely, but to give me advice and be a resource I could come to with my multitude of questions.

I was lucky enough to get Trevor’s name from someone who was already working with him. I was surprised how quickly I felt comfortable with him. There was never any pressure to sign on, simply a wealth of knowledge and experience that he was happy to share.

He introduced me to the other members of the FFG family, and I was delighted to learn that I could turn to them for help with taxes and legal issues (such as forming a new trust and updating my will and AHCD).They are a most comprehensive group!

I must say though, my favorite part of working with FFG has been having Trevor as my financial advisor. From the start, he made me feel right at home, always ready to patiently answer any question. Even if I text him on a weekend, and tell him there’s no need to get back to me before Monday, before the hour is up, he has reached out with a text or call. He’s an excellent mentor for me, willing to share as much as I want to know about the stock market and other financial concerns, without overloading me with more esoteric details, unless I ask for them. He even had his team sort out a complicated brokerage account issue for my ex-husband and myself, as well as filing our joint tax return at no additional expense.

Truly, throughout what has been a quite trying year for me, Trevor and the whole family at FFG have been a welcome reassuring place to turn. Choosing FFG remains one of the best decisions I’ve made in a long while. I would happily recommend them to friends and family alike.

Highly Recommend:

We were really comfortable with Kevin. I also knew I wanted a fee only financial planner who was not trying to take over management of our funds.  Kevin fit the bill with his low cost one fee program.

Using a highly detailed financial software tool, Kevin was great in helping us to generate and test various goals through the tool.  When I wanted to test options, such as comparing whether to pay off a mortgage early or buy a vacation home out of state, Kevin patiently created what I called the "tiles" in the software for each goal.  Once the tiles were created, it was easy to test the probability of success in never running out of money while factoring these goals together or in the alternative.

We live in Missouri and Kevin lives in Florida.  This was not an issue as all meetings took place over Zoom video conference calls.  Prior to each meeting, Kevin sent us a calendar invite where we chose the meeting times (usually evening) best for us.  At the conclusion our meetings and setting up the financial tool, we concluded that we could retire immediately instead of two years down the road.

I have already shared Kevin's contact information and process with three of my co-workers and my daughter, and I will continue to spread the word as Kevin offers such a great value and service to his customers.  It is great having the extra validation of our financial future.  Thank you so much Kevin.

Chris and Laurie

I cannot recommend enough making an investment in yourself and working with Amir.

My wife and I have been with Brett for two years now and have been very happy with his services. I have been able to bounce investment and business ideas off him and get thoughtful feedback.

Zenith Wealth Partners isn't just a company; they've become a trusted ally in my journey. Their personalized approach to cash flow management and investing has empowered me to make smarter decisions, leading to enhanced profitability and a secure financial future. Grateful for the genuine care and expert guidance that sets them apart!

I have known David and his success in managing money for years. Not only is David incredibly smart and skilled at what he does but he also acts with the highest ethical standards and is kind and responsive.  I have not hesitated to recommend David to my friends and to my elderly mother after my stepfather passed away last fall.  David has been very patient spending time explaining everything to my mother and he has walked her through all phases of setting up her account. I highly recommend David and know that anyone who has the opportunity to invest through him will be very happy with their decision.

John Henry clearly has a passion for finance, mathematics and teaching. He is able to beautifully explain complex topics and financial strategies in very accessible ways, without coming across as condescending. Not only this, but he is also passionate about people, he approaches his work with compassion and puts his clients needs first. He took the time to understand my unique set of circumstances and challenges in life and helped devise a plan that was tailored to what my needs. With John's help I feel confident in the financial goals that I have set and empowered to move forward in life knowing I am making the most of my finances for today and for my future.

My partner and I have been working with Abundo for about 9 months now, and it has been such a great experience. We work with Olivia who has been wonderful from the start. She took the time to get to know us and tailor suggestions and recommendations that fit our financial goals. A lot of the information presented was new to me, but not to my partner, so she really took the time to explain things and answer all my questions. She never made me feel uncomfortable for not being expert on the subject. It's been such a good balance of support for both our needs.

I was recently laid off and she has been an asset and has helped to come up with my temporary financial plan until I find my next full time employment making both me and my partner feel financially stable during this time.

We highly recommend Abundo and especially Olivia. She has gone above and beyond in helping us on our financial journey and has been there for us every step of the way.

We worked with Jordan and had a fantastic experience. We hadn't had a professional look our plan in a few decades and he took him time and told us all the reports he needed and after reading all of it presented us a very detailed analysis and plan options. It was just what we needed and would highly recommend him and his dad. And their rate was reasonable and they only bill for their time.

I highly recommend David R. from Wharton Wealth Planning. David helped my wife and I through some financial analysis for a house purchase, that included some complex factors including a commercial loan, tenant income calculation, and a comparative analysis versus other fully residential multi-unit properties. I had reached out to other planners before this, but they were not comfortable with such a complex scenario, but David handled it quickly and with ease. We even conversed back and forth on some additional potential scenarios that helped strengthen our conviction on making the right decision for our family. No hard sell, no conflict of interest, just great advice that was worth my time/money.

Thanks again David!

Working with Dr. John Henry has been truly transformative. His unique ability to demystify complex financial concepts, delivered with genuine warmth and a big heart, sets him apart. His distinguished career across renowned firms and academic institutions underscores his deep knowledge and ethical commitment to his clients' best interests. Yet, what truly makes John a game-changer is his unparalleled ability to inspire and lead. He tackles financial puzzles with a passion and intelligence that brings about those 'aha' moments, making every project not just a task but a collective journey towards success.

John's dedication is remarkable, seamlessly blending professional expertise with a sincere care for those he works with. He's not just any advisor; he's a trusted partner, equally invested in your challenges and victories. His approach, which combines the best of rigorous analysis and heartfelt dedication, is rare in the financial world.

For anyone in search of more than just advice — seeking a partner who leads with both intellect and empathy — Dr. John Henry is the ideal choice. I wholeheartedly recommend him as a financial wizard who’s genuinely in your corner, ready to illuminate and guide your path, no matter the complexity of the challenge.

advisor_name: Ben Jacobs, MS, CFP®, EA, AIF®
review_text_raw:
