Anthony is very personable and cares about his clients. He always available to answer questions and provides sound advice. We are very pleased with his results.

advisor_name: Michael R. Acosta, CFP®, ChFC®, CSLP®
review_text_raw: Michael is a great, knowledgeable guide in everything we've discussed. What has really set him apart is his ability and excitement to help me invest according to my Christian values. It was important for me not to invest in companies mistreating their employees or others, harming human life, destroying creation, or otherwise promoting evil. Michael found options that I've been very pleased with!
Anthony is very insightful and empathetic. He takes the time to get to know you and what is important to you as it relates to your life and your financial situation and how to optimize it.

My husband and I have been using Anthony for several years.  We are so happy that we found him.  He has helped us make better decisions for our future financial health.  He's also helped us remain calm in the rapidly changing investment market.

I began a relationship with Anthony on or about the second quarter of 2011. For the next 8 years we developed a personal relationship as well as professional .Developing a personal relationship first is important to bring understanding and trust to the professional side of retirement. I can call Anthony anytime with questions and concerns , and as always , his responses are accurate and put me at ease for choosing him as my financial advisor. Retirement can be a stressful event and Anthony continues to make this life change equitable and comfortable experience.

My wife, Donna, and I have been working with Anthony for a few years now. I TOTALLY RECOMMEND working with Anthony as he uses a very logical, practical and easy to understand approach to retirement and financial planning.  Anthony educates us on our options and then allows us to make our own decisions without any pressure. Please let me know if I can help you in any way or answer any questions for you related to working with Anthony (my cell 856-287-2693). Thanks, stay well and enjoy!

My wife and I engaged Kevin's services in the winter of 2022.  I thought I had a good grip on our finances until we met him. He was able to use visual aids to explain our current situation and what levers we can pull to alter our path.  He shed light on some strategies that helped us make considerations on our financial future and encouraged me to step outside my comfort zone to consider ways to optimize my finances.

I'm thankful that he wasn't afraid to have tough, yet enlightening, conversations to help give us a full picture of our strategy going forward.  Be prepared to have open and honest conversations about spending, saving and retirement.

I would recommend Kevin to anyone who is serious about taking measurable steps forward in their retirement journey, and aren't afraid of doing a little work in the process.  Kevin is competent, patient, focused, and a deep thinker. He changed our lives for the better.
Highly recommend Mike’s services. He is the real-deal.

Kevin was great to work with, he is very knowledgeable and helped me answer all the questions I have had for years.  He helped me design a plan which is helpful in retirement planning.  I would strongly recommend Kevin as a financial advisor.

Jordan and Stephen have been incredibly supportive, stepping up when we needed extra help and adapting their service to help us out. And to make it even sweeter, we made a great return on our investments in a bad year. What more can one ask?

I appreciate the “Quick Takes” newsletter from Next Mission Financial Planning.  It’s easy to read, highlights some interesting points, and provides some nice references if you want to learn more. I also trust Mike to provide good, unbiased insights that are in the best interest of the client, not his business.
Excellent financial advice and customer service. I highly recommend Modern Financial Planning

We feel fortunate that we found Clint.  He is always on top of our situation and has the answers to our questions as we are moving closer to retirement.
His book " Retirement the Right Way: How to Retire with Pleasure, Purpose, and Peace of Mind was such a great read and helped us solidify some important decisions and made us think stratigically about some things that we hadn't yet thought about.
Clint has always communicated and been very helpful with our decision making process, and contributed outside resources and planted just the right people in our path as we take this life journey to our retirement.
His thoughtfulness and going out of his way to make sure that things are taken care of means a lot to us and you just don't find that in business much anymore.
We are thankful and appreciative of all that Clint does.

Have been working with Doug for almost 5 years; he is a consummate "student of the game" in understanding what's best for me and my family's financial future.  The most important aspect of our relationship is integrity and trust.  He has handled all of my questions, no matter how small or large, with thoughtfulness and respect.  He has provided me with excellent counsel.


Thinking about the future, I appreciate that Doug will still be 'in his prime' during my most mature years. Occasionally my peers will share information about their financial advisor relationship that suggests they are not getting great attention or counsel they desire.  My recommendation to them (or anyone) who is not getting the most out of their financial advisement is to pls contact Doug for an initial discussion.  Full stop.

I engaged PAX Financial to handle my retirement funds over 20 years ago. As a result, despite the ups and downs of the market, in retirement and I have not had the burden of worrying about my finances being in good hands. It’s a great feeling to know that my hard earned savings are safe, protected, and in good hands. It’s a blessing to have this fiduciary relationship with PAX.

The human element behind a Financial Advisor is as important as the knowledge. Luckily, Doug is extremely knowledgeable, and he is always available. He is personable, and understands the emotional side of his clients as well. He directly aligns my planning with my families financial goals, and he has always makes time to review my plan. There is nobody else I would rather trust with my family’s financial planning, and I would suggest him 100 times over to anybody!

In an industry where trust and honesty seems to be lost, Doug brings both to the table while also being at the forefront of market knowledge.  His ability to customize and tailor clients needs and desires to the many market offerings, all while explaining it in a meaningful way and showing how it will help is second to none.  Doug will listen to your goals, help you to get on path to meet those and partner with you, not pressure you into specific products.  Money and wealth is an emotional topic for many and there is nobody better to partner with than Doug.  Have that first call with him and you'll understand why this will be the best decision short and long term for your wealth.

Doug has been my financial advisor for the last 3.5 years and it has been such a pleasure working with him on planning my financial future. He has proven to be kind, very trustworthy and knowledgeable in his field, amicable, and a collaborative financial advisor with whom I will gladly work with for the long term.

Chris is an amazing partner to have when it comes to figuring out how to take charge of your finances. My husband and I so appreciate his ability to help us clarify our financial goals and most importantly in a way that feels attainable. We look forward to working with him for many more years.
I am an attorney and friend of Cecil Staton. I believe that he is an excellent financial advisor. He has always been very disciplined and good at preparing for the future financially.

Jose and I had a few calls and zoom meetings. He helped me understand my pension benefits and in making an informed decision.  He also provided a detailed explanation of my taxes and how it relates to future retirement planning goals.
My wife and I have both been working with Chris Dime for several years now, he's great at framing complex financial situations in simple terms and has helped us to understand and manage our finances.
Has help us get on the right side of life with debt and future savings. Best thing I have done was contact Jordan.

My husband and I own a small business.  As we started to grow, and hire employees we needed help with business and personal financial planning.  We wanted to start a retirement plan, save for college for our children, build wealth.    I interviewed a handful of financial advisors before finding Maddi.  I liked that her firm is run by women.  But more importantly, in our first conversation, I could tell that she would help us invest aligned with our values.  She is easy to talk to and work with, prompt and thorough with her responses, and seeks to help us understand our finances.  She really takes an interest in our business and our personal lives and well being. I really appreciate the personalized guidance she provides.  She is trustworthy, transparent, and hard working.  We are very thankful to have found her, we have been working together for nearly 3 years. We've started personal retirement plans, and opened 401K plans for our business.  We have UTMA accounts for our children and are saving to invest in real estate.

I have known Brett for over ten years.  He continually asks the question, which is most important: how can I/we achieve your goals so you can enjoy the life you desire.  He works with you to determine your life strategy . . . and focuses on how to make that happen.  He's a fabulous resource and I highly recommend his wholistic services!

Ian is hands down the best investment I’ve made lately - both personally and professionally. I knew I needed help when I first called him, but didn’t expect him to ask about what REALLY matters to me. The guy is brilliant both financially and interpersonally - he’s a great listener, keeps things relevant, has clever ideas, and knows me well enough to make the right decisions when it matters. I joke that meeting with him is better than therapy!

I would mislead you if I said I work with Ian Weiner, CFP. I'm retired. I don't work. Ian does. More importantly, Ian only knows how to work one way...being connected. He's connected to his clients. Yes, he manages my financial portfolio; but he KNOWS me. He knows everything going on with me, he knows my family. Heck, he knows my friends. Ian is my financial dude, and being connected to me gives him a clarified plan of how to handle my financial world. You want Ian to understand your money, give him the opportunity to understand you. You won't be sorry.

advisor_name: Michael R. Acosta, CFP®, ChFC®, CSLP®
review_text_raw: Michael is an exceptional financial planner with extensive knowledge in the finance field and the student loan industry. He truly cares about his clients and goes above and beyond to get you answers in a timely manner. He first helped me to obtain additional insurance in the event that I become disabled. He guided me on how to combine my retirement accounts and protect all of my assets (e.g., Umbrella policy). He reached out to me and encouraged me to apply for the PSLF program, which I wasn't aware changed the types of payments that qualified. As of today, my loans are 100 percent forgiven. This is a huge financial burden that has been lifted! Michael will always be my financial planner and I look forward to working with him in the next year and years to come! Highly recommend!

I've always been someone who struggled with making sense of finances and anxiety around finances after being raised in a household that struggled to make ends meet. I decided that I should find a fidicuary last year, and I'm so happy that my journey led me to Monica Ricks at PAX. Monica has been incredibly patient with my endless questions and does a fantastic job of offering guidance in a way that actually makes sense to me, something that countless hours spent in seminars, reading books, and participating in online communities couldn't accomplish. I finally feel in control and confident in my finances and my son's future--something that I definitely couldn't have accomplished without her expertise and empathy.

If you are considering working with a fidicuary, consider this as your sign to work with PAX Financial Group. I really can't recommend and thank Monica enough for everything she's done to help my family put our best foot forward. 🖤

I've worked with Amir for over 5 years so far and felt a sense of trust and comfort immediately in the very overwhelming (to me) world of finances. He takes the time to answer any questions or address any concerns even if they were previously discussed time after time. One of the most valuable things Amir provides me is the learning experience.  I find power in knowledge, and even though I use his service to assist in my financial planning, it is calming to know some of the logistics and leads to even more appreciation of what he does for me.  If you're looking for someone relatable, who will simplify things to help you learn and communicate in the world of finances, and who genuinely wants the best for you and your future, I can't recommend Amir enough!

I’ve been working with Amir for a few years now. Amir provided immense value within five minutes of our first meeting and continues to do so. He is able to understand my family’s priorities and translate them into actionable next steps. Since we began working together, I’ve not only cleaned up my finances, but my mindset around money has shifted dramatically for the better. I now feel like an earlier retirement, more savings, and more ease of daily life (with treats, vacations, and splurges!) is possible — versus a total scarcity/deprivation mindset that made money very stressful and made me prone to avoiding dealing with it all together. Thanks, Amir!

Jose and I had several calls and zoom meetings. He keeps me on track providing excellent follow-through on next steps.  In addition, he is very personable and responsive. Advice and guidance were related to general financial planning but is also comprehensive. For example, his knowledge and guidance on spousal benefits from Social Security and income planning are a few services I found extremely valuable. I believe I would not have received such a detailed review and level of service from anyone else. Great service; great guy!

David is an enthusiastic and passionate person who shows genuine interest and care in his clients. He doesn’t pressure you into anything you are uncomfortable with, and takes the extra time to explain the strategies he has come up with for us to implement. David is very well prepared with modules and air tables to review in detail each investment strategy. He is a pleasure to work with. David feels like family. He creates a comfortable learning environment that I will benefit from for years to come. David advised me on the direction to take with my investments that would set me up to achieve my long term financial goals. Based on my family and work status, we focused on diversifying my investments.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: My husband and I have been working with Paul/TAMMA Services for almost a decade and have continuously been impressed with his attention to detail regarding our finances, as well as attention to us as people/clients. He has assisted us in asset growth, tax services, college funding and estate planning. He has also been a trusted and educated financial point person when we had questions related to family needs/changes. Highly recommend without any reservation.

We were looking for someone to review our holdings and find any missing links. We also wanted a firm that was committed and supportive of our view that we are stewards of the money God had gifted to us and our choice to live a debt free lifestyle. We have been working with Joseph Schuetze and his team for three years now and it has been an outstanding experience. Everyone we have interacted with at their firm has communicated the same message and values. The people their are professional, dedicated, and supportive. They introduced us to the idea of biblical responsible investing and after some research we committed to that idea. We look forward to working with PAX for many years to come.

As a professional in the asset management industry for the past 30 years, I can say with certainty that Clear Rock Advisors (CRA) is best in class when evaluating an advisory firm.  Very few firms across the country have the experience, trust and thoughtful processes that CRA provides their clients.  As someone who works with advisory firms on a daily basis, I often think about whether I would have confidence in a particular firm’s ability to manage my own family’s wealth.  Clear Rock would be at the top of the list.

Michelle Gessner has been our advisor for about 10 years now. After having attended a seminar where she presented her materials, I walked away very impressed with the information she shared and her approach and decided to meet with her to discuss specifics about our goals and the rest, as they say, is history. For the past 10 years, she has continued to maintain the highest level of professionalism and service. The things that I appreciate the most about her are: 1) She always presents facts that are research based 2) Her research is so very thorough, current and balanced (including her very clearly stated references) 3) Her presentation of the information she has gathered in a manner that is easy to digest (for me at least) and 4) That she NEVER sells! She always presents information and helps make the investment choices that best suit our family and risk appetite.
I can't offer any greater compliment than to recommend her to others and have done so whenever an opportunity has presented. In the current financial world of constant upheaval, I'm very glad to have such a thorough professional in my phone book to be able to make well-educated and informed decisions for our long term financial stability and health.

Erik is everything and more you would want in a financial planner. He is always available for questions, communicative with all transactions, and knowledgeable in all phases of life decisions. I have trusted Erik with my finances for 6 plus years now and couldn't ask for a better financial planner for my family.

If you’re a military family looking to secure your financial future, there is no advisor that I would recommend more than Baskin Financial Planning.  Erik is an expert navigator of the many financial requirements and resources that are specific to military families, and can easily tailor his services to meet your needs and budget.  For any military member, Baskin Financial Planning will be a fantastic service.

We have been with Clear Rock for 3 years and could not be more satisfied with the entire team. Excellent group of professionals that are very responsive to market conditions and trends and as well as the personal service. Truly a trusted advisor with a proven performance, especially navigating the ship in choppy waters during 2020/2022 Covid landscape. Special thanks to Corey Long who we considered to be a close friend of 17 years but also top notch in guiding and shaping our portfolio. We go to Corey for any decision we make regarding our financial health and well being.
Very accurate and timely work. Always treated with respect and kindness. Would 100% recommend.

I love talking with Mike about finances. He has a unique way of looking at money that many people overlook. If you want to set yourself up to be in a good financial position, I highly recommend consulting with Mike.

Eric and the team at Abundo are incredible. The monthly fee business model they have set up really builds trust and transparency into the relationship.

I mainly made the intro for my partner, but soon realized I needed his help too 😅. We've already happily introduced them to 5 of our friends which is the biggest testament to good service. I wish I found these people years ago! Thanks, Eric. Looking forward to working with you for years to come.
My investments are diversified, but low risk for my age. Happy with his suggestions and advice.

If you are looking for a thoughtful, well-prepared and knowledgeable advisor, I would highly recommend you schedule an introductory meeting with Kaleb and Ten Talents. Having worked with other advisors, Kaleb offers a unique and high-level of service under a fair pricing structure. You won’t be disappointed.

Title:  Solid Personal Investment Knowledge and Experience,  Client Needs and Goals Drive the Decisions

Ayad is very smart, very knowledgable and is a pleasure to work with.  He asks astute questions and gives close attention to the client’s individual situation and needs when developing strategies and recommendations. His clear explanations ensure that the client is comfortable with the decisions that they reach together.  He is clearly a man who loves his work and takes satisfaction in the good service he provides his clients.  After he left his previous employment, I sought him out and now feel much more confident about my financial decisions.

I had a great experience working with Charles and Hiếu today! They set my husband and I up for a good life insurance plan and then help get me started for retirement ! I highly recommended them for their patience and willingness to make me feel comfortable even though it was my first time talking about investments!
Jack and David changed our lives! They are incredibly knowledgeable. Highly recommend!

We've been with Brett as a CFP advisor since the beginning of Tushingham Wealth Strategies and even a few years prior to that. He's been rock steady all that time and is somebody on whom we can always depend. In current times, when it seems that "anything goes" in business and politics, we know that we can always count on the straight story from Brett and that he takes as much care in advising all his clients as he would his own family. Unlike many advisors in large firms who are operating primarily to place investments where they will earn the largest commissions, Brett's independent services are fee-based, and he looks for the investment or service that is best for his clients. One of the great advantages of working with him is that he offers "cradle-to-grave" service; he will help you plan for your child's college education while that child is still an infant, simultaneously helping you plan for retirement and what will eventually happen to your estate. We know that we don't have to watch the markets everyday or be concerned about how the latest tax law changes affect us because he does that for us proactively. Our daughters have grown up knowing Brett, who also advises them. Unlike many of their generation, they already have, and know the value of, 401k plans, Roth IRAs, and Health Savings Accounts. We wholeheartedly endorse Brett and recommend his services unreservedly.

Over the last three decades, my husband and I have done seminars and Financial Peace University with Dave Ramsey.  After seeing how his plan works, we were anxious to find a financial advisor that shared those principles and values.  That's when we met Darryl Lyons at PAX and later David Alvarez.  We have been so grateful and blessed by these trusted advisors and are thankful for the advice and guidance that they have given us.

Both Darryl and David are very knowledgeable, have teachers' hearts, are patient and kind as they explain things in terms that we can understand.  They listen to our goals and concerns and provide a plan that is tailored to our needs and future successes.  They share our values and have put us in investments that also share those principles and values.

There is no pressure or hard sales pitch.  They are very easy to talk to and provide a calm and encouraging atmosphere where we can learn and grow.  We trust them and have confidence in their advice.  Overall, we are thankful to have Darryl and David in our corner.

Monica Ricks is my financial advisor. She has helped me exceed to do everything that I wanted done to help me increase my money and get rid of the paper. Kaylee has helped me when Monica was not available and I needed something done. I started at pax Financial when Daryl Lyons was my financial officer. He has gone on to write some fabulous books and I don't exactly know what his position is now but that's where I started. Thank you Pax Financial for all that you have done for me. I looked to the Future and seeing that I will go forth and prosper.

I started working with HCP Wealth Planning as a project based customer, meaning we paid a one time flat fee for a comprehensive analysis and plan of all our financial goals. I found Kevin through a referral made to my friend and I'm so grateful that he shared this information with me. I didn't know Project based planners exist, and this is a phenomenal service for a flat fee. Unlike percent based or annual fee based planners, Kevin is incentivized to provide the best service and prop you up so that you're self sufficient.

Working with Kevin is easy, not only is he extremely responsive by email, he has made himself available to meet on weekends and after work hours. He uses an electronic platform which allows you to easily visualize your financial plan, and see how your projections improve or change based on your selected changes to salary, expenses, market performance, etc. Kevin is also incredibly thorough and its worth all the information he requires you to dig up. He is also able to create multiple scenarios based on what your approach might be.

Whether you are financially savvy or a novice, having an expert set of eyes look at your current finances has a lot of potential for revealing possibilities you might be unaware of or not considered.

My husband and I have been very pleased with the services Cecil has provided, as he has taken our personal goals and desires into account when helping us plan financially for the future of our growing family. Cecil has advised me on the best plan of action to implement to ensure my student loans are paid off in a timely manner and how to save appropriately in order to retire at the age I want to.

Luis is a stand up guy. He exemplifies an abundance mind set, although I connected with him and wanted to work with him, he recommended that I reach out to some other contacts (that he gave me) that would better fit my needs. He is a very wise man that has a hugely beneficial philosophy on life. Schedule a consultation and you won’t regret it: whether you go with him or not you will leave the meeting smarter, happier, and ready to take on life. Thank you Luis, keep being excellent!

That's what Ayad has done for me and my husband. We recently retired and because of Ayad's wise advice, we feel confident we can thoroughly enjoy our retirement. But most important, Ayad is an exceptional human being  who truly cares for his clients. We feel he has a true call to help people from all walks of life.
We look forward for many years of his guidance and expertise to navigate these turbulent financial times!

Most advisors we worked with previously were hands off and did not really reach out to us.  After the initial sit down, that was essentially it.

Amir was opposite.  He reached out when he noticed our portfolio was underperforming and its been the best match since (when he wasn't even our advisor at that time but working with the person who was).  He truly wants to you know and each and everything he asks you to consider.  He will never push products on you but will also challenge you to be better about meeting financial goals.  Those qualities and his willingness to work with you on a consistent basis is what separate him apart.

What I truly like best about Amir is truly cares about you and your family.  He will take all those factors into consideration when saying if we are on track, need to do more, or if needed, do less.  He also is willing to help us understand things we may read online about various products or ways to manage our funds.  He will take the time to read it and help you understand what it really means, either agreeing or showing you why it might not work for you specficially.

All in all, we know, where ever goes, we go!
Everything very professional and satisfactory. I highly recommend. Great to work with.

I was on the hunt for a financial advisor to find out if my husband and I can afford retirement. I sat down with various types of financial advisors, some even connected with the bald guy, and all of them are only interested in two things: the size of our portfolio (one of them requires a $1M portfolio), and all of them work using the AUM model, who gets paid based on the size of your portfolio, whether it earns or not.

We went with Kevin of HCP Wealth Planning and we’re so glad we did. Here’s what we got working with him:

1. He is a flat-fee financial advisor, meaning it doesn’t matter what the size of your portfolio is.
2. Great communication via email and virtual meetings. No question was left unanswered.
3. Clarity of our financial picture. We found our biggest money drain.
4. He will make you work by making you visualize and plan what you want to do from here on out, up to the time you retire, and during retirement.
5. His financial software and the cash flow analysis allowed us to see our net worth, and gave us the picture of our spending plan now and during retirement.
6. A withdrawal plan that will put more money in your pocket.
7. Various appointment schedules that will work with your work schedule.
8. Financial literacy. There are no stupid questions when it comes to your hard-earned money, and he answered them all patiently.
9. Peace of mind knowing that we can retire earlier than 65, even pay for health care coverage outside of our employment before Medicare kicks in, even long-term care services.
10. He is not a pushy salesman who makes you buy other financial stuff. He will not make you put your money into an IRA that other financial planners want you to do so they dip into your money (the AUM model).

I can go on and on. If you are looking for a financial planner who has your best interest at heart, you will not regret getting his services.

Amir's domain knowledge across investment management, insurance and estate planning makes him such a valuable partner for so many of life's decisions.  And for certain situations where he didn't have specific domain knowledge, Amir was still able to help us by leveraging his network and connecting us with other first-class professionals.

Amir is willing to get into the nitty gritty details with me, but also provides the succinct high-level view for my partner.  His willingness and ability to adapt to each of our personal styles has been incredibly valuable.  He really goes above and beyond to make sure we both feel confident in our decision-making.

Amir has been my financial advisor for about 2 years.  He's been an incredible partner in navigating difficult situations regarding both my small business and my personal finances.  Amir has given me so much confidence in my ability to control my financial future and obtain financial security.  He has taught me how to build better financial habits, he has kept me accountable towards making those habits stick, and he has provided so much wisdom on how to manage my complete financial picture outside of a stock and bond portfolio.  His patience and willingness to get down on my level and mold himself to my situation makes it so easy to work with him.  I feel like my finances are no longer scary and I'm prepared for the future and whatever it may bring.

I've been working with Amir for a year and it's been one of the best financial decisions I've ever made. I have a complicated revenue stream and Amir has been incredibly helpful to ensure my finances and investments were optimized. Highly recommend to any young professional.

We had someone else, there was no trust and no concern over communication and education for us. Gary brings knowledge, trust and communication to his customers. Gary does a great job tailoring our investments towards our needs. He's one you can trust. He makes sure you understand what he's doing and is looking out for our best interest.

I recently started working with Amir as my financial advisor, and I have been extremely impressed with his professionalism, knowledge, and overall approach to financial planning. Amir takes the time to really understand my financial goals and works with me to create a personalized plan to help me achieve them. He is always available to answer any questions I have and provides clear and concise explanations for everything.

In addition, Amir is always looking for ways to optimize my financial portfolio and maximize my returns. I highly recommend Amir to anyone looking for a knowledgeable, reliable financial advisor.

Amir helped me invest a solid chunk of my savings when I didn’t know what to do with them. Since then, he has advised me on the most intelligent ways to use my income and savings so that when the time comes I can retire very comfortably.

More importantly, he is extremely kind and friendly, the type of person who gets along with everyone. He sees his clients more as people and not just as clients, which I find to be very nice and a refreshing change of pace.

I highly recommend getting in touch with Amir for the betterment of your financial future. Not only is he a good friend, but he’s a great advisor too.

Amir is professional, knowledgeable and helpful. I have been using him for years and I HIGHLY recommend him for your financial advisor needs. He is a fiduciary, so you know he has your best interests in mind.

I work in entertainment and know negative zero about math and finance and the things you need to ensure a secure, prolific future. Amir has been extremely patient, thoughtful, and gracious in the way he's helped me clean up my bookkeeping and build towards the financial goals I have. I highly recommend working with him, he's made finances less scary for me!

Amir is really intentional, and I would say I'm not the easiest client to work with. He's been patient with me and calls me out on my BS. I appreciate the accountability, and I'm seeing progress behind some of my blind spots with my financial accountability. I would highly recommend Amir because I know he will look after my long-term goals vs. my short-term spur-of-the-moment thinking.

My partner and I have been working with Ten Talents Financial Planning, LLC since January 2021. It has been a great experience. Kaleb has looked at everything that impacts our finances and security. We do not have great wealth, but we knew we needed to have a plan for our retirement and had no idea where to start or what to do. Kaleb has given us nonjudgmental advice and clear action steps on how to achieve our goals. This is huge for us. Kaleb's services are absolutely worth the investment of time and money. Having the knowledge and peace of mind to know we are on the right path is incredibly valuable. I would recommend Kaleb and his services to anyone.
Solid financial teamwork by Joseph, Haley and Jacob. Always available, easily accessed and immediately willing to offer help and advice.

We have worked with Joseph for many years. He has spent hours listening and asking us great questions. He is very reassuring and explains the investment strategies we are using and helps us define our goals. Very grateful to work with him!

Darryl Lyons, Charles Garcia and Monica Bustillos have been professional, honest, forthright and helpful from the beginning.  I trust them implicitly and truly believe they have my best interests at heart.  They are willing to initiate uncomfortable conversations as well as being open to being on the receiving end of the same types of conversations. As I tell them all the time, "You have all my money and my future in your hands".

We have been working with Joseph and Pax for at least 15 years.  We began as a young married couple with a 2-year-old and Joseph guided us given the means we had to purchase life insurance and start a college fund for our little guy.  Since then Joseph and the rest of the team have been very helpful in giving us options to make sure we can support our boys while in college as well as ourselves with the type of retirement we want to experience.  Joseph and the team show such care for us and our family.  I continue to recommend Pax anytime anyone asks about financial advisors!

Angel has been a great partner in planning our financial future. I say partner because that is what it feels like talking with him. He has really taken the time to get to know my wife and I and make us feel like a team that is working to provide a solid financial future for our family. He is very fun to talk with, quick with a joke, and available whenever you need him. I can’t recommend him more if you are looking to plan out your financial future.

My husband and I have been working with Kaleb for about three years now, and we are beyond happy and grateful for the knowledge and help that he provides us.  He is extremely detail-oriented and knows his stuff, and he will still make time to put things into laymen's terms for me.  He is trustworthy.  He is a nice guy who, I feel, genuinely wants to help his clients become financially literate and prepared for the future.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: Working with Paul at TAMMA Capital has been a wonderful and re-assuring experience. He not only manages my portfolio as if it was his own but also encourages you to examine your goals and desires to help pave the way for short-term and long-term quality of life. He stays in touch regularly, is a very good listener that explains things in a practical manner and he exudes confidence…all very comforting. I feel he has my back!

Royce and team are among the most thoughtful in the industry when it comes to catering portfolios to the needs of their clients. I couldn't be more impressed with their investment due diligence and portfolio construction process, and the results speak for themselves.

The Pax Financial Group is a very good financial investment company. Joseph Schuetze & his team members are very professional, knowledgeable & embrace good Christian values. Joseph S. was always looking out for the best outcome in making money for us & keeping us informed on the stock market changes. I wish Joseph Schuetze the best in continuing his passion in helping people reach their financial goals in life.

We have worked with Joseph and his team for over nine years now and have been very pleased with how they have handled not only our investments, but all important decisions we’ve had to make along this journey.  We value the fact that PAX is a faith based company, and it is apparent in all they do.  We highly recommend them to our friends and family.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: After expanding our family this past year we decided it was important to focus on our long term goals and began working with TAMMA. Paul has been phenomenal and patient in explaining every aspect of our overall portfolio. His approach is focused on our overall lives and well being vs a typical “financial planner” which has helped us make better decisions that are aligned to our family goals and purpose. Most importantly, he has immediately made us feel we are part of his family and we feel he is a large part of ours. I couldn’t recommend TAMMA enough.

Maddi has been the perfect partner to help us solidify our future plans. I had done my research and couldn't be happier about our choice to work with her. She has been able to help us focus on both living our best life now and planning for the future we want.
I have known Gary for several years and he is great at his job. He has helped my husband and me save for our future. He has our best interest at heart.

My Husband and I have been clients of Michelle Gessner at Gessner Wealth Strategies for 3+ years now and I can safely say selecting Michelle to guide us through our retirement years is the best decision we have ever made!

Almost all of the financial planners we interviewed prior to our retirement dealt strictly with our investment portfolio.  The health of our portfolio is just the tip of the iceberg for Michelle.  She takes an in depth and critical look at EVERYTHING that can affect our financial picture.   Taxes, Wills and Insurance are all examined to make sure all of our assets are maximized and protected.  We’ve all heard the saying “you don’t know what you don’t know.”  Thankfully, Michelle has not only done a great job with our investments but enlightened us on all the things we didn’t know and saved us $$$

And we can’t brag on Michelle without mentioning Lauren!!!!  Lauren not only keeps Michelles office running smoothly but keeps us personally on track as well by sending us reminders  of financial deadlines we need to meet.  And she does it all with the most incredible warmth and professionalism imaginable!!!! Michelle and Lauren are truly a dynamic duo!

If you are looking for a firm to take a look at your total financial picture, then look no further than Gessner Wealth Strategies.  You won’t regret it!!!!

Royce and his team were so helpful transitioning my mom’s funds to Clear Rock. They took the time to meet with her along with us, to understand what she has available for her future needs. Clear Rock has also done a great job with the rate on return during the last few years even with the volatility. Thank you, Royce for giving us a peace of mind.

I have dealt with Clear Rock since the beginning of the firm.  Chuck Hall put together a highly skilled and professional team that has successfully managed our portfolio, even in the down markets.  Including alternative investments in their management strategy has helped returns in down markets.  The team is not only quick to respond to questions but is also proactive in communicating market trends and strategies.  I would highly recommend this firm to anyone seeking conservative management of their portfolio.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: We have had an excellent experience with Tamma Capital. Paul is personable, knowledgeable, and responsive. Highly recommend!

Justin is very knowledgable and politely direct. He respected our time and gave us lots of great retirement planning advice. We feel confident with the information he provided and would definitely recommend him to anyone else seeking financial advice.

We were familiar with PAX for years, as Dave Ramsey's team had identified the firm as having "the heart of a teacher, rather than the heart of a salesman". That could not be more accurate! We began working with Joseph Schuetze, one of the co-founders of PAX, several years before John retired. Joseph addressed all of our present and future concerns, and he clearly answered my hundreds of questions. He was determined to set up a plan to match our goals and values. Once John retired, we fully invested our assets with Joseph. We have full confidence in his long term vision, and we can sleep soundly, regardless of market changes and world events.

We have been very pleased with Clear Rock.  The advisors listen to our needs and future plans and plan with us involved.  It is wonderful to feel involved and confident in the Clear Rock team.  They are the best!

I can tell you from my experience that you will not find another financial group that truly cares about  your family more than CRA. They personally assisted in my transition of ownership to my son of the 45 year old business I had built and then my transition to retirement. No qualified financial group gives you secure,honest, assistance for the rate charged as well as encouraging your family to participate with their funds for your rate . You know with times like these you hear so many of your friends talking about the percentage of loss they have sustained. I can tell you my losses were much, much less. They know my name , my wife my family, so I am not just a number. Great gains help when you are a fixed income retiree. Chuck ,Tye , Tamara and Royce. Have been a winning team that I have referred for many years with pride and when I talk to my friends that have become their clients they always thank me.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: For those looking for a financial planner, or those who are not absolutely thrilled with their current financial planner, please seek out Paul Fenner from TAMMA Capital. It’s a family owned business that is just amazing. After years of searching for the right fit, I found not just a financial planner, I found  a home. Paul takes the time to get to know you, and is along for the journey as your life continues with its ups and downs.  I cannot stress enough how much trust this company, Paul and the advice he gives.  Please reach out to him if you find yourself questioning where you are financially, or where you need to be.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw:
It has been a pleasure working with TAMMA Capital.  Paul has completely changed the way we approach our finances.  We didn’t just want to work with a firm that doesn’t understand financial picture.  Paul understood us right from the beginning!

We look forward to continuing working with TAMMA for years to come.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: We have been with TAMMA Capital for about three years and couldn’t feel more secure about our wealth management and our future. Paul has our trust and always has our best interest in mind. Great communication - Paul is always available when we have questions. Thank you!

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: By far the best financial advising experiences we’ve ever had. Paul has been there for us, in aiding in all our recent huge life changing decisions

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: Had helped us plan many facets of our future, including retirement.
The team has a wealth of knowledge and understanding and are very helpful.  The communications they send out by email are very informative and much appreciated.

CRA does not get caught up chasing returns. They focus on long-term objectives and forging trust with their clients. I appreciate their honesty and frank assessment of investment opportunities, which is refreshing from an RIA. Royce Medlin is incredibly thoughtful in his investment strategy, which helps through the highs and lows of market fluctuations. I recommend CRA highly.
Highly recommend the team at Clear Rock.

Maddi is always available for a quick question. I've enjoyed working with Maddi over the last few years to develop my own financial stability. Her knowledge of financial products along with her creative thinking allowed me to reach my goals. I tend to be risk adverse and Maddi has helped find options that felt secure and safe for me while still developing my portfolio.

Clear Rock is a small team of very experienced wealth managers. When we first started investing with them, they were very detailed and thorough; building a customized plan for us to follow. Over time and especially as the market changes, they are always reaching out, providing consistent one-on-one guidance.  They collaborate as a team, expressing good care about our portfolio. And their online portal is easy to access.

It has been a pleasure to work with the Clear Rock office in Kerrville.  Royce and Tamara have always been very available and understanding as to our goals.  Royce has always been responsive to our allocation desires working to minimize  risk while achieving maximum return.

I have been with Clear Rock Advisors for a number of years now and i am very comfortable with how they approach the market both in good times and in negative economic times. It starts with Chuck Hall. Chuck is experienced and very professional. He seeks to hire the very best in the industry. Chuck's ability to acquire people like Royce Medlin as Chief Investment Officer has truly put Clear Rock in a unique position in the industry. Royce has an uncanny ability to minimize risk while still maximizing profits even in difficult seasons. Ty Sanders is another great addition. Ty is very knowledgeable and experienced. All of these folks do business in a very relational manner.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: Working with Paul is great. Although we had done a reasonable job managing funds on our own, he helped us see what we were missing including helping us to eliminate some excessive fees and understanding some of the risks we were exposed to.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw:
Paul is gracious and kind. His communications are clear and helpful.
His integrity is obvious and exceptional.

advisor_name: Paul Fenner, CFP®, EA, ChFC®, CRPS®
review_text_raw: Paul and the TAMMA team are knowledgeable, professional and care about their clients. Working with TAMMA has given me piece of mind that my finances will be maximized to their fullest potential up through retirement and beyond. Paul has shed light on many financial opportunities that I didn’t know were available to me or even existed. It’s fair to say that I sleep well at night knowing my financial future is looked after with care and expertise. Thank you TAMMA!

The value and mission of Clear Rock Advisors are unmatched compared to other small RIAs in the industry and DFW. The Clear Rock team goes above and beyond to build relationships and manage their clients' money. I have experienced this sophisticated investment and planning process first hand as an intern for Clear Rock this past summer.  Not only did Clear Rock help me develop career wise in the industry but they also showed me what it truly means to put the client at the ultimate priority. Clear Rock implements a sophisticated approach to investment strategies and financial planning that leaves clients without second guessing their decision in choosing Clear Rock. Even though Clear Rock is highly trusted when it comes to investing, financial planning, and portfolio management, the most important value the team cares about is its clients. The clients are the number one priority and building a great relationship with them that goes beyond the workplace. They work hard to value and establish relationships and friendships with their clients by getting to know them as people before their financial situation. Furthermore, they do their best to achieve your financial goals and are in the process with you.  Other RIA firms need to strive for a sophisticated and fiduciary approach in the same way as Clear Rock.

I have been a client of Clear Rock for about 10 yrs and have found them to be very professional and always available to answer any questions I have. Was very impressed with their ability to peel back the onion and understand what my goals are. Communications by email and snail mail is very frequent and very informative, exactly how I like it.
I'd have given 5 stars....Yet, I never give 5 stars, as we can always strive to active more. But, as advisers go, these folks are top of the line.

I reached out to Maddi on a whim, some random Tuesday a couple years ago, and haven't looked back! I've known the basics of financial literacy for a while, the general dos, don'ts, and some must have strategies, but I still had lingering questions. Have I screwed along the way? Was I effectively, done, set & forget until retirement? What was I leaving on the table? What could, should, I do next?

Such a great company.  I was lead here to PAX because of Dave Ramsey principals and I have not regretted it once. So kind and smart!  I have received incredible advice and am financially secure for my retirement.  Joseph listens to me.  I would recommend them to anyone.

15 years ago we earnestly started looking forward to retirement. Up to that point, our plans and actions involved putting money into retirement accounts and that's about it. So based on a recommendation off the Dave Ramsey financial website, we choose PAX out of the list of locally endorsed providers. Made a call and within days we nervously walked into the offices for a meeting with Bryan Wing. And we've never looked back. Over 15 years, Bryan has educated us (with much patience I must add) about the financial world, to include explanations of their products, software used, the history of PAX, the history of the financial markets, thoughts of the future of financial markets, and how PAX and us fit into that bigger fiscal world and how that world fits into our plans. He has defined many terms and processes for us that were unfamiliar and/or confusing for us to understand. And we never felt or though we were being talked down to. We tend to think of our meetings as visits with Bryan, it's not business - it's pleasure. Our visits include discussions of our plans of the present and future, emotional wants and life events that may happen to affect our portfolio, and also a way to share our finances which is vital and important to us. We've developed a deep relationship of trust and respect. As the years passed, we went through many of stages in life - from being two working parents with children at home, to parents taking care of their own parents while still raising children, to now empty nesters who are retired, grandparents and debt free. All while weathering the storms and picnics of the financial markets. The common denominator was the fact that while we were ones driving the train, Bryan Wing was shoveling the coal providing what we needed to get to that next station in life. It was the Little Engine That Could and Did! Yes, Bryan Wing and PAX have provided the financial sense for us and we could have given a review that detailed all of that and concentrated on the business side of that, and why you should come to them because they are fiscally savvy. But it is truly the trust we have placed in him and them, and what he/they did with that trust that makes us keep wanting to continue our relationship. It doesn't matter how much money you have or don't have - they're going to answer the call no matter what. We guarantee that when you hang up the phone you'll feel better and after your first meeting/visit, pat yourself on the back!
We couldn’t ask for a better team to manage our financial future!  Total trust.

When I inherited some money from my mother, I had no idea at all how to invest it, where to invest, what was safe, the ins and outs of financial planning...nothing. Both Joseph and Haley spent hours with me explaining (in language I could understand) how things worked. They gave great advice, but I always felt as if the decision was mine about where and how to invest. It's hard to put a value on peace of mind, but that's what I have with PAX.
I appreciate PAX financial planning and guidance for the last 10 years upon retirement. My only regret is not finding PAX sooner through Dave Ramsey.

After every conversation, I feel more empowered with personal financial knowledge, while also having clear goals outlined to be reviewed during our next conversation.

Overall, his openness, attention-to-detail, and hands-on, modern approach to Wealth Management are a true embodiment of what John and MDRN Wealth stand for, and I look forward to seeing how our partnership (and my money!) grows from here.

P.S. John has even provided more tax help than I normally get from my long-term CPA!

Can’t say enough good things about Kaleb and the work he does. I honestly didn’t know that advisors like Kaleb existed. His attention to detail and thoroughness has put my family in a much better place than we were in before working with him.

First time in my life I actually feel at peace with my finances. John covered everything from investments, my retirement, my estate plan and even taxes. Recently, Richard has been very helpful in navigating new policies regarding federal student loans and making sure I’ve covered all my bases. If you’re looking for someone who will take a holistic approach to financial advising, Richard at 2Point0 is the way to go!

Was skeptical about working with a financial planner but John completely changed my perspective. I thought a financial plan was all about budgeting or planning for retirement, but John covered areas of my finances that I didn’t even think to have a plan for.

Flavio is very helpful with direction in my financial as well as my health care concerns. He is always available to answer questions or send necessary forms I need. I am confident I am heading in the right direction with Charter Financial on my side.

Nick is extremely knowledgeable and professional. He was very upfront with what he thought we needed and shared with us what he thought was the best path forward for our particular needs. Extremely happy to have found someone to help us with our financial future.

Alex Call and Alek Johnson with Peterson Wealth have been such a blessing in our lives.  I am an anxious person in general and they always calmly answer my questions regarding our retirement money. I have been with Erik for less than a year, BUT he has exceeded  and continues to exceed my high expectations. We are definitely on a better track for the future now and understand where we need to focus. We are less stressed out about our finances and David's financial planning services have helped a ton.

I love working with Danika Waddell at Xena. She's great at explaining the esoterica intrinsic to financial planning, talking me through my options, making sure I understand, helping me make informed decisions. I feel very comfortable asking questions, whatever they may be. I come away from my conversations with Danika feeling encouraged and confident that I'm doing the right things to manage my finances and plan for the future.

TPWA has helped me sift through the noise and come up with a plan to meet my financial goal. They are easy to contact, easy to work with, and easy to understand - everything about their process is simple, educational, and helpful! Highly recommend.
Great advisors who are very hands on and helpful. Really enjoy working with them.

They are amazing financial advisors! An elderly couple who are family friends of my parents needed their estate plans done and Twin Peaks was immediately there to help with every step of the process. My family friends were so grateful to have their long-overdue estate docs finished in a timely and satisfying manner. Seeing them happy made me very happy :)

Twin Peaks even sent a personalized notary to the couple’s home to make the estate planning process as smooth and convenient as possible. They also gave the couple a free drinking cup and hand bag! No other wealth management firm I know in the Bay Area cares that much about their  clients like they do. Meticulous attention to detail and efficient time management. 10/10 stars
Great and comprehensive financial planning services
TPWA has been my advisors for years. Love the detailed attention that you offer your clients.
Solid advisors always keeping the client’s best interest in mind!
World class financial professionals with a passion for helping people work towards optimal outcomes and reach financial goals.
TPWA are always so responsive! Love working with Vishal!!
We have been working with TPWA for over a decade now - they are very knowledgeable and are a pleasure to work with. Highly recommend

This business is truly 10X and the best team I have ever dealt with.

They are dedicated to SUCCESS!!!

There is an overflow of information and resources available online about wealth management, much of it is flat out wrong or  not applicable to my circumstances. The team at Twin Peaks helped sift through the noise and educate me using high quality materials and sound guidance.

Love working with this group! They are always available, are clear and confident, and really help adapt their advice around what I want rather than just repeating the same generic facts to everyone. Financial planning has never been my strong suit but with my advisor at Twin Peaks, I feel really safe to ask questions and share my opinions to get the most out of my money the way that I want.

Twin peaks is my wealth advisor for more than 10 years.   They have done financial-life planning and investment management to cover the whole picture, from design through implementation.

They will walk with me through good times and bad, keeping my future financially secure, well-managed, and well-planned.  I feel safe and secure because of their excellent track record of great service

Highly recommend Jeff.  Always available to support you and your family's financial needs.  No matter where you are on your journey for your financial support/freedom, he has the right solutions, tools, and knowledge to support you on your path.  A true expert in his field!

Dave helped me and my husband with a new home purchase analysis, some questions I had regarding our personal finances, and a review of our investments. He even gave us some added suggestions on areas I was not planning to cover and not familiar with. The financial plan he created for us was very thorough and worth the price. We would highly recommend him.

From the moment I spoke to Dave, he was very focused on how he could best help me in my financial goals. He took time to explain in easy to understand terms and asked great questions that were helpful and showed understanding and consideration.

Erik’s expertise when it comes to your financial future is unparalleled. He is extremely personable and always has your best interest in mind at all times. You can expect his full attention when you work with him. 100% recommend!

My husband and I have found Covenant Wealth Advisors to be a great source of financial advise and expertise. We have found everyone to be helpful, especially
Scott.

I had been avoiding planning for my retirement and long term care for a very long time BUT my son recommended that I meet with
Michael Raimondi about my retirement and deferred compensation accounts. I had no idea what to expect and all I can say is I should have done this sooner. Michael is so easy to work with and easy to understand. He keeps me informed of my accounts as well as the future forecast. He is such a pleasure to work with, I don't feel like he is ever talking over my head, he takes the time to explain and he listens to my concerns.
I feel like my investments are in good hands with Michael Raimondi.

Very impressed and happy with Kevin Burkle’s services.  As long-time savers and investors we were not interested in paying a percentage of our accounts for investment management.  We just wanted someone to help us analyze our portfolios and expenses and show exactly what our financial future looks like.  The program he uses is very detailed and Kevin prodded us to predict future needs and possible big purchases or expenses to see how any situation affected us financially.  A bonus to this service is you continue to have access to the digital planner and can toggle categories to see how an unplanned expense impacts you.  At first we were reluctant to share so much information; however after researching the software he uses we moved forward and are beyond satisfied with the whole experience.  Would recommend to anyone planning for their future, and I found his services to be far more comprehensive than any account manager we used in the past.

We can't say enough about how impressed we were with Kevin Burkle and HCP Wealth Planning.  We were reluctant at first to take a deep dive into our finances but the comprehensive approach to planning for the future has given us great peace of mind.  We were specifically looking for a fee-only advisor, not ongoing investment management.  Kevin was generous with his time and helped through every step of the process. We now have a clear and detailed analysis of our current situation and what our financial future looks like.  Kevin encouraged us to imagine all future wants and showed how they can be acheived, and we have access to a digital planner going forward so we can tweak it to fit future changes.  It was honestly one of the best financial planning experiences we've had in 40+ years of investing, and well worth the very reasonable fee.

Over the years Covenant Wealth advisors have gone above and beyond to help me with my financial goals. This includes immediate response to questions, extensive planning and implementation, and offering educational opportunities. 5 stars!
Was able to immediately answer all my questions and point me in the right direction!

review_text_raw:

advisor_name: Daniel Yerger, MBA, CFP®, ChFC®, AIF®, CDFA®
review_text_raw: Prior to investing our money my husband and I had just let it sit in savings accounts and 401k accounts, even though my husband was retired and I was partially retired. When we met with Dan he did an in depth analysis of our funds and how we were spending, and presented options for investing the money. His analysis was great. He talked to us about opening a tax free account with an employer match from my company. As a sole proprietor this was valuable for me as it was my company with only one employee, me. He was able to figure out a way to start investing in 529 accounts to help with schooling without effecting our investments and living expenses. Even in this economy our investments have continued to make money, which tells me he is paying attention to our accounts, which is of course very important to us. I highly recommend him as a financial planner.
