To help transition me into the new company, Dan took it upon himself to become my mentor, and well that mentorship quickly grew into a strong friendship. One of the most notable things is that he always made sure I had a place to go during the holidays.
Truth be told, while I was in Colorado, I was living paycheck to paycheck and worried about my future. I knew I needed guidance and who best to turn to then the person that built a strong, trusting relationship with me. Dan helped me understand where I was at financially, what it would take to get me where I wanted to go, and the importance of investigating for my retirement outside of my employer’s plan.
Now that I’m older (no grey hair) and a bit wiser, I can say I’m financially stable and no longer worried about my future. Dan is always a phone call, text, or email away if have any questions about my investments or want his opinion on something that I read online. He personalizes the experience by calling his clients every month to give them updates on their portfolio. I can say with confidence that Dan will stay my financial advisor for life.
Well-written, informative and low-risk ideas that are vetted by a trained and trusted personal finance blogger.
WT covers many useful topics. Helps helps connect you with wide range of qualified advisors.
Love the creative money-making ideas in this PF blog. #expertise
Well-written and researched money-making investment ideas by a trusted, professional blogger and columnist

MWB/TJ is a wealth of financial advice and I feel extremely lucky to have them on my team! No matter what stage of your life you are in, working with Modern Wealth Builders to create a financial plan will be worth its weight in gold.

I would highly recommend Kevin and have referred others to him for financial planning and advice. He is very thorough and makes recommendations based on his expertise but is also willing to be flexible based on my personal situation. Because of Kevin’s guidance, I feel confident in my financial future and have the tools needed to monitor my progress.

Jason and Eliot Rose are on my short list of financial advisers that I  strongly recommend.  They are responsive, reliable, and treat every client as individuals based on their specific needs.  If you are nearing retirement age and are looking for guidance to how and if you can transition to next phase of your life, please give them a call.
Charter Financial Group is so helpful. Definitely will help you make the best decision and safe you money.

I’m not Matt’s client but I have called him a handful of times for financial advice. He is always friendly, helpful, and knowledgeable about everything I have asked him. He is always willing to provide sound financial advice.
It was great working with Charter and Flavio recently to update my life insurance. He was very helpful and got me great rates. I recommend this agency to anyone in the Myrtle Beach area!

Abundo Wealth has been our financial planner over a year. They have helped us with every financial question possible. They are a super cool group of people who legitimately want you to succeed. But one of the coolest things as an avid traveler is that they will also make sure you are getting the most perks from your flight deals, credit card points, and anything that involves traveling expenses. They don't only answer your questions whenever you reach out to them. They proactively inform you about changes, rates, etc as they see fit with your financial goals and plans. AND they have a reasonable monthly rate with no hidden fees. They deserve all the stars!

Gary looks at the entire portfolio. Doesn’t make hasty decisions and keeps us informed regarding what is going on. We complete an annual risk assessment, review various investment options and the performance of our portfolio and make changes accordingly.

advisor_name: Emily Rassam, CFP®, CRPS, AIFA, NSSA, CDAA
review_text_raw: Emily is so bright and has a deep understanding of her business. She is very good at explaining things to a layperson with the right amount of detail and clarity. I’ve been working with her for several years and I couldn’t be happier. I feel like our nest egg is safe and productive. I really couldn’t be happier to be her client.

advisor_name: Emily Rassam, CFP®, CRPS, AIFA, NSSA, CDAA
review_text_raw: My husband and I trust Emily with our money she is honest and is very helpful and she knows how to listen to what we want and come up with a plan.

advisor_name: Emily Rassam, CFP®, CRPS, AIFA, NSSA, CDAA
review_text_raw: We have been very very pleased with Emily.  We moved with Emily from her previous firm to Archer because we trust her.  We have had many financial advisors over the years.  Emily is the first one my wife has connected with.  Emily explains things in a way that she understands and appreciates.  Emily knows us and is always available.  She is now also helping my two daughters.  I cannot recommend her enough.

When it comes to understanding and managing finances I’ve never been too good with it. But  for Angel Escobedo it’s his first language. I’m very impressed and grateful for the amount of help he single handedly gave me. Angel broke down every term into its basic elements and made someone who’s never been great with money understand it better than I ever have in my life. I definitely recommend setting up a meeting with him to get further insight or just learn something that will help you. With Mr Escobedo on my team, I have all the confidence I need moving forward and planning for my future with my investments and planning for retirement.

advisor_name: Emily Rassam, CFP®, CRPS, AIFA, NSSA, CDAA
review_text_raw: I've been working with Emily for a few years now. She is a wonderful, kind and caring person.  She has helped me tremendously in understanding the world of Financial planning.  I am retiring next year in 2023 and feel very comfortable my retirement goals have been met.  Trust is very important in selecting a Financial planning professional.  I have every confidence in Emily's guidance to make sure I have met my goals and can retire with peace of mind.  She is a true professional and I'm happy to have her managing my money.

advisor_name: Emily Rassam, CFP®, CRPS, AIFA, NSSA, CDAA
review_text_raw: We've worked with Emily for a few years now, and have been so impressed.  She is a wealth of knowledge and a way of being able to answer a lay person's questions in a very thorough and understandable manner.  She can answer any question you throw at her with detail and clarity.  She is honest, credible and trustworthy.  She is very knowledgeable about the technology she has available to use and is able to provide strong visuals and projections to help with making decisions.  She is always willing to meet and discuss a given topic or to provide an update on our portfolio.  We'll forever remember Emily as the person who said we could retire.  That's a hard decision to make and she was able to clearly show us the path.  I'd highly recommend Emily to work with as a Financial Advisor.

advisor_name: Emily Rassam, CFP®, CRPS, AIFA, NSSA, CDAA
review_text_raw:
Having worked with Emily as a default advisor assigned to me, I could not have been luckier in our alignment.  Emily has consistently made herself available as I have sought guidance, performed well in adverse markets, and provided the balanced approach maximizing returns with moderate risk.  She is well versed across all investment vehicles and takes the time to discuss strategies and their merits.  From humble beginnings she has helped grow my total portfolio in a responsible manner while being respectful of the principles that guide my decision making.  As she transitioned to her current firm (AIM), she has proven to operate with integrity and dignity by honoring her obligations to her previous firm.  With her ability to blend traditional wisdom and financial thought leadership with current understanding of regulations and opportunities, Emily can and will deliver on your financial goals with a clear, well round plan and ongoing communication.

If you're not investing your money through Emily, you should be.

advisor_name: Emily Rassam, CFP®, CRPS, AIFA, NSSA, CDAA
review_text_raw:
Emily has been a lifesaver for me in so many ways.  I needed a Financial Advisor that I could trust, and I could not be more pleased.  She is honest, provides great advice, guidance and always goes the extra mile for her clients.  She is always professional, knows what is going on in the industry and what services the company offers I could benefit from.

I retired at the end of 2018, but before I did, I met with Emily, and we went over what my retirement would look like.  There is no one else I would trust with my financial future.  This advisor/client relationship is the best I've ever had.  She keeps me on the right road! I appreciate her so much.

I started using Michael a few months ago as my financial advisor and have nothing but great things to say! He asks all the right questions and customizes a plan that is personal to your own unique life style. He’s always quick to answer and I am looking forward to using him as my advisor for years to come.

I have been a client for SPFC for several years and Janet Wan is my advisor. I appreciate her promptness every time I need her help and also guide me through the financial ways that I am not familiar with.

The team at Eliot Rose has been incredibly informative and supportive as we've worked through financial decisions. We are not the biggest clients, but we always feel like their top priority. They are kind, thoughtful and always quick to respond. And they walk us through every decision with the patience of saints. My husband and I were both freelancers in the event industry when COVID shut everything down. And because of their advice and preparation, we were able to live 18 months without work and without worry. We can't thank them enough for their expert advice and for being so wonderful while they do it. We are in a better financial place than we've ever been. We would recommend them to anyone!

I randomly came across Dave about seven years ago while looking for someone to take a look at our entire (somewhat complicated) financial situation and advise us on how to make sure we were set for retirement in a few years. I'm a teacher and I particularly liked that he was familiar with the nuances of teacher retirement. I won't lie - getting together all the forms, invoices and information that he needed was a huge task but so worth it!  He put together an extremely comprehensive plan and made solid recommendations for us, not only on purely financial issues but things like insurance, creating a trust, etc. It was such a relief when we saw the final plan and realized that our goals were very achievable.  We followed through on his recommendations over the years and his plan was spot-on. My husband and I just retired with EXACTLY what Dave had projected in the plan.  We recently had him redo our plan and have now signed on to have him manage our finances and investments on an ongoing basis.  Two other things that I want to point out about Dave are that as a certified financial planner, he is ONLY looking out for our interests - he is not getting commissions, etc. from the investments he recommends. The other thing I wanted to mention is that he is also a great guy - extremely personable, always available and willing to answer questions (no matter how stupid they may be!) and does a great job of explaining things in a way that a non-financial savvy person can understand.  I highly recommend him and have recommended him to friends and coworkers.

I have had the pleasure of working with Angel. His delivery approach is  current and simple; his knowledge on the markets is excellent.   In addition, Angel has a great supportive team and he can address any situation related to insurance, taxes, estate planning, etc. Angel is one stop shop for all you financial planning needs. I highly recommend!!!

They really don't teach you much about investments and taxes in high school. But having people like Angel Escobedo in your financial life is a godsend. He's very helpful, knowledgeable and really looks out for your best interests!

I have been dealing with Larry and his company Mitlin Financial for 20+ years and consider him to be honest, trustworthy and reliable. He has advised and assisted me with my financial planning in regard to retirement planning , insurance and estate planning. I find him to be EXTREMELY knowledgeable and always has great insight and understanding in regard to what and why markets change and evaluates what direction appears best for his client’s individual needs. I would highly recommend Larry and his company Mitlin Financial for all retirement planning needs.

advisor_name: Deaton Smith, CFP®, AIF®, ChFC®, WMCP®, CEPA®
review_text_raw: Deaton and Kelly are great to work with! I highly recommend Thayer Financial.

My husband and I have been working with Josh since the beginning, about 4 years. He has always been responsive and attentive to our needs that are always changing with different stages in life. He is very well informed and is easy to talk to when learning and trying to understand new investment strategies or saving strategies. He manages expectations well and creates personalized plans for our future goals. We are very happy and stress less about our money and attaining our goals with Josh as our advisor.

While others are "losing their shirts" in this volatile market, my portfolio thus far has either seen gains or is holding steady. It certainly puts me at ease knowing Gary is managing my portfolio with his expertise and unique tools beyond what the typical money manager would do. Gary has provided invaluable advice and encouragement to me as a business owner and consultant.

I want to say thank you for Charles Luong for helping me create my first investment account. One meeting with him and i knew that he would help guide me to the right places. He explained  to me the difference between gambling with stocks and investing long term using passive index funds. he helped me understand taxes and real estate and helped me create a game plan for the 5,10,20 years. I highly recommend everyone see Charlie

I would highly recommend and refer anybody to Kevin.  He is very thorough.  He educates and most importantly takes time to listen and understand your priorities.

Retirement is a big, complex decision.   Kevin helps you understand and gives you a roadmap.  There is not a single question he could not answer.

I really like the flat rate pricing and the ability to access my data even after our evaluation period ended. These are features you don’t get from others.

I am a few years from retirement. Justin is managing my portfolio to make my quality of living, in retirement, comparable to my current standard of living. Justin is extremely knowledgeable and has an interest in meeting my financial goals. He has done quite an excellent job. Justin is very good at what he does.

Factored in portfolio growth with pension and anticipated expenses for kids' education to put us on a path to maintain our current quality of life. Great person with phenomenal perspective and insight. I'm extremely pleased.

Justin tailored his advice based on the sale of a business and future income. We have referred family and friends to Justin who continue to work with him. Justin is very welcoming,  contactable, courteous and a truly professional financial advisor who  explains everything thoroughly.  Such a pleasure to work with. We look forward to a continued relationship and further recommendations to family and friends.

Angel really understands you as a whole person, not just an account. I really appreciate this about his approach and philosophy to advising. As a younger client who has pretty limited financial experience beyond the bare basics, Angel really takes the time to help explain things to me in ways that show how much he cares about my understanding. He is a great teacher who is always so patient and goes the extra mile to teach, look into questions, and ultimately make me feel confident in my decisions. Angel is extremely sharp and knowledgeable about all things finance, and knows exactly how to navigate any situation you throw at him. He doesn’t shy away from complexity and has access to lots of great resources and connections when he needs  them. Couldn’t be happier with my decision to go with him!

I send everyone I know to Justin. I have come to know Justin and trust him with my wealth and finances. Justin is the best of the best. He will never steer me wrong. He always has my best interest at heart. Justin will answer me whenever I call with whatever random questions I can think up.

He is active in our budgeting allowance toward investments monthly based on capital avail to infuse into portfolio. He tailored a plan that works for us individually based on our circumstances. Is flexible and always proactive as it relates to changes in the current financial climate. His planning is based on our long term goals and objectives. Trust him explicitly. Justin has taken us from a place of uncertainty about our retirement plans and financial future to a plan that os actually working for us. I couldn't be happier with what he has done for us.
Justin customizes your financial needs, based on your goals. He gives personalized service, he knows his clients well. Highly recommend Justin Long.

Justin listened to all my concerns and we discussed my current personal situation, personally and professionally to advise me. He used experience from other clients and his wealth of knowledge and connections with other professionals to guide decisions that needed to be made. I would let them know that Justin as been a good listener, and is knowledgeable in his field. He is friendly, respectful and considerate of time and feelings I have. I feel he is genuinely there to do what is best of his clients. Justin is personable, yet professional. He is knowledgeable and willing to give his time to help you feel comfortable with decisions that need to be made. Justin was empathetic with my situation. He personally helped with phones calls to agencies that needed to be contacted, as well as, assisting with filling out forms, and answering all my questions. If he didn't have the answer, he knew someone that  did and got right back to me.

About 15 years ago, Justin became my Fidelity account advisor.  During the time at Fidelity Justin provided above and beyond financial advice.  Nine years ago when my husband was diagnosed with terminal cancer, Justin adjusted my financials to enable me to have immediate, available cash on hand.  When my husband passed, Justin held my hand as we navigated the months that followed.  When Justin opened Diazo Wealth Group, I immediately joined and it was one of the best decisions I have made.  Recently, Justin supported my decision to move to Cedar Crest Village and again held my hand and advised me through the long-distance move.  Justin recommended my realtor and he spent countless hours supporting me through the financial maze. I am now happily settled(almost) and I know without a doubt that Justin was instrumental in securing my new future.  Words cannot describe Justin's loyalty and dedication.  He is a rare gem!

As I have previously said, Justin is supportive, dedicated and continues to consider my best interests. Justin is not your average financial advisor.  He considers my best interests and will tirelessly work to ensure my financial stability.  Justin is a rare gem that I am glad I found!

The advisor has listened, debated, and has been flexible in his approach to what I feel my continuing and changing goals are as the market dynamics continue to influence our approach to building wealth for my family. I tell my friends and family that my advisor lives and  breathes the financial markets which makes him very knowledgeable. He does his best to always make himself available to me if I have questions or concerns. He tailors my investments to my needs. He cares about his customers. I have worked with many financial advisors over the years and having worked 35 years in the financial securities business myself I can usually tell when someone is knowledgeable, dedicated and sincere. Justin Long is the best financial advisor I have had.

Very grateful I found this incredible company and the perfect advisor that fits my needs and goals.

I grew up with little to no education in finance or in investment planning. Searching for an advisor was  almost like online dating… How do I find someone that I can trust my life’s work and be assured they make the moves right for me.

First conversation with Angel Escobedo was effortless. He truly listened to my concerns and life goals. Yet that phone call was just the beginning. I’m all for structure and planning and the Capasso team has it down pat.

Initiation is multiple meetings with impressive software planning demonstrations, thorough educational sessions (for those of us with less experience can better understand terminology yet those familiar probably get a lot from it as well), and some actual testing to understand where you stand with risk. By the end I knew more about my own take on finance than I ever have. And I’ve sat through plenty of fidelity planning sessions.

As you work through their steps there is a very secure and easy way to upload needed information to their system. Pretty happy with the low maintenance yet versatile way to get them documents when I live cities away. All the while, Angel is communicating the process. I never once felt lost or confused or unsupported.

Now. Looking at the portfolio. Holy cow I’m going to be rich. But seriously. I’m very excited to have Angel taking care of my retirement planning. My confidence in his skills alone is beyond my previous expectations. Let alone having his entire team at Capasso. They all support and assist in more ways than I know, like Kelly getting my accounts swapped over so all I had to do was spend two minutes on a phone call with Fidelity and her. It has been a major weight lifted off my mind having them to back me.

Lastly, things I didn’t know I would get from this. Long term disability insurance. Angel sifted through my work benefits and got me to the right people for insurance that will make up what I need just in case. As I work in one of the deadliest industries I think he knew what was best for me more than me. And with that he actually got me to create and sign a Will. He has helped me figure out a 529 for my sister’s kids. Even keeping on top of my schedule for me so I could get it finalized in time. He even checked on me multiple times during tax season.

The idea that financial planners aren’t interested in your well-being, and just leach money from you is complete garbage. Had I kept my contributions like Fidelity has I’d probably have an ok 401k when I retire. Having Angel and Capasso I know that I am getting the best performance from my investments and that their immense research and work is going to make me a happy retiree one day.

We’ve been working with Jason and Paul for about six months, now.  We wanted a fiduciary who would give us their unbiased,  professional opinion whether our retirement plans were on track.  Happy to say we got all of that, and a whole lot more!!!  The folks at Eliot Rose take a deep dive into their clients lives so they can understand the wholistic view of your situation.  Some of the things we reviewed in the process: how you feel about your job, your attitude about money, your childhood perception of your family’s financial status, your “now” budget, your “wish list” budget, what you think your retirement looks like, etc.  Then you get to the good stuff!  Jason and Paul gave us an analysis of our retirement plan chance of success, a strategy for withdrawals from Social Security and 401ks, and educated us along the way about how choices we make today will affect our retirement.  We highly recommend Eliot Rose to anyone who wants to truly understand their financial picture and know the truth about your  retirement picture – good, bad or in between!  They are so ingrained in our everyday financial decisions now, that when we recently were tempted to buy a house that came up for sale in our neighborhood, we reached out to Jason & Paul to find out if we were ruining our financial future by considering it!  They quickly set up a call to go over the pros and cons of modifying our financial plan.  They are super nice and fun to work with and we highly recommend the Eliot Rose team!

review_text_raw: Derek has a love and passion for his job you don't find often in today’s world. Derek is extremely knowledgeable, if he doesn’t know the answer, he will figure it out and not just bs you. Trust is the first word that comes to mind when I think of PharmD.

I hired Michal 4 years ago after finding him in a NYT article about financial planners that don’t base their fees on a percentage fee on trades.  I now pay a fixed modest percentage on my assets.
I left Fidelity Portfolio Services for Michal and Skylark Wealth.  Michal went through my holdings at Fidelity with a fine-toothed comb.  I was shocked and surprised that it wasn’t a coincidence that so many of my assets were invested in Fidelity instruments.  Many of them had very high loads that Fidelity collected.  The percentage fees I was paying, thus, were much much higher than I seemed.  The way it worked at Fidelity was that I had a voice meeting once a year to discuss the investments and how to adjust them.
Michal completely took control of all of my investing and I trust him 100%.
Michal provides very very responsive service.  And he does not only provide the investment strategy, trades, etc.  He provides me with financial advice of all kinds.  And not just financial but lifestyle decisions.  He advised me on, for instance:
Is it a good time to sell my house and move into a great apartment in SF?
How much rent can I afford?
Who can I hire to do my taxes?  (And he works with the tax preparer to provide most of the documents and THEN goes over the final taxes thoroughly.  And he has found significant errors that were to our detriment)
Can you find me a lawyer to help with a pre-nuptial agreement?
What type of credit card should I get?  Is it bad to cancel my old credit card?
Should I get a HELOC for my new house?  Fixed or variable rate?
He goes through all of the boring paperwork involved in choosing a health care insurance provider.  HSA?  FSA?  And provides recommendations.
He spends all the time you need in meetings with him to discuss things - no extra charge.
Should I take Social Security payments at age 62?  65?  70?
I can’t recommend Michal enough.

advisor_name: Madeline Napier, CFP®, MBA, FSRI, QKA
review_text_raw:

2.) My partner and I had reached a spot where it felt like we were always going backwards financially, but here we are two years later with that path completely reversed!
I really mean it when I say working with Minerva wealth, and Maddi, changed my life - we're finally able to enjoy our lives without all the financial stress and the battles about money. We're able to see dreams and goals become reality now instead of "maybe when we retire". I'm so overwhelmingly grateful to have someone I trust so completely handle our financial future! Thank you so much for everything!

The software he uses is top-notch, and we came away with a solid retirement plan with all of our variables rolled in.

Michael is an experienced professional with a personal touch. He is knowledgeable, helpful, and always available on a short notice. You can email him on a Sunday and receive and immediate response. I would strongly recommend him for your financial planning and investment.

advisor_name: Madeline Napier, CFP®, MBA, FSRI, QKA
review_text_raw: Maddi is wonderful! She is trusting, dedicated, caring, and knows her stuff! She has such a wide range of financial knowledge. Maddi is a go getter and I feel like I'm in great hands with her! She is always expanding her knowledge to meet her clients needs.

Rich put together a plan which combined the various pensions and 401k’s to maximize our earning potential. At every step, he reminded us, that if we did not feel comfortable with an option, we could make changes or leave the current plans as they are.He provided a worry-free plan that we are very happy with.
Thank you!

I learned early in life the importance of surrounding oneself by those who make one’s life better. Dave Grant does just that. In fact, he is the epitome of such a concept. Sessions with Dave are always enlightening and highly informative. Not only a financial mentor, guide, and counselor, he is an educator at heart. Throughout the years of investing, managing, short and long range designing and empowering, I have learned a great deal from Dave. And, to top it off, he has never once winced or made me feel less at what may appear an incessantly enquiring tone or idealistically inquisitive style. On the contrary, like a great educator, he relishes questions, encourages understanding, responds with fact and thorough intellectual insight, warmly welcoming the knowledge and growth of his client. Highly trusted and emphatically recommended, Dave Grant is viewed as one of the most important assets in my life, I knew when we met, Dave would make my life better. I simply didn’t realize how much.

Guy Schumacher, Ed.D.
Retired School Superintendent

"We have been a client of Michael's for about seven years now.  He is the quintessential financial professional and gentleman.

He routinely pushes information out to his clients to keep us informed of market trends and bumps in the road - quite helpful in times of high volatility.  He is always available by phone for personal advice and discussions.

We have asked Michael for assistance in taking market gains off the table several times.  He has completed these transactions in hours, not days as we have been accustomed to in the past working with other financial management groups.  The important point here is that we have withdrawn profits, not principle, on multiple occasions - that means there were profits made to take.  During these transactions, Michael has never pried into why we choose to withdraw the monies, but instead worked hard to minimize our tax consequences.

Overall, Michael has greatly exceeded our expectations for a financial management partner - key word - partner.

We look forward to continuing our relationship with Michael into the uncertain future.  With his help, we shall continue to prosper."
